authors_text: Luis Guarda,Juan Tapia,Enrique Lopez Droguett,Marcelo Ramos
title: A Novel Capsule Neural Network Based Model for Drowsiness Detection Using Electroencephalography Signals
title_zh: 一种基于胶囊神经网络的新型脑电图信号睡意检测模型
abstract: The early detection of drowsiness has become vital to ensure the correct and safe development of several industries' tasks. Due to the transient mental state of a human subject between alertness and drowsiness, automated drowsiness detection is a complex problem to tackle. The electroencephalography signals allow us to record variations in an individual's brain's electrical potential, where each of them gives specific information about a subject's mental state. However, due to this type of signal's nature, its acquisition, in general, is complex, so it is hard to have a large volume of data to apply techniques of Deep Learning for processing and classification optimally. Nevertheless, Capsule Neural Networks are a brand-new Deep Learning algorithm proposed for work with reduced amounts of data. It is a robust algorithm to handle the data's hierarchical relationships, which is an essential characteristic for work with biomedical signals. Therefore, this paper presents a Deep Learning-based method for drowsiness detection with CapsNet by using a concatenation of spectrogram images of the electroencephalography signals channels. The proposed CapsNet model is compared with a Convolutional Neural Network, which is outperformed by the proposed model, which obtains an average accuracy of 86,44% and 87,57% of sensitivity against an average accuracy of 75,86% and 79,47% sensitivity for the CNN, showing that CapsNet is more suitable for this kind of datasets and tasks.

Nevertheless, Capsule Neural Networks are a brand-new Deep Learning algorithm proposed for work with reduced amounts of data. The proposed CapsNet model is compared with a Convolutional Neural Network, which is outperformed by the proposed model, which obtains an average accuracy of 86,44% and 87,57% of sensitivity against an average accuracy of 75,86% and 79,47% sensitivity for the CNN, showing that CapsNet is more suitable for this kind of datasets and tasks.
abstract_zh: 早期发现困倦对于确保多个行业任务的正确和安全发展至关重要。由于人类受试者在警觉和睡意之间的短暂心理状态，自动睡意检测是一个需要解决的复杂问题。脑电图信号使我们能够记录个体大脑电位的变化，其中每个信号都提供有关受试者精神状态的特定信息。然而，由于此类信号的性质，其获取通常比较复杂，因此很难拥有大量数据来应用深度学习技术进行最佳处理和分类。尽管如此，胶囊神经网络是一种全新的深度学习算法，旨在处理减少的数据量。它是一种处理数据层次关系的强大算法，这是处理生物医学信号的基本特征。因此，本文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，通过使用脑电图信号通道的频谱图图像串联，利用 CapsNet 进行睡意检测。将所提出的 CapsNet 模型与卷积神经网络进行比较，所提出的模型优于卷积神经网络，其平均准确度为 86,44% 和 87,57% 的灵敏度，而 CNN 的平均准确度为 75,86% 和 79,47% 的灵敏度，表明 CapsNet 更适合此类数据集和任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于胶囊神经网络（CapsNet）的深度学习模型，用于通过脑电图（EEG）信号检测嗜睡状态。
AI.motivation: 嗜睡检测对工业安全至关重要，但EEG信号数据量小且复杂，传统深度学习方法难以有效处理。CapsNet能处理小数据集和层次化关系，适合生物医学信号任务。
AI.method: 将EEG信号的频谱图通道拼接后输入CapsNet模型，并与卷积神经网络（CNN）进行性能对比。
AI.result: CapsNet模型在测试中达到86.44%的平均准确率和87.57%的灵敏度，显著优于CNN的75.86%准确率和79.47%灵敏度。
AI.conclusion: CapsNet在小数据集和层次化生物信号任务中表现更优，证明其适合用于嗜睡检测等类似场景。

authors_text: Li Ding,Lee Spector
title: Evolving Neural Selection with Adaptive Regularization
title_zh: 具有自适应正则化的进化神经选择
comment: ef:Proceedings of the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion (pp. 1717-1725). 2021
comments: ef:Proceedings of the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion (pp. 1717-1725). 2021
abstract: Over-parameterization is one of the inherent characteristics of modern deep neural networks, which can often be overcome by leveraging regularization methods, such as Dropout. Usually, these methods are applied globally and all the input cases are treated equally. However, given the natural variation of the input space for real-world tasks such as image recognition and natural language understanding, it is unlikely that a fixed regularization pattern will have the same effectiveness for all the input cases. In this work, we demonstrate a method in which the selection of neurons in deep neural networks evolves, adapting to the difficulty of prediction. We propose the Adaptive Neural Selection (ANS) framework, which evolves to weigh neurons in a layer to form network variants that are suitable to handle different input cases. Experimental results show that the proposed method can significantly improve the performance of commonly-used neural network architectures on standard image recognition benchmarks. Ablation studies also validate the effectiveness and contribution of each component in the proposed framework.
summary: Over-parameterization is one of the inherent characteristics of modern deep neural networks, which can often be overcome by leveraging regularization methods, such as Dropout. Usually, these methods are applied globally and all the input cases are treated equally. However, given the natural variation of the input space for real-world tasks such as image recognition and natural language understanding, it is unlikely that a fixed regularization pattern will have the same effectiveness for all the input cases. In this work, we demonstrate a method in which the selection of neurons in deep neural networks evolves, adapting to the difficulty of prediction. We propose the Adaptive Neural Selection (ANS) framework, which evolves to weigh neurons in a layer to form network variants that are suitable to handle different input cases. Experimental results show that the proposed method can significantly improve the performance of commonly-used neural network architectures on standard image recognition benchmarks. Ablation studies also validate the effectiveness and contribution of each component in the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 过度参数化是现代深度神经网络的固有特征之一，通常可以通过利用正则化方法（例如 Dropout）来克服。通常，这些方法在全局范围内应用，并且所有输入案例都受到同等对待。然而，考虑到图像识别和自然语言理解等现实世界任务的输入空间的自然变化，固定的正则化模式不太可能对所有输入情况具有相同的有效性。在这项工作中，我们演示了一种方法，其中深度神经网络中神经元的选择不断发展，以适应预测的难度。我们提出了自适应神经选择（ANS）框架，该框架不断发展以权衡层中的神经元，以形成适合处理不同输入情况的网络变体。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以显着提高常用神经网络架构在标准图像识别基准上的性能。消融研究还验证了拟议框架中每个组成部分的有效性和贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应神经选择（ANS）框架，通过动态调整神经网络中神经元的权重来适应不同输入的预测难度，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现代深度神经网络存在过参数化问题，传统全局正则化方法（如Dropout）对所有输入采用固定模式，难以适应现实任务中输入空间的自然变化，导致效果受限。
AI.method: 设计自适应神经选择（ANS）框架，在每一层根据输入预测难度动态调整神经元权重，形成适应不同输入的网络变体，并通过进化机制优化选择策略。
AI.result: 在标准图像识别基准测试中，ANS显著提升了常用网络架构的性能，消融实验验证了框架各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ANS通过自适应正则化有效解决了输入差异性问题，为神经网络的动态优化提供了新思路，验证了适应性调节在提升模型性能中的价值。

result: 在标准图像识别基准测试中，ANS显著提升了常用网络架构的性能，消融实验验证了框架各组件的有效性。
conclusion: ANS通过自适应正则化有效解决了输入差异性问题，为神经网络的动态优化提供了新思路，验证了适应性调节在提升模型性能中的价值。

authors_text: Xin Zhao,Lin Wang,Qinfei Li,Heng Chen,Shuangrong Liu,Pengkun Hou,Jiayuan Ye,Yan Pei,Xu Wu,Jianfeng Yuan,Haozhong Gao,Bo Yang
title: 3D microstructural generation from 2D images of cement paste using generative adversarial networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络从水泥浆的 2D 图像生成 3D 微观结构
abstract: Establishing a realistic three-dimensional (3D) microstructure is a crucial step for studying microstructure development of hardened cement pastes. However, acquiring 3D microstructural images for cement often involves high costs and quality compromises. This paper proposes a generative adversarial networks-based method for generating 3D microstructures from a single two-dimensional (2D) image, capable of producing high-quality and realistic 3D images at low cost. In the method, a framework (CEM3DMG) is designed to synthesize 3D images by learning microstructural information from a 2D cross-sectional image. Experimental results show that CEM3DMG can generate realistic 3D images of large size. Visual observation confirms that the generated 3D images exhibit similar microstructural features to the 2D images, including similar pore distribution and particle morphology. Furthermore, quantitative analysis reveals that reconstructed 3D microstructures closely match the real 2D microstructure in terms of gray level histogram, phase proportions, and pore size distribution. The source code for CEM3DMG is available in the GitHub repository at: https://github.com/NBICLAB/CEM3DMG.
summary: Establishing a realistic three-dimensional (3D) microstructure is a crucial step for studying microstructure development of hardened cement pastes. However, acquiring 3D microstructural images for cement often involves high costs and quality compromises. This paper proposes a generative adversarial networks-based method for generating 3D microstructures from a single two-dimensional (2D) image, capable of producing high-quality and realistic 3D images at low cost. In the method, a framework (CEM3DMG) is designed to synthesize 3D images by learning microstructural information from a 2D cross-sectional image. Experimental results show that CEM3DMG can generate realistic 3D images of large size. Visual observation confirms that the generated 3D images exhibit similar microstructural features to the 2D images, including similar pore distribution and particle morphology. Furthermore, quantitative analysis reveals that reconstructed 3D microstructures closely match the real 2D microstructure in terms of gray level histogram, phase proportions, and pore size distribution. The source code for CEM3DMG is available in the GitHub repository at: https://github.com/NBICLAB/CEM3DMG.
abstract_zh: 建立真实的三维 (3D) 微观结构是研究硬化水泥浆体微观结构发展的关键步骤。然而，获取水泥的 3D 微观结构图像通常涉及高昂的成本和质量妥协。本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络的方法，用于从单个二维 (2D) 图像生成 3D 微结构，能够以低成本生成高质量且逼真的 3D 图像。在该方法中，设计了一个框架（CEM3DMG），通过从 2D 横截面图像中学习微观结构信息来合成 3D 图像。实验结果表明CEM3DMG可以生成逼真的大尺寸3D图像。视觉观察证实，生成的 3D 图像表现出与 2D 图像相似的微观结构特征，包括相似的孔隙分布和颗粒形态。此外，定量分析表明，重建的 3D 微观结构在灰度直方图、相比例和孔径分布方面与真实的 2D 微观结构非常匹配。 CEM3DMG 的源代码可在 GitHub 存储库中获取：https://github.com/NBICLAB/CEM3DMG。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，从单张二维图像生成高保真且逼真的三维水泥浆体微观结构。
AI.motivation: 获取水泥浆体的三维微观结构图像成本高且质量难以保证，因此需要一种低成本且高效的方法来生成高质量的三维微观结构。
AI.method: 设计了一种名为CEM3DMG的框架，通过学习二维横截面图像中的微观结构信息，生成三维图像。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CEM3DMG可以生成大尺寸的高质量三维图像，其微观结构特征与二维图像相似，包括孔隙分布和颗粒形态，并且在灰度直方图、相位比例和孔隙尺寸分布方面与真实二维微观结构高度匹配。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种低成本、高效的生成水泥浆体三维微观结构的新途径，具有重要的研究和应用价值。

search_text: 3D microstructural generation from 2D images of cement paste using generative adversarial networks 使用生成对抗网络从水泥浆的 2D 图像生成 3D 微观结构 Establishing a realistic three-dimensional (3D) microstructure is a crucial step for studying microstructure development of hardened cement pastes. However, acquiring 3D microstructural images for cement often involves high costs and quality compromises. This paper proposes a generative adversarial networks-based method for generating 3D microstructures from a single two-dimensional (2D) image, capable of producing high-quality and realistic 3D images at low cost. In the method, a framework (CEM3DMG) is designed to synthesize 3D images by learning microstructural information from a 2D cross-sectional image. Experimental results show that CEM3DMG can generate realistic 3D images of large size. Visual observation confirms that the generated 3D images exhibit similar microstructural features to the 2D images, including similar pore distribution and particle morphology. Furthermore, quantitative analysis reveals that reconstructed 3D microstructures closely match the real 2D microstructure in terms of gray level histogram, phase proportions, and pore size distribution. The source code for CEM3DMG is available in the GitHub repository at: https://github.com/NBICLAB/CEM3DMG. 建立真实的三维 (3D) 微观结构是研究硬化水泥浆体微观结构发展的关键步骤。然而，获取水泥的 3D 微观结构图像通常涉及高昂的成本和质量妥协。本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络的方法，用于从单个二维 (2D) 图像生成 3D 微结构，能够以低成本生成高质量且逼真的 3D 图像。在该方法中，设计了一个框架（CEM3DMG），通过从 2D 横截面图像中学习微观结构信息来合成 3D 图像。实验结果表明CEM3DMG可以生成逼真的大尺寸3D图像。视觉观察证实，生成的 3D 图像表现出与 2D 图像相似的微观结构特征，包括相似的孔隙分布和颗粒形态。此外，定量分析表明，重建的 3D 微观结构在灰度直方图、相比例和孔径分布方面与真实的 2D 微观结构非常匹配。 CEM3DMG 的源代码可在 GitHub 存储库中获取：https://github.com/NBICLAB/CEM3DMG。 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，从单张二维图像生成高保真且逼真的三维水泥浆体微观结构。 Xin Zhao,Lin Wang,Qinfei Li,Heng Chen,Shuangrong Liu,Pengkun Hou,Jiayuan Ye,Yan Pei,Xu Wu,Jianfeng Yuan,Haozhong Gao,Bo Yang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaotie Deng,Hanyu Li,Ningyuan Li
title: On Convergence Lemma and Convergence Stability for Piecewise Analytic Functions
title_zh: 关于分段解析函数的收敛引理和收敛稳定性
abstract: In this work, a convergence lemma for function $f$ being finite compositions of analytic mappings and the maximum operator is proved. The lemma shows that the set of $δ$-stationary points near an isolated local minimum point $x^*$ is shrinking to $x^*$ as $δ\to 0$. It is a natural extension of the version for strongly convex $C^1$ functions. However, the correctness of the lemma is subtle. Analytic mappings are necessary for the lemma in the sense that replacing it with differentiable or $C^\infty$ mappings makes the lemma false. The proof is based on stratification theorems of semi-analytic sets by Łojasiewicz. An extension of this proof presents a geometric characterization of the set of stationary points of $f$. Finally, a notion of stability on stationary points, called convergence stability, is proposed. It asks, under small numerical errors, whether a reasonable convergent optimization method started near a stationary point should eventually converge to the same stationary point. The concept of convergence stability becomes nontrivial qualitatively only when the objective function is both nonsmooth and nonconvex. Via the convergence lemma, an intuitive equivalent condition for convergence stability of $f$ is proved. These results together provide a new geometric perspective to study the problem of "where-to-converge" in nonsmooth nonconvex optimization.
summary: In this work, a convergence lemma for function $f$ being finite compositions of analytic mappings and the maximum operator is proved. The lemma shows that the set of $δ$-stationary points near an isolated local minimum point $x^*$ is shrinking to $x^*$ as $δ\to 0$. It is a natural extension of the version for strongly convex $C^1$ functions. However, the correctness of the lemma is subtle. Analytic mappings are necessary for the lemma in the sense that replacing it with differentiable or $C^\infty$ mappings makes the lemma false. The proof is based on stratification theorems of semi-analytic sets by Łojasiewicz. An extension of this proof presents a geometric characterization of the set of stationary points of $f$. Finally, a notion of stability on stationary points, called convergence stability, is proposed. It asks, under small numerical errors, whether a reasonable convergent optimization method started near a stationary point should eventually converge to the same stationary point. The concept of convergence stability becomes nontrivial qualitatively only when the objective function is both nonsmooth and nonconvex. Via the convergence lemma, an intuitive equivalent condition for convergence stability of $f$ is proved. These results together provide a new geometric perspective to study the problem of "where-to-converge" in nonsmooth nonconvex optimization.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，证明了函数 $f$ 是解析映射和最大算子的有限组合的收敛引理。该引理表明，孤立局部极小点 $x^*$ 附近的 $δ$ 驻点集随着 $δ\to 0$ 缩小到 $x^*$。它是强凸 $C^1$ 函数版本的自然扩展。然而，引理的正确性是微妙的。解析映射对于引理是必要的，因为用可微分或 $C^\infty$ 映射替换它会使引理为假。该证明基于 Łojasiewicz 的半解析集分层定理。该证明的扩展提出了 $f$ 驻点集的几何特征。最后，提出了驻点稳定性的概念，称为收敛稳定性。它询问在较小的数值误差下，在驻点附近开始的合理收敛优化方法是否最终应该收敛到同一驻点。仅当目标函数既非光滑又非凸时，收敛稳定性的概念在质量上变得不平凡。通过收敛引理，证明了$f$收敛稳定性的直观等价条件。这些结果共同为研究非光滑非凸优化中的“收敛”问题提供了新的几何视角。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了分段解析函数的收敛引理，并提出了收敛稳定性概念，以研究非光滑非凸优化中'收敛至何处'的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强凸函数的收敛性分析无法直接推广到非光滑非凸场景，需建立解析映射的收敛性理论并解决数值误差下的稳定性问题。
AI.method: 基于Łojasiewicz半解析集分层定理，结合解析映射的特性，通过几何特征刻画平稳点集并建立收敛稳定性等价条件。
AI.result: 证明了δ-平稳点集随δ→0收缩至局部极小点，解析映射的不可替代性，以及收敛稳定性的直观等价条件。
AI.conclusion: 为非光滑非凸优化提供了新的几何分析框架，揭示了收敛行为与函数结构间的本质联系。

The lemma shows that the set of $δ$-stationary points near an isolated local minimum point $x^*$ is shrinking to $x^*$ as $δ\to 0$. It is a natural extension of the version for strongly convex $C^1$ functions. However, the correctness of the lemma is subtle. Analytic mappings are necessary for the lemma in the sense that replacing it with differentiable or $C^\infty$ mappings makes the lemma false. The proof is based on stratification theorems of semi-analytic sets by Łojasiewicz. An extension of this proof presents a geometric characterization of the set of stationary points of $f$. Finally, a notion of stability on stationary points, called convergence stability, is proposed. Via the convergence lemma, an intuitive equivalent condition for convergence stability of $f$ is proved. authors_text: Diganta Misra,Bharat Runwal,Tianlong Chen,Zhangyang Wang,Irina Rish
title: APP: Anytime Progressive Pruning
title_zh: APP：随时渐进修剪
comment: 21 pages including 4 pages of references. Preprint version
comments: 21 pages including 4 pages of references. Preprint version
abstract: With the latest advances in deep learning, there has been a lot of focus on the online learning paradigm due to its relevance in practical settings. Although many methods have been investigated for optimal learning settings in scenarios where the data stream is continuous over time, sparse networks training in such settings have often been overlooked. In this paper, we explore the problem of training a neural network with a target sparsity in a particular case of online learning: the anytime learning at macroscale paradigm (ALMA). We propose a novel way of progressive pruning, referred to as \textit{Anytime Progressive Pruning} (APP); the proposed approach significantly outperforms the baseline dense and Anytime OSP models across multiple architectures and datasets under short, moderate, and long-sequence training. Our method, for example, shows an improvement in accuracy of $\approx 7\%$ and a reduction in the generalization gap by $\approx 22\%$, while being $\approx 1/3$ rd the size of the dense baseline model in few-shot restricted imagenet training. We further observe interesting nonmonotonic transitions in the generalization gap in the high number of megabatches-based ALMA. The code and experiment dashboards can be accessed at \url{https://github.com/landskape-ai/Progressive-Pruning} and \url{https://wandb.ai/landskape/APP}, respectively.
summary: With the latest advances in deep learning, there has been a lot of focus on the online learning paradigm due to its relevance in practical settings. Although many methods have been investigated for optimal learning settings in scenarios where the data stream is continuous over time, sparse networks training in such settings have often been overlooked. In this paper, we explore the problem of training a neural network with a target sparsity in a particular case of online learning: the anytime learning at macroscale paradigm (ALMA). We propose a novel way of progressive pruning, referred to as \textit{Anytime Progressive Pruning} (APP); the proposed approach significantly outperforms the baseline dense and Anytime OSP models across multiple architectures and datasets under short, moderate, and long-sequence training. Our method, for example, shows an improvement in accuracy of $\approx 7\%$ and a reduction in the generalization gap by $\approx 22\%$, while being $\approx 1/3$ rd the size of the dense baseline model in few-shot restricted imagenet training. We further observe interesting nonmonotonic transitions in the generalization gap in the high number of megabatches-based ALMA. The code and experiment dashboards can be accessed at \url{https://github.com/landskape-ai/Progressive-Pruning} and \url{https://wandb.ai/landskape/APP}, respectively.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的最新进展，在线学习范式因其与实际环境的相关性而受到广泛关注。尽管已经研究了许多方法来在数据流随时间连续的情况下实现最佳学习设置，但这种设置中的稀疏网络训练经常被忽视。在本文中，我们探讨了在在线学习的特定情况下训练具有目标稀疏性的神经网络的问题：宏观尺度范式的随时学习（ALMA）。我们提出了一种新颖的渐进式剪枝方法，称为 \textit{Anytime Progressive Pruning} (APP)；在短序列、中序列和长序列训练下，所提出的方法在多个架构和数据集上显着优于基线密集模型和 Anytime OSP 模型。例如，我们的方法显示，准确度提高了 $\approx 7\%$，泛化差距减少了 $\approx\%$，同时在少样本受限 imagenet 训练中，密集基线模型的大小减少了 $\approx 1/3$。我们进一步观察到大量基于兆批次的 ALMA 中泛化差距中有趣的非单调转变。代码和实验仪表板可以分别通过 \url{https://github.com/landskape-ai/Progressive-Pruning} 和 \url{https://wandb.ai/landskape/APP} 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Anytime Progressive Pruning (APP)的渐进式剪枝方法，用于在在线学习场景下训练具有目标稀疏度的神经网络，特别是在宏尺度任意学习（ALMA）范式中。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在连续数据流的在线学习场景中，往往忽视了稀疏网络的训练，导致模型效率与性能之间的权衡不足。本文旨在解决这一问题，提出更高效的稀疏网络训练方法。
AI.method: 提出Anytime Progressive Pruning (APP)方法，通过渐进式剪枝策略，在ALMA范式下动态调整网络稀疏度，适应短期、中期和长期序列训练需求。
AI.result: APP在多个架构和数据集上显著优于基线密集模型和Anytime OSP模型，例如在Few-shot受限ImageNet训练中，准确率提升约7%，泛化差距减少约22%，模型体积仅为密集基线的1/3。同时观察到高兆批次ALMA中的泛化差距非单调变化。
AI.conclusion: APP方法在在线学习场景下的稀疏网络训练中表现出色，有效平衡了模型精度、泛化能力和计算效率，代码与实验平台已开源，为后续研究提供支持。

search_text: APP: Anytime Progressive Pruning APP：随时渐进修剪 With the latest advances in deep learning, there has been a lot of focus on the online learning paradigm due to its relevance in practical settings. Although many methods have been investigated for optimal learning settings in scenarios where the data stream is continuous over time, sparse networks training in such settings have often been overlooked. In this paper, we explore the problem of training a neural network with a target sparsity in a particular case of online learning: the anytime learning at macroscale paradigm (ALMA). We propose a novel way of progressive pruning, referred to as \textit{Anytime Progressive Pruning} (APP); the proposed approach significantly outperforms the baseline dense and Anytime OSP models across multiple architectures and datasets under short, moderate, and long-sequence training. Our method, for example, shows an improvement in accuracy of $\approx 7\%$ and a reduction in the generalization gap by $\approx 22\%$, while being $\approx 1/3$ rd the size of the dense baseline model in few-shot restricted imagenet training. We further observe interesting nonmonotonic transitions in the generalization gap in the high number of megabatches-based ALMA. The code and experiment dashboards can be accessed at \url{https://github.com/landskape-ai/Progressive-Pruning} and \url{https://wandb.ai/landskape/APP}, respectively. 随着深度学习的最新进展，在线学习范式因其与实际环境的相关性而受到广泛关注。尽管已经研究了许多方法来在数据流随时间连续的情况下实现最佳学习设置，但这种设置中的稀疏网络训练经常被忽视。在本文中，我们探讨了在在线学习的特定情况下训练具有目标稀疏性的神经网络的问题：宏观尺度范式的随时学习（ALMA）。我们提出了一种新颖的渐进式剪枝方法，称为 \textit{Anytime Progressive Pruning} (APP)；在短序列、中序列和长序列训练下，所提出的方法在多个架构和数据集上显着优于基线密集模型和 Anytime OSP 模型。例如，我们的方法显示，准确度提高了 $\approx 7\%$，泛化差距减少了 $\approx\%$，同时在少样本受限 imagenet 训练中，密集基线模型的大小减少了 $\approx 1/3$。我们进一步观察到大量基于兆批次的 ALMA 中泛化差距中有趣的非单调转变。代码和实验仪表板可以分别通过 \url{https://github.com/landskape-ai/Progressive-Pruning} 和 \url{https://wandb.ai/landskape/APP} 访问。 本文提出了一种名为Anytime Progressive Pruning (APP)的渐进式剪枝方法，用于在在线学习场景下训练具有目标稀疏度的神经网络，特别是在宏尺度任意学习（ALMA）范式中。 Diganta Misra,Bharat Runwal,Tianlong Chen,Zhangyang Wang,Irina Rish cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Dhanya Sridhar,Caterina De Bacco,David Blei
title: Estimating Social Influence from Observational Data
title_zh: 根据观察数据估计社会影响力
comment: To appear at CLeaR 2022 (1st Conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning)
comments: To appear at CLeaR 2022 (1st Conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning)
abstract: We consider the problem of estimating social influence, the effect that a person's behavior has on the future behavior of their peers. The key challenge is that shared behavior between friends could be equally explained by influence or by two other confounding factors: 1) latent traits that caused people to both become friends and engage in the behavior, and 2) latent preferences for the behavior. This paper addresses the challenges of estimating social influence with three contributions. First, we formalize social influence as a causal effect, one which requires inferences about hypothetical interventions. Second, we develop Poisson Influence Factorization (PIF), a method for estimating social influence from observational data. PIF fits probabilistic factor models to networks and behavior data to infer variables that serve as substitutes for the confounding latent traits. Third, we develop assumptions under which PIF recovers estimates of social influence. We empirically study PIF with semi-synthetic and real data from Last.fm, and conduct a sensitivity analysis. We find that PIF estimates social influence most accurately compared to related methods and remains robust under some violations of its assumptions.
summary: We consider the problem of estimating social influence, the effect that a person's behavior has on the future behavior of their peers. The key challenge is that shared behavior between friends could be equally explained by influence or by two other confounding factors: 1) latent traits that caused people to both become friends and engage in the behavior, and 2) latent preferences for the behavior. This paper addresses the challenges of estimating social influence with three contributions. First, we formalize social influence as a causal effect, one which requires inferences about hypothetical interventions. Second, we develop Poisson Influence Factorization (PIF), a method for estimating social influence from observational data. PIF fits probabilistic factor models to networks and behavior data to infer variables that serve as substitutes for the confounding latent traits. Third, we develop assumptions under which PIF recovers estimates of social influence. We empirically study PIF with semi-synthetic and real data from Last.fm, and conduct a sensitivity analysis. We find that PIF estimates social influence most accurately compared to related methods and remains robust under some violations of its assumptions.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑估计社会影响力的问题，即一个人的行为对其同龄人未来行为的影响。关键的挑战是，朋友之间的共同行为可以同样地通过影响力或其他两个混杂因素来解释：1）导致人们成为朋友并参与该行为的潜在特征，2）对该行为的潜在偏好。本文通过三个贡献解决了估计社会影响力的挑战。首先，我们将社会影响形式化为一种因果效应，这需要对假设的干预措施进行推断。其次，我们开发了泊松影响因子分解（PIF），一种根据观察数据估计社会影响的方法。 PIF 将概率因子模型与网络和行为数据进行拟合，以推断出可替代混杂潜在特征的变量。第三，我们提出了 PIF 恢复社会影响力估计的假设。我们使用 Last.fm 的半合成和真实数据对 PIF 进行实证研究，并进行敏感性分析。我们发现，与相关方法相比，PIF 能够最准确地估计社会影响力，并且在某些违反其假设的情况下仍然保持稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从观测数据中估计社交影响，解决朋友间行为相似性可能由影响因素或潜在特质导致的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以区分社交影响与潜在特质、行为偏好的混淆因素，需开发能从观测数据中准确估计因果影响的模型。
AI.method: 提出泊松影响分解（PIF）方法，通过概率因子模型拟合网络和行为数据，推断替代混淆潜在特质的变量，并建立假设以保证估计有效性。
AI.result: 在Last.fm真实数据和半合成数据上验证，PIF相较其他方法估计更准确，且在部分假设违反下仍保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PIF为从观测数据中估计社交影响提供了有效框架，通过建模潜在变量和因果假设，解决了混淆因素问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Benjamin Maschler,Tim Knodel,Michael Weyrich
title: Towards Deep Industrial Transfer Learning: Clustering for Transfer Case Selection
title_zh: 迈向深度工业转移学习：用于转移案例选择的聚类
comment: 7 pages, 5 figurs, 2 tables. Submitted to IEEE ETFA 2022
comments: 7 pages, 5 figurs, 2 tables. Submitted to IEEE ETFA 2022
abstract: Industrial transfer learning increases the adaptability of deep learning algorithms towards heterogenous and dynamic industrial use cases without high manual efforts. The appropriate selection of what to transfer can vastly improve a transfer's results. In this paper, a transfer case selection based upon clustering is presented. Founded on a survey of clustering algorithms, the BIRCH algorithm is selected for this purpose. It is evaluated on an industrial time series dataset from a discrete manufacturing scenario. Results underline the approaches' applicability caused by its results' reproducibility and practical indifference to sequence, size and dimensionality of (sub-)datasets to be clustered sequentially.
summary: Industrial transfer learning increases the adaptability of deep learning algorithms towards heterogenous and dynamic industrial use cases without high manual efforts. The appropriate selection of what to transfer can vastly improve a transfer's results. In this paper, a transfer case selection based upon clustering is presented. Founded on a survey of clustering algorithms, the BIRCH algorithm is selected for this purpose. It is evaluated on an industrial time series dataset from a discrete manufacturing scenario. Results underline the approaches' applicability caused by its results' reproducibility and practical indifference to sequence, size and dimensionality of (sub-)datasets to be clustered sequentially.
abstract_zh: 工业转移学习提高了深度学习算法对异构和动态工业用例的适应性，而无需大量手动操作。适当选择传输内容可以极大地改善传输结果。本文提出了一种基于聚类的分动箱选择方法。基于对聚类算法的调查，选择 BIRCH 算法用于此目的。它是根据离散制造场景的工业时间序列数据集进行评估的。结果强调了该方法的适用性，这是由于其结果的可重复性和对顺序聚类的（子）数据集的序列、大小和维度的实际漠不关心。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聚类的迁移案例选择方法，用于提升工业场景中深度迁移学习的适应性。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中数据异构性和动态性导致传统迁移学习效果受限，需降低人工干预的自动化方法。
AI.method: 通过聚类算法筛选迁移案例，选用BIRCH算法处理工业时间序列数据集，验证其对数据规模和维度的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法具有可重复性，且对子数据集的顺序、大小和维度不敏感，验证了其工业适用性。
AI.conclusion: 基于聚类的迁移案例选择方法在工业场景中有效，为深度迁移学习提供了实用化的解决方案。

result: 实验表明该方法具有可重复性，且对子数据集的顺序、大小和维度不敏感，验证了其工业适用性。
conclusion: 基于聚类的迁移案例选择方法在工业场景中有效，为深度迁移学习提供了实用化的解决方案。
search_text: Towards Deep Industrial Transfer Learning: Clustering for Transfer Case Selection 迈向深度工业转移学习：用于转移案例选择的聚类 Industrial transfer learning increases the adaptability of deep learning algorithms towards heterogenous and dynamic industrial use cases without high manual efforts. The appropriate selection of what to transfer can vastly improve a transfer's results. In this paper, a transfer case selection based upon clustering is presented. Founded on a survey of clustering algorithms, the BIRCH algorithm is selected for this purpose. It is evaluated on an industrial time series dataset from a discrete manufacturing scenario. Results underline the approaches' applicability caused by its results' reproducibility and practical indifference to sequence, size and dimensionality of (sub-)datasets to be clustered sequentially. 工业转移学习提高了深度学习算法对异构和动态工业用例的适应性，而无需大量手动操作。适当选择传输内容可以极大地改善传输结果。本文提出了一种基于聚类的分动箱选择方法。基于对聚类算法的调查，选择 BIRCH 算法用于此目的。它是根据离散制造场景的工业时间序列数据集进行评估的。结果强调了该方法的适用性，这是由于其结果的可重复性和对顺序聚类的（子）数据集的序列、大小和维度的实际漠不关心。 本文提出一种基于聚类的迁移案例选择方法，用于提升工业场景中深度迁移学习的适应性。 Benjamin Maschler,Tim Knodel,Michael Weyrich cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nicholas Bonaker,Emli-Mari Nel,Keith Vertanen,Tamara Broderick
title: A Performance Evaluation of Nomon: A Flexible Interface for Noisy Single-Switch Users
title_zh: Nomon 的性能评估：为嘈杂的单交换机用户提供灵活的接口
abstract: Some individuals with motor impairments communicate using a single switch -- such as a button click, air puff, or blink. Row-column scanning provides a method for choosing items arranged in a grid using a single switch. An alternative, Nomon, allows potential selections to be arranged arbitrarily rather than requiring a grid (as desired for gaming, drawing, etc.) -- and provides an alternative probabilistic selection method. While past results suggest that Nomon may be faster and easier to use than row-column scanning, no work has yet quantified performance of the two methods over longer time periods or in tasks beyond writing. In this paper, we also develop and validate a webcam-based switch that allows a user without a motor impairment to approximate the response times of a motor-impaired single switch user; although the approximation is not a replacement for testing with single-switch users, it allows us to better initialize, calibrate, and evaluate our method. Over 10 sessions with the webcam switch, we found users typed faster and more easily with Nomon than with row-column scanning. The benefits of Nomon were even more pronounced in a picture-selection task. Evaluation and feedback from a motor-impaired switch user further supports the promise of Nomon.
summary: Some individuals with motor impairments communicate using a single switch -- such as a button click, air puff, or blink. Row-column scanning provides a method for choosing items arranged in a grid using a single switch. An alternative, Nomon, allows potential selections to be arranged arbitrarily rather than requiring a grid (as desired for gaming, drawing, etc.) -- and provides an alternative probabilistic selection method. While past results suggest that Nomon may be faster and easier to use than row-column scanning, no work has yet quantified performance of the two methods over longer time periods or in tasks beyond writing. In this paper, we also develop and validate a webcam-based switch that allows a user without a motor impairment to approximate the response times of a motor-impaired single switch user; although the approximation is not a replacement for testing with single-switch users, it allows us to better initialize, calibrate, and evaluate our method. Over 10 sessions with the webcam switch, we found users typed faster and more easily with Nomon than with row-column scanning. The benefits of Nomon were even more pronounced in a picture-selection task. Evaluation and feedback from a motor-impaired switch user further supports the promise of Nomon.
abstract_zh: 一些有运动障碍的人使用单个开关进行交流，例如单击按钮、吹气或眨眼。行列扫描提供了一种使用单个开关选择排列在网格中的项目的方法。另一种选择，Nomon，允许任意排列潜在的选择，而不需要网格（如游戏、绘画等所需）——并提供另一种概率选择方法。虽然过去的结果表明，Nomon 可能比行列扫描更快、更容易使用，但目前还没有任何工作能够量化这两种方法在较长时间段或超出书写的任务中的性能。在本文中，我们还开发并验证了一种基于网络摄像头的开关，该开关允许没有运动障碍的用户近似于运动障碍的单个开关用户的响应时间；尽管近似值不能替代单开关用户的测试，但它使我们能够更好地初始化、校准和评估我们的方法。通过超过 10 次使用网络摄像头开关的会话，我们发现用户使用 Nomon 打字比使用行列扫描更快、更轻松。 Nomon 的优势在图片选择任务中表现得更加明显。来自运动障碍开关用户的评估和反馈进一步支持了 Nomon 的承诺。

AI.tldr: 评估Nomon接口在单开关用户中的性能，对比传统行列扫描方法。
AI.motivation: 传统行列扫描方法在非网格任务（如游戏、绘画）中效率较低，且缺乏长期性能数据，需验证Nomon的可行性。
AI.method: 开发基于网络摄像头的模拟开关，通过10次会话测试打字和图片选择任务，并收集残障用户反馈。
AI.result: Nomon在打字和图片选择任务中均显著优于行列扫描，用户反馈支持其易用性优势。
AI.conclusion: Nomon为单开关用户提供了更高效、灵活的交互方式，适用于多样化任务场景。

authors_text: Karolis Martinkus,Andreas Loukas,Nathanaël Perraudin,Roger Wattenhofer
title: SPECTRE: Spectral Conditioning Helps to Overcome the Expressivity Limits of One-shot Graph Generators
title_zh: SPECTRE：频谱调节有助于克服一次性图形生成器的表达能力限制
comment: The 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022), 21 pages, 10 figures
comments: The 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022), 21 pages, 10 figures
abstract: We approach the graph generation problem from a spectral perspective by first generating the dominant parts of the graph Laplacian spectrum and then building a graph matching these eigenvalues and eigenvectors. Spectral conditioning allows for direct modeling of the global and local graph structure and helps to overcome the expressivity and mode collapse issues of one-shot graph generators. Our novel GAN, called SPECTRE, enables the one-shot generation of much larger graphs than previously possible with one-shot models. SPECTRE outperforms state-of-the-art deep autoregressive generators in terms of modeling fidelity, while also avoiding expensive sequential generation and dependence on node ordering. A case in point, in sizable synthetic and real-world graphs SPECTRE achieves a 4-to-170 fold improvement over the best competitor that does not overfit and is 23-to-30 times faster than autoregressive generators.
summary: We approach the graph generation problem from a spectral perspective by first generating the dominant parts of the graph Laplacian spectrum and then building a graph matching these eigenvalues and eigenvectors. Spectral conditioning allows for direct modeling of the global and local graph structure and helps to overcome the expressivity and mode collapse issues of one-shot graph generators. Our novel GAN, called SPECTRE, enables the one-shot generation of much larger graphs than previously possible with one-shot models. SPECTRE outperforms state-of-the-art deep autoregressive generators in terms of modeling fidelity, while also avoiding expensive sequential generation and dependence on node ordering. A case in point, in sizable synthetic and real-world graphs SPECTRE achieves a 4-to-170 fold improvement over the best competitor that does not overfit and is 23-to-30 times faster than autoregressive generators.
abstract_zh: 我们从谱的角度来处理图生成问题，首先生成图拉普拉斯谱的主要部分，然后构建匹配这些特征值和特征向量的图。频谱调节允许对全局和局部图结构进行直接建模，并有助于克服一次性图生成器的表达能力和模式崩溃问题。我们的新型 GAN（称为 SPECTRE）能够一次性生成比以前使用一次性模型更大的图形。 SPECTRE 在建模保真度方面优于最先进的深度自回归生成器，同时还避免了昂贵的顺序生成和对节点排序的依赖。一个恰当的例子是，在相当大的合成和现实世界图表中，SPECTRE 比最好的竞争对手实现了 4 到 170 倍的改进，并且不会过度拟合，并且比自回归生成器快 23 到 30 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPECTRE的新型生成对抗网络（GAN），通过谱条件化方法克服一次性图生成器的表达限制，实现更大规模图的生成。
AI.motivation: 现有一次性图生成模型存在表达能力不足和模式崩溃问题，且依赖节点顺序的自回归生成方法效率低下，难以处理大规模图数据。
AI.method: 基于图拉普拉斯矩阵的谱特性，直接建模图的全局和局部结构，通过生成主导谱部分并匹配特征值与特征向量来构建图，无需依赖节点顺序。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图数据集上，SPECTRE相较最佳竞争模型实现4至170倍性能提升，且比自回归生成器快23至30倍，同时避免过拟合。
AI.conclusion: 谱条件化方法有效突破了一次性图生成器的表达瓶颈，SPECTRE在生成质量与效率上均优于现有技术，为大规模图生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Taewoon Kim,Michael Cochez,Vincent Francois-Lavet,Mark Neerincx,Piek Vossen
title: A Machine With Human-Like Memory Systems
title_zh: 具有类人记忆系统的机器
comment: Submitted to Human-Centered Design of Symbiotic Hybrid Intelligence 2022 (https://ii.tudelft.nl/humancenteredsymbioticHI/)
comments: Submitted to Human-Centered Design of Symbiotic Hybrid Intelligence 2022 (https://ii.tudelft.nl/humancenteredsymbioticHI/)
abstract: Inspired by the cognitive science theory, we explicitly model an agent with both semantic and episodic memory systems, and show that it is better than having just one of the two memory systems. In order to show this, we have designed and released our own challenging environment, "the Room", compatible with OpenAI Gym, where an agent has to properly learn how to encode, store, and retrieve memories to maximize its rewards. The Room environment allows for a hybrid intelligence setup where machines and humans can collaborate. We show that two agents collaborating with each other results in better performance than one agent acting alone.
summary: Inspired by the cognitive science theory, we explicitly model an agent with both semantic and episodic memory systems, and show that it is better than having just one of the two memory systems. In order to show this, we have designed and released our own challenging environment, "the Room", compatible with OpenAI Gym, where an agent has to properly learn how to encode, store, and retrieve memories to maximize its rewards. The Room environment allows for a hybrid intelligence setup where machines and humans can collaborate. We show that two agents collaborating with each other results in better performance than one agent acting alone.
abstract_zh: 受认知科学理论的启发，我们明确地对具有语义和情景记忆系统的代理进行建模，并表明它比仅拥有两种记忆系统之一更好。为了展示这一点，我们设计并发布了我们自己的具有挑战性的环境“房间”，与 OpenAI Gym 兼容，其中代理必须正确学习如何编码、存储和检索记忆以最大化其奖励。 Room 环境允许机器和人类可以协作的混合智能设置。我们证明，两个智能体相互合作比一个智能体单独行动能产生更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 设计具有人类类记忆系统的机器，并在自定义环境中验证其有效性
AI.motivation: 受认知科学启发，认为单一记忆系统不足，需结合语义与情景记忆提升智能体性能
AI.method: 设计名为'the Room'的环境，让智能体学习记忆处理，并测试协作效果
AI.result: 双重记忆系统优于单一系统，协作智能体表现更优
AI.conclusion: 混合记忆系统与协作机制能提升性能，为未来研究提供方向

ai_content.tldr: 设计具有人类类记忆系统的机器，并在自定义环境中验证其有效性
ai_content.motivation: 受认知科学启发，认为单一记忆系统不足，需结合语义与情景记忆提升智能体性能
ai_content.method: 设计名为'the Room'的环境，让智能体学习记忆处理，并测试协作效果

search_text: A Machine With Human-Like Memory Systems 具有类人记忆系统的机器 Inspired by the cognitive science theory, we explicitly model an agent with both semantic and episodic memory systems, and show that it is better than having just one of the two memory systems. In order to show this, we have designed and released our own challenging environment, "the Room", compatible with OpenAI Gym, where an agent has to properly learn how to encode, store, and retrieve memories to maximize its rewards. The Room environment allows for a hybrid intelligence setup where machines and humans can collaborate. We show that two agents collaborating with each other results in better performance than one agent acting alone. 受认知科学理论的启发，我们明确地对具有语义和情景记忆系统的代理进行建模，并表明它比仅拥有两种记忆系统之一更好。为了展示这一点，我们设计并发布了我们自己的具有挑战性的环境“房间”，与 OpenAI Gym 兼容，其中代理必须正确学习如何编码、存储和检索记忆以最大化其奖励。 Room 环境允许机器和人类可以协作的混合智能设置。我们证明，两个智能体相互合作比一个智能体单独行动能产生更好的性能。 设计具有人类类记忆系统的机器，并在自定义环境中验证其有效性 Taewoon Kim,Michael Cochez,Vincent Francois-Lavet,Mark Neerincx,Piek Vossen cs.AI

authors_text: Zhe Sage Chen,Prathamesh,Kulkarni,Isaac R. Galatzer-Levy,Benedetta Bigio,Carla Nasca,Yu Zhang
title: Modern Views of Machine Learning for Precision Psychiatry
title_zh: 精准精神病学机器学习的现代观点
abstract: In light of the NIMH's Research Domain Criteria (RDoC), the advent of functional neuroimaging, novel technologies and methods provide new opportunities to develop precise and personalized prognosis and diagnosis of mental disorders. Machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) technologies are playing an increasingly critical role in the new era of precision psychiatry. Combining ML/AI with neuromodulation technologies can potentially provide explainable solutions in clinical practice and effective therapeutic treatment. Advanced wearable and mobile technologies also call for the new role of ML/AI for digital phenotyping in mobile mental health. In this review, we provide a comprehensive review of the ML methodologies and applications by combining neuroimaging, neuromodulation, and advanced mobile technologies in psychiatry practice. Additionally, we review the role of ML in molecular phenotyping and cross-species biomarker identification in precision psychiatry. We further discuss explainable AI (XAI) and causality testing in a closed-human-in-the-loop manner, and highlight the ML potential in multimedia information extraction and multimodal data fusion. Finally, we discuss conceptual and practical challenges in precision psychiatry and highlight ML opportunities in future research.
summary: In light of the NIMH's Research Domain Criteria (RDoC), the advent of functional neuroimaging, novel technologies and methods provide new opportunities to develop precise and personalized prognosis and diagnosis of mental disorders. Machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) technologies are playing an increasingly critical role in the new era of precision psychiatry. Combining ML/AI with neuromodulation technologies can potentially provide explainable solutions in clinical practice and effective therapeutic treatment. Advanced wearable and mobile technologies also call for the new role of ML/AI for digital phenotyping in mobile mental health. In this review, we provide a comprehensive review of the ML methodologies and applications by combining neuroimaging, neuromodulation, and advanced mobile technologies in psychiatry practice. Additionally, we review the role of ML in molecular phenotyping and cross-species biomarker identification in precision psychiatry. We further discuss explainable AI (XAI) and causality testing in a closed-human-in-the-loop manner, and highlight the ML potential in multimedia information extraction and multimodal data fusion. Finally, we discuss conceptual and practical challenges in precision psychiatry and highlight ML opportunities in future research.
abstract_zh: 根据 NIMH 的研究领域标准 (RDoC)，功能性神经影像、新技术和方法的出现为精神障碍的精确和个性化预后和诊断提供了新的机会。机器学习（ML）和人工智能（AI）技术在精准精神病学的新时代发挥着越来越重要的作用。将机器学习/人工智能与神经调节技术相结合，有可能在临床实践和有效的治疗中提供可解释的解决方案。先进的可穿戴和移动技术也需要机器学习/人工智能在移动心理健康数字表型分析中发挥新作用。在这篇综述中，我们通过结合精神病学实践中的神经影像、神经调节和先进的移动技术，对机器学习方法和应用进行了全面的综述。此外，我们回顾了机器学习在精准精神病学中分子表型分析和跨物种生物标志物识别中的作用。我们以闭环人机循环的方式进一步讨论可解释的人工智能（XAI）和因果关系测试，并强调了机器学习在多媒体信息提取和多模态数据融合方面的潜力。最后，我们讨论了精准精神病学的概念和实践挑战，并强调了机器学习在未来研究中的机会。

AI.tldr: 综述机器学习在精准精神医学中的应用，结合神经影像、神经调控及移动技术，探讨可解释AI、因果检验等方法的挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 推动精神疾病精准诊疗发展，利用机器学习解决传统方法在个性化诊断、治疗效果预测及生物标志物发现中的不足。
AI.method: 系统文献综述，整合神经影像分析、神经调控技术、移动健康数据及多模态数据融合方法，结合可解释AI框架与因果推理模型。
AI.result: 总结机器学习在分子表型分析、跨物种生物标志物识别及数字表型中的应用，揭示当前在数据可解释性、因果验证及临床转化中的关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习为精神医学提供新范式，但需突破算法可解释性、多源数据整合及因果机制验证等核心挑战以实现临床落地。

authors_text: Runyu Ding,Jihan Yang,Li Jiang,Xiaojuan Qi
title: DODA: Data-oriented Sim-to-Real Domain Adaptation for 3D Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: DODA：面向数据的 3D 语义分割模拟到真实域适应
abstract: Deep learning approaches achieve prominent success in 3D semantic segmentation. However, collecting densely annotated real-world 3D datasets is extremely time-consuming and expensive. Training models on synthetic data and generalizing on real-world scenarios becomes an appealing alternative, but unfortunately suffers from notorious domain shifts. In this work, we propose a Data-Oriented Domain Adaptation (DODA) framework to mitigate pattern and context gaps caused by different sensing mechanisms and layout placements across domains. Our DODA encompasses virtual scan simulation to imitate real-world point cloud patterns and tail-aware cuboid mixing to alleviate the interior context gap with a cuboid-based intermediate domain. The first unsupervised sim-to-real adaptation benchmark on 3D indoor semantic segmentation is also built on 3D-FRONT, ScanNet and S3DIS along with 7 popular Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods. Our DODA surpasses existing UDA approaches by over 13% on both 3D-FRONT -> ScanNet and 3D-FRONT -> S3DIS. Code is available at https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/DODA.
summary: Deep learning approaches achieve prominent success in 3D semantic segmentation. However, collecting densely annotated real-world 3D datasets is extremely time-consuming and expensive. Training models on synthetic data and generalizing on real-world scenarios becomes an appealing alternative, but unfortunately suffers from notorious domain shifts. In this work, we propose a Data-Oriented Domain Adaptation (DODA) framework to mitigate pattern and context gaps caused by different sensing mechanisms and layout placements across domains. Our DODA encompasses virtual scan simulation to imitate real-world point cloud patterns and tail-aware cuboid mixing to alleviate the interior context gap with a cuboid-based intermediate domain. The first unsupervised sim-to-real adaptation benchmark on 3D indoor semantic segmentation is also built on 3D-FRONT, ScanNet and S3DIS along with 7 popular Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods. Our DODA surpasses existing UDA approaches by over 13% on both 3D-FRONT -> ScanNet and 3D-FRONT -> S3DIS. Code is available at https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/DODA.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法在 3D 语义分割方面取得了显着的成功。然而，收集密集注释的真实世界 3D 数据集非常耗时且昂贵。基于合成数据的训练模型和对现实世界场景的概括成为一种有吸引力的替代方案，但不幸的是，它遭受了臭名昭著的领域转移。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个面向数据的域适应（DODA）框架，以减轻由跨域的不同传感机制和布局放置引起的模式和上下文差距。我们的 DODA 包括虚拟扫描模拟，以模仿现实世界的点云模式和尾部感知长方体混合，以减轻与基于长方体的中间域的内部上下文差距。 3D 室内语义分割的第一个无监督模拟到真实适应基准也是建立在 3D-FRONT、ScanNet 和 S3DIS 以及 7 种流行的无监督域适应 (UDA) 方法的基础上。我们的 DODA 在 3D-FRONT -> ScanNet 和 3D-FRONT -> S3DIS 上均超过现有 UDA 方法 13% 以上。代码可在 https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/DODA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DODA框架，解决3D语义分割中合成数据到真实场景的领域迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 真实世界3D数据标注成本高昂，合成数据训练模型存在领域差异问题，需有效缩小仿真与现实间的感知机制和布局差异。
AI.method: 通过虚拟扫描仿真模拟真实点云模式，结合尾部感知立方体混合技术构建中间领域，缓解内部上下文差异，并建立首个3D室内分割无监督领域适应基准。
AI.result: 在3D-FRONT→ScanNet和3D-FRONT→S3DIS数据集上，DODA超越现有UDA方法13%以上。
AI.conclusion: DODA有效缓解领域差异，为3D语义分割领域适应提供新方法和基准，代码已开源。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出DODA框架，解决3D语义分割中合成数据到真实场景的领域迁移问题。
ai_content.motivation: 真实世界3D数据标注成本高昂，合成数据训练模型存在领域差异问题，需有效缩小仿真与现实间的感知机制和布局差异。

ai_content.conclusion: DODA有效缓解领域差异，为3D语义分割领域适应提供新方法和基准，代码已开源。

authors_text: Zihan Chen,Xingyu Li,Miaomiao Yang,Hong Zhang,Xu Steven Xu
title: Optimize Deep Learning Models for Prediction of Gene Mutations Using Unsupervised Clustering
title_zh: 使用无监督聚类优化深度学习模型以预测基因突变
abstract: Deep learning has become the mainstream methodological choice for analyzing and interpreting whole-slide digital pathology images (WSIs). It is commonly assumed that tumor regions carry most predictive information. In this paper, we proposed an unsupervised clustering-based multiple-instance learning, and apply our method to develop deep-learning models for prediction of gene mutations using WSIs from three cancer types in The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) studies (CRC, LUAD, and HNSCC). We showed that unsupervised clustering of image patches could help identify predictive patches, exclude patches lack of predictive information, and therefore improve prediction on gene mutations in all three different cancer types, compared with the WSI based method without selection of image patches and models based on only tumor regions. Additionally, our proposed algorithm outperformed two recently published baseline algorithms leveraging unsupervised clustering to assist model prediction. The unsupervised-clustering-based approach for mutation prediction allows identification of the spatial regions related to mutation of a specific gene via the resolved probability scores, highlighting the heterogeneity of a predicted genotype in the tumor microenvironment. Finally, our study also demonstrated that selection of tumor regions of WSIs is not always the best way to identify patches for prediction of gene mutations, and other tissue types in the tumor micro-environment may provide better prediction ability for gene mutations than tumor tissues.
summary: Deep learning has become the mainstream methodological choice for analyzing and interpreting whole-slide digital pathology images (WSIs). It is commonly assumed that tumor regions carry most predictive information. In this paper, we proposed an unsupervised clustering-based multiple-instance learning, and apply our method to develop deep-learning models for prediction of gene mutations using WSIs from three cancer types in The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) studies (CRC, LUAD, and HNSCC). We showed that unsupervised clustering of image patches could help identify predictive patches, exclude patches lack of predictive information, and therefore improve prediction on gene mutations in all three different cancer types, compared with the WSI based method without selection of image patches and models based on only tumor regions. Additionally, our proposed algorithm outperformed two recently published baseline algorithms leveraging unsupervised clustering to assist model prediction. The unsupervised-clustering-based approach for mutation prediction allows identification of the spatial regions related to mutation of a specific gene via the resolved probability scores, highlighting the heterogeneity of a predicted genotype in the tumor microenvironment. Finally, our study also demonstrated that selection of tumor regions of WSIs is not always the best way to identify patches for prediction of gene mutations, and other tissue types in the tumor micro-environment may provide better prediction ability for gene mutations than tumor tissues.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已成为分析和解释全幻灯片数字病理图像（WSI）的主流方法选择。通常认为肿瘤区域携带最多的预测信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于无监督聚类的多实例学习，并应用我们的方法开发深度学习模型，使用癌症基因组图谱 (TCGA) 研究（CRC、LUAD 和 HNSCC）中三种癌症类型的 WSI 来预测基因突变。我们表明，与不选择图像块的基于 WSI 的方法和仅基于肿瘤区域的模型相比，图像块的无监督聚类可以帮助识别预测性块，排除缺乏预测信息的块，从而改善对所有三种不同癌症类型的基因突变的预测。此外，我们提出的算法优于最近发布的两种利用无监督聚类来辅助模型预测的基线算法。基于无监督聚类的突变预测方法允许通过解析的概率得分来识别与特定基因突变相关的空间区域，突出肿瘤微环境中预测基因型的异质性。最后，我们的研究还表明，选择 WSI 的肿瘤区域并不总是识别预测基因突变斑块的最佳方法，肿瘤微环境中的其他组织类型可能比肿瘤组织提供更好的基因突变预测能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无监督聚类的多实例学习方法，优化深度学习模型以预测基因突变。
AI.motivation: 传统方法假设肿瘤区域包含主要预测信息，但可能忽略肿瘤微环境中其他组织类型的潜在价值。
AI.method: 通过无监督聚类筛选具有预测性的图像块，结合多实例学习构建深度学习模型，并在三种癌症类型的TCGA数据集上验证。
AI.result: 该方法在三种癌症类型中均优于基于全切片图像和仅肿瘤区域的模型，且优于两种最新基准算法。
AI.conclusion: 无监督聚类方法能识别与特定基因突变相关的空间区域，表明肿瘤微环境中非肿瘤组织可能提供更优的预测能力。

authors_text: Costanza Alfieri,Paola Inverardi,Patrizio Migliarini,Massimiliano Palmiero
title: Exosoul: ethical profiling in the digital world
title_zh: Exosoul：数字世界中的道德剖析
abstract: The development and the spread of increasingly autonomous digital technologies in our society pose new ethical challenges beyond data protection and privacy violation. Users are unprotected in their interactions with digital technologies and at the same time autonomous systems are free to occupy the space of decisions that is prerogative of each human being. In this context the multidisciplinary project Exosoul aims at developing a personalized software exoskeleton which mediates actions in the digital world according to the moral preferences of the user. The exoskeleton relies on the ethical profiling of a user, similar in purpose to the privacy profiling proposed in the literature, but aiming at reflecting and predicting general moral preferences. Our approach is hybrid, first based on the identification of profiles in a top-down manner, and then on the refinement of profiles by a personalized data-driven approach. In this work we report our initial experiment on building such top-down profiles. We consider the correlations between ethics positions (idealism and relativism) personality traits (honesty/humility, conscientiousness, Machiavellianism and narcissism) and worldview (normativism), and then we use a clustering approach to create ethical profiles predictive of user's digital behaviors concerning privacy violation, copy-right infringements, caution and protection. Data were collected by administering a questionnaire to 317 young individuals. In the paper we discuss two clustering solutions, one data-driven and one model-driven, in terms of validity and predictive power of digital behavior.
summary: The development and the spread of increasingly autonomous digital technologies in our society pose new ethical challenges beyond data protection and privacy violation. Users are unprotected in their interactions with digital technologies and at the same time autonomous systems are free to occupy the space of decisions that is prerogative of each human being. In this context the multidisciplinary project Exosoul aims at developing a personalized software exoskeleton which mediates actions in the digital world according to the moral preferences of the user. The exoskeleton relies on the ethical profiling of a user, similar in purpose to the privacy profiling proposed in the literature, but aiming at reflecting and predicting general moral preferences. Our approach is hybrid, first based on the identification of profiles in a top-down manner, and then on the refinement of profiles by a personalized data-driven approach. In this work we report our initial experiment on building such top-down profiles. We consider the correlations between ethics positions (idealism and relativism) personality traits (honesty/humility, conscientiousness, Machiavellianism and narcissism) and worldview (normativism), and then we use a clustering approach to create ethical profiles predictive of user's digital behaviors concerning privacy violation, copy-right infringements, caution and protection. Data were collected by administering a questionnaire to 317 young individuals. In the paper we discuss two clustering solutions, one data-driven and one model-driven, in terms of validity and predictive power of digital behavior.
abstract_zh: 在我们的社会中，日益自主的数字技术的发展和传播，除了数据保护和侵犯隐私之外，还带来了新的道德挑战。用户在与数字技术的交互中不受保护，同时自治系统可以自由地占据每个人的特权决策空间。在此背景下，多学科项目 Exosoul 旨在开发个性化的软件外骨骼，根据用户的道德偏好来协调数字世界中的行为。外骨骼依赖于用户的道德分析，其目的与文献中提出的隐私分析类似，但旨在反映和预测一般道德偏好。我们的方法是混合的，首先基于自上而下的方式识别配置文件，然后通过个性化数据驱动的方法对配置文件进行细化。在这项工作中，我们报告了构建此类自上而下配置文件的初步实验。我们考虑道德立场（理想主义和相对主义）、个性特征（诚实/谦逊、责任心、马基雅维利主义和自恋）和世界观（规范主义）之间的相关性，然后我们使用聚类方法创建道德档案，预测用户在侵犯隐私、侵犯版权、谨慎和保护方面的数字行为。通过对 317 名年轻人进行问卷调查来收集数据。在本文中，我们从数字行为的有效性和预测能力方面讨论了两种聚类解决方案，一种是数据驱动的，一种是模型驱动的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Exosoul项目，旨在开发基于用户伦理画像的软件外骨骼，以调解数字世界中的行为，确保符合用户道德偏好。
AI.motivation: 随着自主数字技术的普及，用户面临伦理决策被系统主导的风险，现有技术无法有效保护用户道德权益，需通过伦理画像实现个性化行为调解。
AI.method: 采用混合方法：首先通过伦理立场、人格特质和世界观的关联构建自上而下伦理画像，再利用聚类分析（数据驱动与模型驱动两种方案）预测数字行为。
AI.result: 基于317名青年问卷数据，验证了伦理画像与隐私侵犯、版权侵权等行为的关联性，两种聚类方案均展现出一定的有效性与预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 初步实验表明伦理画像可作为数字行为调解的基础，未来需结合数据驱动方法进一步优化个性化外骨骼系统。

authors_text: Sohyun Lee,Taeyoung Son,Suha Kwak
title: FIFO: Learning Fog-invariant Features for Foggy Scene Segmentation
title_zh: FIFO：学习雾不变特征以进行雾场景分割
abstract: Robust visual recognition under adverse weather conditions is of great importance in real-world applications. In this context, we propose a new method for learning semantic segmentation models robust against fog. Its key idea is to consider the fog condition of an image as its style and close the gap between images with different fog conditions in neural style spaces of a segmentation model. In particular, since the neural style of an image is in general affected by other factors as well as fog, we introduce a fog-pass filter module that learns to extract a fog-relevant factor from the style. Optimizing the fog-pass filter and the segmentation model alternately gradually closes the style gap between different fog conditions and allows to learn fog-invariant features in consequence. Our method substantially outperforms previous work on three real foggy image datasets. Moreover, it improves performance on both foggy and clear weather images, while existing methods often degrade performance on clear scenes.
summary: Robust visual recognition under adverse weather conditions is of great importance in real-world applications. In this context, we propose a new method for learning semantic segmentation models robust against fog. Its key idea is to consider the fog condition of an image as its style and close the gap between images with different fog conditions in neural style spaces of a segmentation model. In particular, since the neural style of an image is in general affected by other factors as well as fog, we introduce a fog-pass filter module that learns to extract a fog-relevant factor from the style. Optimizing the fog-pass filter and the segmentation model alternately gradually closes the style gap between different fog conditions and allows to learn fog-invariant features in consequence. Our method substantially outperforms previous work on three real foggy image datasets. Moreover, it improves performance on both foggy and clear weather images, while existing methods often degrade performance on clear scenes.
abstract_zh: 恶劣天气条件下的鲁棒视觉识别在实际应用中非常重要。在这种背景下，我们提出了一种学习对雾具有鲁棒性的语义分割模型的新方法。其关键思想是将图像的雾条件视为其风格，并缩小分割模型的神经风格空间中具有不同雾条件的图像之间的差距。特别是，由于图像的神经风格通常受到其他因素以及雾的影响，因此我们引入了一个雾通过过滤器模块，该模块学习从风格中提取与雾相关的因素。交替优化雾通过滤波器和分割模型逐渐缩小不同雾条件之间的风格差距，并允许学习雾不变特征。我们的方法大大优于之前在三个真实雾图像数据集上的工作。此外，它提高了雾天和晴天天气图像的性能，而现有方法通常会降低晴天场景的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FIFO的方法，通过学习雾不变特征来提升雾天场景分割的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在雾天图像分割中表现不足，且可能在晴朗场景下性能下降，需开发兼顾雾天与晴朗场景的鲁棒分割模型。
AI.method: 将雾视为图像风格因素，引入雾通滤波模块提取雾相关特征，并通过交替优化分割模型与雾通滤波器，缩小不同雾条件下的风格差异。
AI.result: 在三个真实雾天数据集上显著优于现有方法，且在雾天和晴朗场景下均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: FIFO通过学习雾不变特征有效提升了分割性能，解决了现有方法在不同天气条件下的性能不均衡问题。

search_text: FIFO: Learning Fog-invariant Features for Foggy Scene Segmentation FIFO：学习雾不变特征以进行雾场景分割 Robust visual recognition under adverse weather conditions is of great importance in real-world applications. In this context, we propose a new method for learning semantic segmentation models robust against fog. Its key idea is to consider the fog condition of an image as its style and close the gap between images with different fog conditions in neural style spaces of a segmentation model. In particular, since the neural style of an image is in general affected by other factors as well as fog, we introduce a fog-pass filter module that learns to extract a fog-relevant factor from the style. Optimizing the fog-pass filter and the segmentation model alternately gradually closes the style gap between different fog conditions and allows to learn fog-invariant features in consequence. Our method substantially outperforms previous work on three real foggy image datasets. Moreover, it improves performance on both foggy and clear weather images, while existing methods often degrade performance on clear scenes. 恶劣天气条件下的鲁棒视觉识别在实际应用中非常重要。在这种背景下，我们提出了一种学习对雾具有鲁棒性的语义分割模型的新方法。其关键思想是将图像的雾条件视为其风格，并缩小分割模型的神经风格空间中具有不同雾条件的图像之间的差距。特别是，由于图像的神经风格通常受到其他因素以及雾的影响，因此我们引入了一个雾通过过滤器模块，该模块学习从风格中提取与雾相关的因素。交替优化雾通过滤波器和分割模型逐渐缩小不同雾条件之间的风格差距，并允许学习雾不变特征。我们的方法大大优于之前在三个真实雾图像数据集上的工作。此外，它提高了雾天和晴天天气图像的性能，而现有方法通常会降低晴天场景的性能。 本文提出一种名为FIFO的方法，通过学习雾不变特征来提升雾天场景分割的鲁棒性。 Sohyun Lee,Taeyoung Son,Suha Kwak cs.CV

authors_text: Zhaoxin Fan,Zhenbo Song,Jian Xu,Zhicheng Wang,Kejian Wu,Hongyan Liu,Jun He
title: Object Level Depth Reconstruction for Category Level 6D Object Pose Estimation From Monocular RGB Image
title_zh: 单目 RGB 图像的类别级 6D 物体姿态估计的物体级深度重建
abstract: Recently, RGBD-based category-level 6D object pose estimation has achieved promising improvement in performance, however, the requirement of depth information prohibits broader applications. In order to relieve this problem, this paper proposes a novel approach named Object Level Depth reconstruction Network (OLD-Net) taking only RGB images as input for category-level 6D object pose estimation. We propose to directly predict object-level depth from a monocular RGB image by deforming the category-level shape prior into object-level depth and the canonical NOCS representation. Two novel modules named Normalized Global Position Hints (NGPH) and Shape-aware Decoupled Depth Reconstruction (SDDR) module are introduced to learn high fidelity object-level depth and delicate shape representations. At last, the 6D object pose is solved by aligning the predicted canonical representation with the back-projected object-level depth. Extensive experiments on the challenging CAMERA25 and REAL275 datasets indicate that our model, though simple, achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Recently, RGBD-based category-level 6D object pose estimation has achieved promising improvement in performance, however, the requirement of depth information prohibits broader applications. In order to relieve this problem, this paper proposes a novel approach named Object Level Depth reconstruction Network (OLD-Net) taking only RGB images as input for category-level 6D object pose estimation. We propose to directly predict object-level depth from a monocular RGB image by deforming the category-level shape prior into object-level depth and the canonical NOCS representation. Two novel modules named Normalized Global Position Hints (NGPH) and Shape-aware Decoupled Depth Reconstruction (SDDR) module are introduced to learn high fidelity object-level depth and delicate shape representations. At last, the 6D object pose is solved by aligning the predicted canonical representation with the back-projected object-level depth. Extensive experiments on the challenging CAMERA25 and REAL275 datasets indicate that our model, though simple, achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于 RGBD 的类别级 6D 物体姿态估计在性能方面取得了可喜的改进，然而，深度信​​息的要求阻碍了更广泛的应用。为了缓解这个问题，本文提出了一种名为对象级深度重建网络（OLD-Net）的新方法，仅将 RGB 图像作为类别级 6D 对象姿态估计的输入。我们建议通过将类别级形状先验变形为对象级深度和规范的 NOCS 表示来直接从单目 RGB 图像预测对象级深度。引入了两个新颖的模块，即归一化全局位置提示（NGPH）和形状感知解耦深度重建（SDDR）模块，以学习高保真对象级深度和精致的形状表示。最后，通过将预测的规范表示与反向投影的对象级深度对齐来求解 6D 对象姿态。对具有挑战性的 CAMERA25 和 REAL275 数据集进行的大量实验表明，我们的模型虽然简单，但实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅使用单目RGB图像进行类别级6D物体姿态估计的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于RGBD的类别级6D物体姿态估计已取得进展，但对深度信息的需求限制了其应用范围。为了解决这一问题，本文提出了一种新的方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为OLD-Net的新方法，直接从单目RGB图像预测物体级深度。通过将类别级形状先验变形为物体级深度和标准NOCS表示，并引入两个新模块NGPH和SDDR来学习高保真物体级深度和精细形状表示。
AI.result: 在CAMERA25和REAL275数据集上的实验表明，尽管模型简单，但取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法能够在仅使用RGB图像的情况下实现高精度的类别级6D物体姿态估计，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Stephen James,Pieter Abbeel
title: Coarse-to-Fine Q-attention with Learned Path Ranking
title_zh: 具有学习路径排名的从粗到细的 Q-attention
abstract: We propose Learned Path Ranking (LPR), a method that accepts an end-effector goal pose, and learns to rank a set of goal-reaching paths generated from an array of path generating methods, including: path planning, Bezier curve sampling, and a learned policy. The core idea being that each of the path generation modules will be useful in different tasks, or at different stages in a task. When LPR is added as an extension to C2F-ARM, our new system, C2F-ARM+LPR, retains the sample efficiency of its predecessor, while also being able to accomplish a larger set of tasks; in particular, tasks that require very specific motions (e.g. opening toilet seat) that need to be inferred from both demonstrations and exploration data. In addition to benchmarking our approach across 16 RLBench tasks, we also learn real-world tasks, tabula rasa, in 10-15 minutes, with only 3 demonstrations.
summary: We propose Learned Path Ranking (LPR), a method that accepts an end-effector goal pose, and learns to rank a set of goal-reaching paths generated from an array of path generating methods, including: path planning, Bezier curve sampling, and a learned policy. The core idea being that each of the path generation modules will be useful in different tasks, or at different stages in a task. When LPR is added as an extension to C2F-ARM, our new system, C2F-ARM+LPR, retains the sample efficiency of its predecessor, while also being able to accomplish a larger set of tasks; in particular, tasks that require very specific motions (e.g. opening toilet seat) that need to be inferred from both demonstrations and exploration data. In addition to benchmarking our approach across 16 RLBench tasks, we also learn real-world tasks, tabula rasa, in 10-15 minutes, with only 3 demonstrations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了学习路径排名（LPR），这是一种接受末端执行器目标姿势的方法，并学习对由一系列路径生成方法生成的一组到达目标路径进行排名，包括：路径规划、贝塞尔曲线采样和学习策略。核心思想是每个路径生成模块将在不同的任务中或在任务的不同阶段有用。当LPR作为C2F-ARM的扩展添加时，我们的新系统C2F-ARM+LPR保留了其前身的采样效率，同时还能够完成更大的任务集；特别是需要非常具体动作（例如打开马桶座圈）的任务，需要从演示和探索数据中推断出来。除了在 16 个 RLBench 任务中对我们的方法进行基准测试之外，我们还通过 3 个演示在 10-15 分钟内学习现实世界的任务（白板）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Learned Path Ranking（LPR）的方法，通过结合多种路径生成技术，提升机械臂在复杂任务中的执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理需要精确动作的任务（如开马桶盖）时表现不足，需融合多种路径生成策略以适应不同任务阶段的需求。
AI.method: 设计LPR模块对路径规划、贝塞尔曲线采样和学习策略生成的路径进行排序，集成至C2F-ARM框架中，保留样本效率并扩展任务集。
AI.result: 在16个RLBench任务中验证有效性，且能在10-15分钟内通过仅3次示范学习真实世界任务。
AI.conclusion: LPR通过动态路径排序显著提升了机械臂系统的任务适应性与复杂动作执行能力。

In addition to benchmarking our approach across 16 RLBench tasks, we also learn real-world tasks, tabula rasa, in 10-15 minutes, with only 3 demonstrations. 我们提出了学习路径排名（LPR），这是一种接受末端执行器目标姿势的方法，并学习对由一系列路径生成方法生成的一组到达目标路径进行排名，包括：路径规划、贝塞尔曲线采样和学习策略。核心思想是每个路径生成模块将在不同的任务中或在任务的不同阶段有用。当LPR作为C2F-ARM的扩展添加时，我们的新系统C2F-ARM+LPR保留了其前身的采样效率，同时还能够完成更大的任务集；特别是需要非常具体动作（例如打开马桶座圈）的任务，需要从演示和探索数据中推断出来。除了在 16 个 RLBench 任务中对我们的方法进行基准测试之外，我们还通过 3 个演示在 10-15 分钟内学习现实世界的任务（白板）。 本文提出了一种名为Learned Path Ranking（LPR）的方法，通过结合多种路径生成技术，提升机械臂在复杂任务中的执行能力。 Stephen James,Pieter Abbeel cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Gaurav Kumar Nayak,Ruchit Rawal,Anirban Chakraborty
title: DAD: Data-free Adversarial Defense at Test Time
title_zh: DAD：测试时的无数据对抗性防御
abstract: Deep models are highly susceptible to adversarial attacks. Such attacks are carefully crafted imperceptible noises that can fool the network and can cause severe consequences when deployed. To encounter them, the model requires training data for adversarial training or explicit regularization-based techniques. However, privacy has become an important concern, restricting access to only trained models but not the training data (e.g. biometric data). Also, data curation is expensive and companies may have proprietary rights over it. To handle such situations, we propose a completely novel problem of 'test-time adversarial defense in absence of training data and even their statistics'. We solve it in two stages: a) detection and b) correction of adversarial samples. Our adversarial sample detection framework is initially trained on arbitrary data and is subsequently adapted to the unlabelled test data through unsupervised domain adaptation. We further correct the predictions on detected adversarial samples by transforming them in Fourier domain and obtaining their low frequency component at our proposed suitable radius for model prediction. We demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed technique via extensive experiments against several adversarial attacks and for different model architectures and datasets. For a non-robust Resnet-18 model pre-trained on CIFAR-10, our detection method correctly identifies 91.42% adversaries. Also, we significantly improve the adversarial accuracy from 0% to 37.37% with a minimal drop of 0.02% in clean accuracy on state-of-the-art 'Auto Attack' without having to retrain the model.
summary: Deep models are highly susceptible to adversarial attacks. Such attacks are carefully crafted imperceptible noises that can fool the network and can cause severe consequences when deployed. To encounter them, the model requires training data for adversarial training or explicit regularization-based techniques. However, privacy has become an important concern, restricting access to only trained models but not the training data (e.g. biometric data). Also, data curation is expensive and companies may have proprietary rights over it. To handle such situations, we propose a completely novel problem of 'test-time adversarial defense in absence of training data and even their statistics'. We solve it in two stages: a) detection and b) correction of adversarial samples. Our adversarial sample detection framework is initially trained on arbitrary data and is subsequently adapted to the unlabelled test data through unsupervised domain adaptation. We further correct the predictions on detected adversarial samples by transforming them in Fourier domain and obtaining their low frequency component at our proposed suitable radius for model prediction. We demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed technique via extensive experiments against several adversarial attacks and for different model architectures and datasets. For a non-robust Resnet-18 model pre-trained on CIFAR-10, our detection method correctly identifies 91.42% adversaries. Also, we significantly improve the adversarial accuracy from 0% to 37.37% with a minimal drop of 0.02% in clean accuracy on state-of-the-art 'Auto Attack' without having to retrain the model.
abstract_zh: 深度模型非常容易受到对抗性攻击。此类攻击是精心设计的难以察觉的噪音，可以欺骗网络，部署后可能会造成严重后果。为了应对它们，该模型需要用于对抗性训练的训练数据或基于显式正则化的技术。然而，隐私已成为一个重要问题，限制仅访问经过训练的模型，而不限制访问训练数据（例如生物识别数据）。此外，数据管理成本高昂，而且公司可能拥有其专有权利。为了处理这种情况，我们提出了一个全新的问题，即“在缺乏训练数据甚至统计数据的情况下进行测试时的对抗性防御”。我们分两个阶段解决这个问题：a）检测和b）对抗性样本的校正。我们的对抗性样本检测框架最初是在任意数据上进行训练，随后通过无监督域适应来适应未标记的测试数据。我们通过在傅里叶域中变换检测到的对抗样本并在我们提出的适合模型预测的半径处获得它们的低频分量来进一步纠正对检测到的对抗样本的预测。我们通过针对几种对抗性攻击以及不同模型架构和数据集的广泛实验证明了我们提出的技术的有效性。对于在 CIFAR-10 上预训练的非鲁棒 Resnet-18 模型，我们的检测方法正确识别了 91.42% 的对手。此外，我们将对抗精度从 0% 显着提高到 37.37%，在最先进的“自动攻击”上，干净精度最小下降了 0.02%，而无需重新训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练数据的测试时对抗防御方法DAD，通过检测和修正对抗样本来提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度模型易受对抗攻击影响，但隐私和数据所有权限制了训练数据的访问，传统防御方法依赖训练数据，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 分两阶段防御：1) 使用无监督领域自适应训练检测框架识别对抗样本；2) 通过傅里叶变换提取低频成分修正检测到的对抗样本。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，检测准确率达91.42%，将对抗准确率从0%提升至37.37%，且仅损失0.02%的干净样本准确率。
AI.conclusion: DAD方法在无训练数据情况下有效防御对抗攻击，为隐私敏感场景提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Bie,Wen Guo,Simon Leglaive,Lauren Girin,Francesc Moreno-Noguer,Xavier Alameda-Pineda
title: HiT-DVAE: Human Motion Generation via Hierarchical Transformer Dynamical VAE
title_zh: HiT-DVAE：通过分层变压器动态 VAE 生成人体运动
abstract: Studies on the automatic processing of 3D human pose data have flourished in the recent past. In this paper, we are interested in the generation of plausible and diverse future human poses following an observed 3D pose sequence. Current methods address this problem by injecting random variables from a single latent space into a deterministic motion prediction framework, which precludes the inherent multi-modality in human motion generation. In addition, previous works rarely explore the use of attention to select which frames are to be used to inform the generation process up to our knowledge. To overcome these limitations, we propose Hierarchical Transformer Dynamical Variational Autoencoder, HiT-DVAE, which implements auto-regressive generation with transformer-like attention mechanisms. HiT-DVAE simultaneously learns the evolution of data and latent space distribution with time correlated probabilistic dependencies, thus enabling the generative model to learn a more complex and time-varying latent space as well as diverse and realistic human motions. Furthermore, the auto-regressive generation brings more flexibility on observation and prediction, i.e. one can have any length of observation and predict arbitrary large sequences of poses with a single pre-trained model. We evaluate the proposed method on HumanEva-I and Human3.6M with various evaluation methods, and outperform the state-of-the-art methods on most of the metrics.
summary: Studies on the automatic processing of 3D human pose data have flourished in the recent past. In this paper, we are interested in the generation of plausible and diverse future human poses following an observed 3D pose sequence. Current methods address this problem by injecting random variables from a single latent space into a deterministic motion prediction framework, which precludes the inherent multi-modality in human motion generation. In addition, previous works rarely explore the use of attention to select which frames are to be used to inform the generation process up to our knowledge. To overcome these limitations, we propose Hierarchical Transformer Dynamical Variational Autoencoder, HiT-DVAE, which implements auto-regressive generation with transformer-like attention mechanisms. HiT-DVAE simultaneously learns the evolution of data and latent space distribution with time correlated probabilistic dependencies, thus enabling the generative model to learn a more complex and time-varying latent space as well as diverse and realistic human motions. Furthermore, the auto-regressive generation brings more flexibility on observation and prediction, i.e. one can have any length of observation and predict arbitrary large sequences of poses with a single pre-trained model. We evaluate the proposed method on HumanEva-I and Human3.6M with various evaluation methods, and outperform the state-of-the-art methods on most of the metrics.
abstract_zh: 近年来，关于 3D 人体姿势数据自动处理的研究蓬勃发展。在本文中，我们感兴趣的是根据观察到的 3D 姿势序列生成合理且多样化的未来人类姿势。当前的方法通过将来自单个潜在空间的随机变量注入确定性运动预测框架来解决这个问题，这排除了人体运动生成中固有的多模态。此外，以前的作品很少探索使用注意力来选择哪些帧用于根据我们的知识来通知生成过程。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了分层变压器动态变分自动编码器 HiT-DVAE，它通过类似变压器的注意机制实现自回归生成。 HiT-DVAE 同时学习数据的演化和具有时间相关概率依赖性的潜在空间分布，从而使生成模型能够学习更复杂和时变的潜在空间以及多样化和真实的人体运动。此外，自回归生成为观察和预测带来了更大的灵活性，即可以进行任意长度的观察并使用单个预训练模型预测任意大的姿势序列。我们使用各种评估方法在 HumanEva-I 和 Human3.6M 上评估所提出的方法，并在大多数指标上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiT-DVAE模型，通过分层Transformer动态变分自编码器实现基于观察序列的3D人体姿态未来运动生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过单一潜在空间限制了人体运动生成的多模态性，且未有效利用注意力机制选择关键帧进行生成。
AI.method: 设计HiT-DVAE模型，结合自回归生成与Transformer注意力机制，同时建模数据演变与时间相关潜在空间分布。
AI.result: 在HumanEva-I和Human3.6M数据集上，多数指标优于现有最先进方法，生成运动更真实多样。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态潜在空间建模和注意力机制，实现了灵活长度的高质量人体运动生成，具有更复杂的时空表达能力。

authors_text: Shakeel Ahmad Sheikh,Md Sahidullah,Fabrice Hirsch,Slim Ouni
title: Introducing ECAPA-TDNN and Wav2Vec2.0 Embeddings to Stuttering Detection
title_zh: 将 ECAPA-TDNN 和 Wav2Vec2.0 嵌入引入口吃检测
abstract: The adoption of advanced deep learning (DL) architecture in stuttering detection (SD) tasks is challenging due to the limited size of the available datasets. To this end, this work introduces the application of speech embeddings extracted with pre-trained deep models trained on massive audio datasets for different tasks. In particular, we explore audio representations obtained using emphasized channel attention, propagation, and aggregation-time-delay neural network (ECAPA-TDNN) and Wav2Vec2.0 model trained on VoxCeleb and LibriSpeech datasets respectively. After extracting the embeddings, we benchmark with several traditional classifiers, such as a k-nearest neighbor, Gaussian naive Bayes, and neural network, for the stuttering detection tasks. In comparison to the standard SD system trained only on the limited SEP-28k dataset, we obtain a relative improvement of 16.74% in terms of overall accuracy over baseline. Finally, we have shown that combining two embeddings and concatenating multiple layers of Wav2Vec2.0 can further improve SD performance up to 1% and 2.64% respectively.
summary: The adoption of advanced deep learning (DL) architecture in stuttering detection (SD) tasks is challenging due to the limited size of the available datasets. To this end, this work introduces the application of speech embeddings extracted with pre-trained deep models trained on massive audio datasets for different tasks. In particular, we explore audio representations obtained using emphasized channel attention, propagation, and aggregation-time-delay neural network (ECAPA-TDNN) and Wav2Vec2.0 model trained on VoxCeleb and LibriSpeech datasets respectively. After extracting the embeddings, we benchmark with several traditional classifiers, such as a k-nearest neighbor, Gaussian naive Bayes, and neural network, for the stuttering detection tasks. In comparison to the standard SD system trained only on the limited SEP-28k dataset, we obtain a relative improvement of 16.74% in terms of overall accuracy over baseline. Finally, we have shown that combining two embeddings and concatenating multiple layers of Wav2Vec2.0 can further improve SD performance up to 1% and 2.64% respectively.
abstract_zh: 由于可用数据集的大小有限，在口吃检测 (SD) 任务中采用先进的深度学习 (DL) 架构具有挑战性。为此，这项工作介绍了使用在不同任务的大量音频数据集上训练的预训练深度模型提取的语音嵌入的应用。特别是，我们探索了使用强调通道注意、传播和聚合时延神经网络 (ECAPA-TDNN) 和分别在 VoxCeleb 和 LibriSpeech 数据集上训练的 Wav2Vec2.0 模型获得的音频表示。提取嵌入后，我们使用几个传统分类器（例如 k 最近邻、高斯朴素贝叶斯和神经网络）对口吃检测任务进行基准测试。与仅在有限的 SEP-28k 数据集上训练的标准 SD 系统相比，我们在总体精度方面比基线提高了 16.74%。最后，我们证明了结合两个嵌入并连接 Wav2Vec2.0 的多层可以进一步将 SD 性能分别提高最多 1% 和 2.64%。

AI.tldr: 本文将ECAPA-TDNN和Wav2Vec2.0预训练模型提取的语音嵌入应用于口吃检测任务，以提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 由于口吃检测数据集规模有限，传统方法难以充分训练模型，需借助大规模语料预训练的深度学习模型提取更有效的语音特征。
AI.method: 使用ECAPA-TDNN（基于VoxCeleb）和Wav2Vec2.0（基于LibriSpeech）提取语音嵌入，结合KNN、高斯朴素贝叶斯等传统分类器进行检测，并通过融合双嵌入及多层Wav2Vec2.0特征进一步优化。
AI.result: 相较仅使用SEP-28k数据集的基线模型，总体准确率提升16.74%；融合双嵌入和多层Wav2Vec2.0特征分别额外提升1%和2.64%。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型提取的语音嵌入能显著提升口吃检测效果，且多模型融合策略可进一步优化性能。
