search_text: Introducing ECAPA-TDNN and Wav2Vec2.0 Embeddings to Stuttering Detection 将 ECAPA-TDNN 和 Wav2Vec2.0 嵌入引入口吃检测 The adoption of advanced deep learning (DL) architecture in stuttering detection (SD) tasks is challenging due to the limited size of the available datasets. To this end, this work introduces the application of speech embeddings extracted with pre-trained deep models trained on massive audio datasets for different tasks. In particular, we explore audio representations obtained using emphasized channel attention, propagation, and aggregation-time-delay neural network (ECAPA-TDNN) and Wav2Vec2.0 model trained on VoxCeleb and LibriSpeech datasets respectively. After extracting the embeddings, we benchmark with several traditional classifiers, such as a k-nearest neighbor, Gaussian naive Bayes, and neural network, for the stuttering detection tasks. In comparison to the standard SD system trained only on the limited SEP-28k dataset, we obtain a relative improvement of 16.74% in terms of overall accuracy over baseline. Finally, we have shown that combining two embeddings and concatenating multiple layers of Wav2Vec2.0 can further improve SD performance up to 1% and 2.64% respectively. 由于可用数据集的大小有限，在口吃检测 (SD) 任务中采用先进的深度学习 (DL) 架构具有挑战性。为此，这项工作介绍了使用在不同任务的大量音频数据集上训练的预训练深度模型提取的语音嵌入的应用。特别是，我们探索了使用强调通道注意、传播和聚合时延神经网络 (ECAPA-TDNN) 和分别在 VoxCeleb 和 LibriSpeech 数据集上训练的 Wav2Vec2.0 模型获得的音频表示。提取嵌入后，我们使用几个传统分类器（例如 k 最近邻、高斯朴素贝叶斯和神经网络）对口吃检测任务进行基准测试。与仅在有限的 SEP-28k 数据集上训练的标准 SD 系统相比，我们在总体精度方面比基线提高了 16.74%。最后，我们证明了结合两个嵌入并连接 Wav2Vec2.0 的多层可以进一步将 SD 性能分别提高最多 1% 和 2.64%。 本文将ECAPA-TDNN和Wav2Vec2.0预训练模型提取的语音嵌入应用于口吃检测任务，以提升检测性能。 Shakeel Ahmad Sheikh,Md Sahidullah,Fabrice Hirsch,Slim Ouni cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Jianfei Yang,Han Zou,Lihua Xie
title: SecureSense: Defending Adversarial Attack for Secure Device-Free Human Activity Recognition
title_zh: SecureSense：防御对抗性攻击，实现安全的无设备人类活动识别
comment: The paper is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
comments: The paper is accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
abstract: Deep neural networks have empowered accurate device-free human activity recognition, which has wide applications. Deep models can extract robust features from various sensors and generalize well even in challenging situations such as data-insufficient cases. However, these systems could be vulnerable to input perturbations, i.e. adversarial attacks. We empirically demonstrate that both black-box Gaussian attacks and modern adversarial white-box attacks can render their accuracies to plummet. In this paper, we firstly point out that such phenomenon can bring severe safety hazards to device-free sensing systems, and then propose a novel learning framework, SecureSense, to defend common attacks. SecureSense aims to achieve consistent predictions regardless of whether there exists an attack on its input or not, alleviating the negative effect of distribution perturbation caused by adversarial attacks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method can significantly enhance the model robustness of existing deep models, overcoming possible attacks. The results validate that our method works well on wireless human activity recognition and person identification systems. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to investigate adversarial attacks and further develop a novel defense framework for wireless human activity recognition in mobile computing research.
summary: Deep neural networks have empowered accurate device-free human activity recognition, which has wide applications. Deep models can extract robust features from various sensors and generalize well even in challenging situations such as data-insufficient cases. However, these systems could be vulnerable to input perturbations, i.e. adversarial attacks. We empirically demonstrate that both black-box Gaussian attacks and modern adversarial white-box attacks can render their accuracies to plummet. In this paper, we firstly point out that such phenomenon can bring severe safety hazards to device-free sensing systems, and then propose a novel learning framework, SecureSense, to defend common attacks. SecureSense aims to achieve consistent predictions regardless of whether there exists an attack on its input or not, alleviating the negative effect of distribution perturbation caused by adversarial attacks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method can significantly enhance the model robustness of existing deep models, overcoming possible attacks. The results validate that our method works well on wireless human activity recognition and person identification systems. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to investigate adversarial attacks and further develop a novel defense framework for wireless human activity recognition in mobile computing research.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络能够实现准确的无设备人类活动识别，具有广泛的应用。深度模型可以从各种传感器中提取鲁棒的特征，即使在数据不足等具有挑战性的情况下也能很好地泛化。然而，这些系统可能容易受到输入扰动，即对抗性攻击。我们凭经验证明，黑盒高斯攻击和现代对抗性白盒攻击都会导致其准确性直线下降。在本文中，我们首先指出这种现象会给无设备传感系统带来严重的安全隐患，然后提出一种新颖的学习框架SecureSense来防御常见的攻击。 SecureSense 的目标是无论输入是否存在攻击，都能实现一致的预测，从而减轻对抗性攻击造成的分布扰动的负面影响。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以显着增强现有深度模型的模型鲁棒性，克服可能的攻击。结果验证了我们的方法在无线人类活动识别和人员识别系统上运行良好。据我们所知，这是第一项研究对抗性攻击并进一步开发移动计算研究中无线人类活动识别的新型防御框架的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SecureSense框架，用于防御无线设备自由人体活动识别中的对抗攻击，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型在设备自由感知系统中易受对抗攻击影响，可能导致严重安全风险，亟需有效防御方案。
AI.method: 设计SecureSense学习框架，通过强制模型在存在或不存在攻击时保持预测一致性，缓解对抗扰动带来的分布偏移。
AI.result: 实验表明SecureSense显著增强模型鲁棒性，有效抵御黑盒高斯攻击和白盒对抗攻击，在无线人体活动识别和身份识别系统中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究无线人体活动识别中的对抗攻击问题，提出的SecureSense框架为移动计算领域的安全感知提供了新型防御方案。

search_text: SecureSense: Defending Adversarial Attack for Secure Device-Free Human Activity Recognition SecureSense：防御对抗性攻击，实现安全的无设备人类活动识别 Deep neural networks have empowered accurate device-free human activity recognition, which has wide applications. Deep models can extract robust features from various sensors and generalize well even in challenging situations such as data-insufficient cases. However, these systems could be vulnerable to input perturbations, i.e. adversarial attacks. We empirically demonstrate that both black-box Gaussian attacks and modern adversarial white-box attacks can render their accuracies to plummet. In this paper, we firstly point out that such phenomenon can bring severe safety hazards to device-free sensing systems, and then propose a novel learning framework, SecureSense, to defend common attacks. SecureSense aims to achieve consistent predictions regardless of whether there exists an attack on its input or not, alleviating the negative effect of distribution perturbation caused by adversarial attacks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method can significantly enhance the model robustness of existing deep models, overcoming possible attacks. The results validate that our method works well on wireless human activity recognition and person identification systems. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to investigate adversarial attacks and further develop a novel defense framework for wireless human activity recognition in mobile computing research. 深度神经网络能够实现准确的无设备人类活动识别，具有广泛的应用。深度模型可以从各种传感器中提取鲁棒的特征，即使在数据不足等具有挑战性的情况下也能很好地泛化。然而，这些系统可能容易受到输入扰动，即对抗性攻击。我们凭经验证明，黑盒高斯攻击和现代对抗性白盒攻击都会导致其准确性直线下降。在本文中，我们首先指出这种现象会给无设备传感系统带来严重的安全隐患，然后提出一种新颖的学习框架SecureSense来防御常见的攻击。 SecureSense 的目标是无论输入是否存在攻击，都能实现一致的预测，从而减轻对抗性攻击造成的分布扰动的负面影响。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以显着增强现有深度模型的模型鲁棒性，克服可能的攻击。结果验证了我们的方法在无线人类活动识别和人员识别系统上运行良好。据我们所知，这是第一项研究对抗性攻击并进一步开发移动计算研究中无线人类活动识别的新型防御框架的工作。 本文提出SecureSense框架，用于防御无线设备自由人体活动识别中的对抗攻击，提升模型鲁棒性。 Jianfei Yang,Han Zou,Lihua Xie cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.NI

authors_text: Manuel Pérez-Carrasco,Pavlos Protopapas,Guillermo Cabrera-Vives
title: Con$^{2}$DA: Simplifying Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation by Learning Consistent and Contrastive Feature Representations
title_zh: Con$^{2}$DA：通过学习一致和对比的特征表示来简化半监督域适应
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Distribution Shifts: Connecting Methods and Applications
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Distribution Shifts: Connecting Methods and Applications
abstract: In this work, we present Con$^{2}$DA, a simple framework that extends recent advances in semi-supervised learning to the semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) problem. Our framework generates pairs of associated samples by performing stochastic data transformations to a given input. Associated data pairs are mapped to a feature representation space using a feature extractor. We use different loss functions to enforce consistency between the feature representations of associated data pairs of samples. We show that these learned representations are useful to deal with differences in data distributions in the domain adaptation problem. We performed experiments to study the main components of our model and we show that (i) learning of the consistent and contrastive feature representations is crucial to extract good discriminative features across different domains, and ii) our model benefits from the use of strong augmentation policies. With these findings, our method achieves state-of-the-art performances in three benchmark datasets for SSDA.
summary: In this work, we present Con$^{2}$DA, a simple framework that extends recent advances in semi-supervised learning to the semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) problem. Our framework generates pairs of associated samples by performing stochastic data transformations to a given input. Associated data pairs are mapped to a feature representation space using a feature extractor. We use different loss functions to enforce consistency between the feature representations of associated data pairs of samples. We show that these learned representations are useful to deal with differences in data distributions in the domain adaptation problem. We performed experiments to study the main components of our model and we show that (i) learning of the consistent and contrastive feature representations is crucial to extract good discriminative features across different domains, and ii) our model benefits from the use of strong augmentation policies. With these findings, our method achieves state-of-the-art performances in three benchmark datasets for SSDA.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 Con$^{2}$DA，一个简单的框架，它将半监督学习的最新进展扩展到半监督域适应（SSDA）问题。我们的框架通过对给定输入执行随机数据转换来生成相关样本对。使用特征提取器将关联的数据对映射到特征表示空间。我们使用不同的损失函数来强制样本相关数据对的特征表示之间的一致性。我们表明，这些学习到的表示对于处理域适应问题中数据分布的差异很有用。我们进行了实验来研究模型的主要组成部分，结果表明（i）学习一致和对比的特征表示对于跨不同领域提取良好的判别性特征至关重要，ii）我们的模型受益于使用强大的增强策略。有了这些发现，我们的方法在 SSDA 的三个基准数据集中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Con²DA框架，通过学习一致性和对比性特征表示，简化半监督领域自适应问题。
AI.motivation: 领域自适应中源域和目标域的数据分布差异导致模型性能下降，传统方法难以有效处理未标记的目标域数据。
AI.method: 通过随机数据增强生成关联样本对，利用特征提取器映射到特征空间，并采用损失函数强制关联样本对的特征一致性，结合强增强策略提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上达到半监督领域自适应的最先进性能，验证了一致性与对比性特征学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 学习一致性和对比性特征表示是跨领域提取判别特征的关键，强数据增强策略进一步提升了模型性能。

search_text: Con$^{2}$DA: Simplifying Semi-supervised Domain Adaptation by Learning Consistent and Contrastive Feature Representations Con$^{2}$DA：通过学习一致和对比的特征表示来简化半监督域适应 In this work, we present Con$^{2}$DA, a simple framework that extends recent advances in semi-supervised learning to the semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) problem. Our framework generates pairs of associated samples by performing stochastic data transformations to a given input. Associated data pairs are mapped to a feature representation space using a feature extractor. We use different loss functions to enforce consistency between the feature representations of associated data pairs of samples. We show that these learned representations are useful to deal with differences in data distributions in the domain adaptation problem. We performed experiments to study the main components of our model and we show that (i) learning of the consistent and contrastive feature representations is crucial to extract good discriminative features across different domains, and ii) our model benefits from the use of strong augmentation policies. With these findings, our method achieves state-of-the-art performances in three benchmark datasets for SSDA. 在这项工作中，我们提出了 Con$^{2}$DA，一个简单的框架，它将半监督学习的最新进展扩展到半监督域适应（SSDA）问题。我们的框架通过对给定输入执行随机数据转换来生成相关样本对。使用特征提取器将关联的数据对映射到特征表示空间。我们使用不同的损失函数来强制样本相关数据对的特征表示之间的一致性。我们表明，这些学习到的表示对于处理域适应问题中数据分布的差异很有用。我们进行了实验来研究模型的主要组成部分，结果表明（i）学习一致和对比的特征表示对于跨不同领域提取良好的判别性特征至关重要，ii）我们的模型受益于使用强大的增强策略。有了这些发现，我们的方法在 SSDA 的三个基准数据集中实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出Con²DA框架，通过学习一致性和对比性特征表示，简化半监督领域自适应问题。 Manuel Pérez-Carrasco,Pavlos Protopapas,Guillermo Cabrera-Vives cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Huy Q. Le,Minh N. H. Nguyen,Shashi Raj Pandey,Chaoning Zhang,Choong Seon Hong
title: CDKT-FL: Cross-Device Knowledge Transfer using Proxy Dataset in Federated Learning
title_zh: CDKT-FL：联邦学习中使用代理数据集的跨设备知识传输
comment: Accepted to Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence (EAAI)
comments: Accepted to Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence (EAAI)
abstract: In a practical setting, how to enable robust Federated Learning (FL) systems, both in terms of generalization and personalization abilities, is one important research question. It is a challenging issue due to the consequences of non-i.i.d. properties of client's data, often referred to as statistical heterogeneity, and small local data samples from the various data distributions. Therefore, to develop robust generalized global and personalized models, conventional FL methods need to redesign the knowledge aggregation from biased local models while considering huge divergence of learning parameters due to skewed client data. In this work, we demonstrate that the knowledge transfer mechanism achieves these objectives and develop a novel knowledge distillation-based approach to study the extent of knowledge transfer between the global model and local models. Henceforth, our method considers the suitability of transferring the outcome distribution and (or) the embedding vector of representation from trained models during cross-device knowledge transfer using a small proxy dataset in heterogeneous FL. In doing so, we alternatively perform cross-device knowledge transfer following general formulations as 1) global knowledge transfer and 2) on-device knowledge transfer. Through simulations on three federated datasets, we show the proposed method achieves significant speedups and high personalized performance of local models. Furthermore, the proposed approach offers a more stable algorithm than other baselines during the training, with minimal communication data load when exchanging the trained model's outcomes and representation.
summary: In a practical setting, how to enable robust Federated Learning (FL) systems, both in terms of generalization and personalization abilities, is one important research question. It is a challenging issue due to the consequences of non-i.i.d. properties of client's data, often referred to as statistical heterogeneity, and small local data samples from the various data distributions. Therefore, to develop robust generalized global and personalized models, conventional FL methods need to redesign the knowledge aggregation from biased local models while considering huge divergence of learning parameters due to skewed client data. In this work, we demonstrate that the knowledge transfer mechanism achieves these objectives and develop a novel knowledge distillation-based approach to study the extent of knowledge transfer between the global model and local models. Henceforth, our method considers the suitability of transferring the outcome distribution and (or) the embedding vector of representation from trained models during cross-device knowledge transfer using a small proxy dataset in heterogeneous FL. In doing so, we alternatively perform cross-device knowledge transfer following general formulations as 1) global knowledge transfer and 2) on-device knowledge transfer. Through simulations on three federated datasets, we show the proposed method achieves significant speedups and high personalized performance of local models. Furthermore, the proposed approach offers a more stable algorithm than other baselines during the training, with minimal communication data load when exchanging the trained model's outcomes and representation.
abstract_zh: 在实际环境中，如何在泛化和个性化能力方面实现强大的联邦学习（FL）系统是一个重要的研究问题。由于非独立同分布的后果，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。客户数据的属性（通常称为统计异质性）以及来自各种数据分布的小型本地数据样本。因此，为了开发鲁棒的广义全局和个性化模型，传统的 FL 方法需要根据有偏差的局部模型重新设计知识聚合，同时考虑由于客户数据倾斜而导致的学习参数的巨大差异。在这项工作中，我们证明知识转移机制可以实现这些目标，并开发一种新颖的基于知识蒸馏的方法来研究全局模型和局部模型之间的知识转移程度。今后，我们的方法会考虑在跨设备知识转移期间使用异构 FL 中的小型代理数据集转移结果分布和（或）来自训练模型的表示嵌入向量的适用性。在此过程中，我们可以按照以下一般公式执行跨设备知识转移：1）全局知识转移和2）设备上知识转移。通过对三个联合数据集的模拟，我们表明所提出的方法实现了本地模型的显着加速和高度个性化性能。此外，所提出的方法在训练期间提供了比其他基线更稳定的算法，在交换训练模型的结果和表示时具有最小的通信数据负载。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CDKT-FL方法，通过使用代理数据集在联邦学习中实现跨设备知识迁移，以提升模型的泛化与个性化能力。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习面临客户端数据非独立同分布（非i.i.d.）和本地样本量小的问题，导致全局模型与本地模型性能下降，需设计有效知识迁移机制。
AI.method: 基于知识蒸馏框架，利用代理数据集在跨设备场景中迁移全局模型或本地模型的输出分布或嵌入表示，分阶段实现全局知识迁移与设备内知识迁移。
AI.result: 在三个联邦数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升本地模型个性化性能并加速训练，同时保持较低通信开销且训练更稳定。
AI.conclusion: CDKT-FL通过代理数据集驱动的知识迁移有效缓解联邦学习中的异质性问题，为平衡全局泛化与本地个性化提供新思路。

authors_text: Daniel De Pascale,Giuseppe Cascavilla,Mirella Sangiovanni,Damian A. Tamburri,Willem-Jan van den Heuvel
title: Internet-of-Things Architectures for Secure Cyber-Physical Spaces: the VISOR Experience Report
title_zh: 安全网络物理空间的物联网架构：VISOR 经验报告
abstract: Internet of things (IoT) technologies are becoming a more and more widespread part of civilian life in common urban spaces, which are rapidly turning into cyber-physical spaces. Simultaneously, the fear of terrorism and crime in such public spaces is ever-increasing. Due to the resulting increased demand for security, video-based IoT surveillance systems have become an important area for research. Considering the large number of devices involved in the illicit recognition task, we conducted a field study in a Dutch Easter music festival in a national interest project called VISOR to select the most appropriate device configuration in terms of performance and results. We iteratively architected solutions for the security of cyber-physical spaces using IoT devices. We tested the performance of multiple federated devices encompassing drones, closed-circuit television, smart phone cameras, and smart glasses to detect real-case scenarios of potentially malicious activities such as mosh-pits and pick-pocketing. Our results pave the way to select optimal IoT architecture configurations -- i.e., a mix of CCTV, drones, smart glasses, and camera phones in our case -- to make safer cyber-physical spaces' a reality.
summary: Internet of things (IoT) technologies are becoming a more and more widespread part of civilian life in common urban spaces, which are rapidly turning into cyber-physical spaces. Simultaneously, the fear of terrorism and crime in such public spaces is ever-increasing. Due to the resulting increased demand for security, video-based IoT surveillance systems have become an important area for research. Considering the large number of devices involved in the illicit recognition task, we conducted a field study in a Dutch Easter music festival in a national interest project called VISOR to select the most appropriate device configuration in terms of performance and results. We iteratively architected solutions for the security of cyber-physical spaces using IoT devices. We tested the performance of multiple federated devices encompassing drones, closed-circuit television, smart phone cameras, and smart glasses to detect real-case scenarios of potentially malicious activities such as mosh-pits and pick-pocketing. Our results pave the way to select optimal IoT architecture configurations -- i.e., a mix of CCTV, drones, smart glasses, and camera phones in our case -- to make safer cyber-physical spaces' a reality.
abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 技术正在成为城市公共空间中越来越广泛的平民生活的一部分，这些空间正在迅速转变为网络物理空间。与此同时，对此类公共场所的恐怖主义和犯罪的恐惧也在不断增加。由于安全需求的增加，基于视频的物联网监控系统已成为一个重要的研究领域。考虑到非法识别任务涉及大量设备，我们在荷兰复活节音乐节的一个名为 VISOR 的国家利益项目中进行了实地研究，以选择在性能和结果方面最合适的设备配置。我们使用物联网设备迭代构建网络物理空间安全解决方案。我们测试了包括无人机、闭路电视、智能手机摄像头和智能眼镜在内的多个联合设备的性能，以检测潜在恶意活动的真实场景，例如狂欢和扒窃。我们的结果为选择最佳物联网架构配置（即在我们的案例中混合使用闭路电视、无人机、智能眼镜和拍照手机）铺平了道路，使更安全的网络物理空间成为现实。

AI.tldr: 本文通过VISOR项目研究物联网架构在保障网络物理空间安全中的应用，重点探索多设备协同检测非法活动的最优配置。
AI.motivation: 随着物联网技术在公共空间的普及，安全威胁增加，传统监控手段难以满足复杂场景需求，需通过多设备协同提升安全效能。
AI.method: 在荷兰音乐节实地部署无人机、闭路电视、智能手机和智能眼镜等联邦设备，迭代测试其对斗殴、扒手等场景的检测性能。
AI.result: 确定CCTV、无人机、智能眼镜与手机相机混合配置为最优方案，有效提升非法活动识别准确率与响应效率。
AI.conclusion: 多模态物联网架构可显著增强公共空间安全，为未来智慧城市安防系统设计提供可复用的设备组合范式。

ai_content_json.method: 在荷兰音乐节实地部署无人机、闭路电视、智能手机和智能眼镜等联邦设备，迭代测试其对斗殴、扒手等场景的检测性能。
ai_content_json.result: 确定CCTV、无人机、智能眼镜与手机相机混合配置为最优方案，有效提升非法活动识别准确率与响应效率。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 多模态物联网架构可显著增强公共空间安全，为未来智慧城市安防系统设计提供可复用的设备组合范式。

tldr: 本文通过VISOR项目研究物联网架构在保障网络物理空间安全中的应用，重点探索多设备协同检测非法活动的最优配置。
motivation: 随着物联网技术在公共空间的普及，安全威胁增加，传统监控手段难以满足复杂场景需求，需通过多设备协同提升安全效能。

result: 确定CCTV、无人机、智能眼镜与手机相机混合配置为最优方案，有效提升非法活动识别准确率与响应效率。

search_text: Internet-of-Things Architectures for Secure Cyber-Physical Spaces: the VISOR Experience Report 安全网络物理空间的物联网架构：VISOR 经验报告 Internet of things (IoT) technologies are becoming a more and more widespread part of civilian life in common urban spaces, which are rapidly turning into cyber-physical spaces. Simultaneously, the fear of terrorism and crime in such public spaces is ever-increasing. Due to the resulting increased demand for security, video-based IoT surveillance systems have become an important area for research. Considering the large number of devices involved in the illicit recognition task, we conducted a field study in a Dutch Easter music festival in a national interest project called VISOR to select the most appropriate device configuration in terms of performance and results. We iteratively architected solutions for the security of cyber-physical spaces using IoT devices. We tested the performance of multiple federated devices encompassing drones, closed-circuit television, smart phone cameras, and smart glasses to detect real-case scenarios of potentially malicious activities such as mosh-pits and pick-pocketing. Our results pave the way to select optimal IoT architecture configurations -- i.e., a mix of CCTV, drones, smart glasses, and camera phones in our case -- to make safer cyber-physical spaces' a reality. 物联网 (IoT) 技术正在成为城市公共空间中越来越广泛的平民生活的一部分，这些空间正在迅速转变为网络物理空间。与此同时，对此类公共场所的恐怖主义和犯罪的恐惧也在不断增加。由于安全需求的增加，基于视频的物联网监控系统已成为一个重要的研究领域。考虑到非法识别任务涉及大量设备，我们在荷兰复活节音乐节的一个名为 VISOR 的国家利益项目中进行了实地研究，以选择在性能和结果方面最合适的设备配置。我们使用物联网设备迭代构建网络物理空间安全解决方案。我们测试了包括无人机、闭路电视、智能手机摄像头和智能眼镜在内的多个联合设备的性能，以检测潜在恶意活动的真实场景，例如狂欢和扒窃。我们的结果为选择最佳物联网架构配置（即在我们的案例中混合使用闭路电视、无人机、智能眼镜和拍照手机）铺平了道路，使更安全的网络物理空间成为现实。 本文通过VISOR项目研究物联网架构在保障网络物理空间安全中的应用，重点探索多设备协同检测非法活动的最优配置。 Daniel De Pascale,Giuseppe Cascavilla,Mirella Sangiovanni,Damian A. Tamburri,Willem-Jan van den Heuvel cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Ihtisham Ali,Sari Peltonen,Atanas Gotchev
title: Bi-directional Loop Closure for Visual SLAM
title_zh: 视觉 SLAM 的双向环路闭合
abstract: A key functional block of visual navigation system for intelligent autonomous vehicles is Loop Closure detection and subsequent relocalisation. State-of-the-Art methods still approach the problem as uni-directional along the direction of the previous motion. As a result, most of the methods fail in the absence of a significantly similar overlap of perspectives. In this study, we propose an approach for bi-directional loop closure. This will, for the first time, provide us with the capability to relocalize to a location even when traveling in the opposite direction, thus significantly reducing long-term odometry drift in the absence of a direct loop. We present a technique to select training data from large datasets in order to make them usable for the bi-directional problem. The data is used to train and validate two different CNN architectures for loop closure detection and subsequent regression of 6-DOF camera pose between the views in an end-to-end manner. The outcome packs a considerable impact and aids significantly to real-world scenarios that do not offer direct loop closure opportunities. We provide a rigorous empirical comparison against other established approaches and evaluate our method on both outdoor and indoor data from the FinnForest dataset and PennCOSYVIO dataset.
summary: A key functional block of visual navigation system for intelligent autonomous vehicles is Loop Closure detection and subsequent relocalisation. State-of-the-Art methods still approach the problem as uni-directional along the direction of the previous motion. As a result, most of the methods fail in the absence of a significantly similar overlap of perspectives. In this study, we propose an approach for bi-directional loop closure. This will, for the first time, provide us with the capability to relocalize to a location even when traveling in the opposite direction, thus significantly reducing long-term odometry drift in the absence of a direct loop. We present a technique to select training data from large datasets in order to make them usable for the bi-directional problem. The data is used to train and validate two different CNN architectures for loop closure detection and subsequent regression of 6-DOF camera pose between the views in an end-to-end manner. The outcome packs a considerable impact and aids significantly to real-world scenarios that do not offer direct loop closure opportunities. We provide a rigorous empirical comparison against other established approaches and evaluate our method on both outdoor and indoor data from the FinnForest dataset and PennCOSYVIO dataset.
abstract_zh: 智能自动驾驶车辆视觉导航系统的一个关键功能块是环路闭合检测和随后的重新定位。最先进的方法仍然将问题视为沿着先前运动的方向单向。因此，大多数方法在缺乏明显相似的视角重叠的情况下都会失败。在本研究中，我们提出了一种双向闭环方法。这将首次为我们提供重新定位到某个位置的能力，即使在相反方向行驶时也是如此，从而在没有直接环路的情况下显着减少长期里程表漂移。我们提出了一种从大型数据集中选择训练数据的技术，以使它们可用于双向问题。这些数据用于训练和验证两种不同的 CNN 架构，以进行闭环检测以及随后以端到端方式对视图之间的 6 自由度相机姿态进行回归。结果对不提供直接闭环机会的现实场景产生了相当大的影响和显着帮助。我们与其他已建立的方法进行了严格的实证比较，并根据 FinnForest 数据集和 PennCOSYVIO 数据集的室外和室内数据评估了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于视觉SLAM的双向回环闭合方法，解决传统单向方法在缺乏视角重叠时的定位失效问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉SLAM回环检测方法仅依赖单向运动轨迹，导致在反向行驶或缺乏直接视角重叠时无法有效修正长期里程计漂移。
AI.method: 通过筛选大型数据集构建双向训练样本，设计两种CNN架构实现端到端的回环检测与6-DOF相机位姿回归，支持双向重定位。
AI.result: 方法在FinnForest和PennCOSYVIO数据集上验证有效，显著提升无直接回环场景下的定位精度与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 双向回环闭合技术为复杂环境下的自主导航提供了更可靠的视觉SLAM解决方案，具有重要的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Kun He,Chunyang Wang,Yitong Yin
title: Sampling Lovász Local Lemma For General Constraint Satisfaction Solutions In Near-Linear Time
title_zh: 对 Lovász 局部引理进行采样以获得近线性时间的一般约束满足解决方案
abstract: We give a fast algorithm for sampling uniform solutions of general constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs) in a local lemma regime. Suppose that the CSP has $n$ variables with domain size at most q, each constraint contains at most k variables, shares variables with at most $Δ$ constraints, and is violated with probability at most $p$ by a uniform random assignment. The algorithm returns an almost uniform satisfying assignment in expected $\mathrm{poly}(q,k,Δ)\cdot\tilde{O}(n)$ time, as long as a local lemma condition is satisfied: \[ k\cdot p\cdot q^2\cdot Δ^5\le C_0\quad\text{for a suitably small absolute constant }C_0. \] Previously, under similar local lemma conditions, sampling algorithms with running time polynomial in both $n$ and $Δ$ were only known for the almost atomic case, where each constraint is violated by a small number of forbidden local configurations. The key term $Δ^5$ in our local lemma condition also improves the previously best known $Δ^7$ for general CSPs [JPV21b] and $Δ^{5.714}$ for atomic CSPs, including the special case of $k$-CNF [JPV21a, HSW21]. Our sampling approach departs from previous fast algorithms for sampling LLL, which were based on Markov chains. A crucial step of our algorithm is a recursive marginal sampler that is of independent interests. Within a local lemma regime, this marginal sampler can draw a random value for a variable according to its marginal distribution, at a cost independent of the size of the CSP.
summary: We give a fast algorithm for sampling uniform solutions of general constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs) in a local lemma regime. Suppose that the CSP has $n$ variables with domain size at most q, each constraint contains at most k variables, shares variables with at most $Δ$ constraints, and is violated with probability at most $p$ by a uniform random assignment. The algorithm returns an almost uniform satisfying assignment in expected $\mathrm{poly}(q,k,Δ)\cdot\tilde{O}(n)$ time, as long as a local lemma condition is satisfied: \[ k\cdot p\cdot q^2\cdot Δ^5\le C_0\quad\text{for a suitably small absolute constant }C_0. \] Previously, under similar local lemma conditions, sampling algorithms with running time polynomial in both $n$ and $Δ$ were only known for the almost atomic case, where each constraint is violated by a small number of forbidden local configurations. The key term $Δ^5$ in our local lemma condition also improves the previously best known $Δ^7$ for general CSPs [JPV21b] and $Δ^{5.714}$ for atomic CSPs, including the special case of $k$-CNF [JPV21a, HSW21]. Our sampling approach departs from previous fast algorithms for sampling LLL, which were based on Markov chains. A crucial step of our algorithm is a recursive marginal sampler that is of independent interests. Within a local lemma regime, this marginal sampler can draw a random value for a variable according to its marginal distribution, at a cost independent of the size of the CSP.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了一种快速算法，用于在局部引理体系中对一般约束满足问题（CSP）的统一解进行采样。假设 CSP 有 $n$ 个变量，域大小最多为 q，每个约束最多包含 k 个变量，与最多 $Δ$ 约束共享变量，并且均匀随机分配最多违反 $p$ 概率。只要满足局部引理条件，该算法就会在预期的 $\mathrm{poly}(q,k,Δ)\cdot\tilde{O}(n)$ 时间内返回几乎一致的令人满意的赋值：\[ k\cdot p\cdot q^2\cdot Δ^5\le C_0\quad\text{对于适当小的绝对常数}C_0。 \] 以前，在类似的局部引理条件下，$n$ 和 $Δ$ 中运行时间多项式的采样算法仅适用于几乎原子的情况，其中每个约束都被少量禁止的局部配置违反。我们局部引理条件中的关键项 $Δ^5$ 还改进了先前众所周知的一般 CSP [JPV21b] 的 $Δ^7$ 和原子 CSP 的 $Δ^{5.714}$，包括 $k$-CNF [JPV21a, HSW21] 的特殊情况。我们的采样方法不同于之前基于马尔可夫链的 LLL 采样快速算法。我们算法的关键步骤是具有独立利益的递归边际采样器。在局部引理体系内，该边际采样器可以根据变量的边际分布为变量抽取随机值，其成本与 CSP 的大小无关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在局部引理条件下近线性时间内均匀采样一般约束满足问题解的快速算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在类似局部引理条件下仅适用于特定约束类型，且时间复杂度依赖于约束数量的高次幂，需改进通用性与效率。
AI.method: 设计了一种递归边际采样器，独立于马尔可夫链方法，能在局部引理条件下以与CSP规模无关的成本采样变量边际分布。
AI.result: 算法在满足$k \\cdot p \\cdot q^2 \\cdot Δ^5 \\le C_0$条件下，以$\\mathrm{poly}(q,k,Δ)\\cdot\	ilde{O}(n)$时间生成近均匀解，改进了此前Δ^7和Δ^{5.714}的复杂度上限。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统采样算法的限制，为通用CSP提供了更高效的解决方案，且边际采样器具有独立研究价值。

search_text: Sampling Lovász Local Lemma For General Constraint Satisfaction Solutions In Near-Linear Time 对 Lovász 局部引理进行采样以获得近线性时间的一般约束满足解决方案 We give a fast algorithm for sampling uniform solutions of general constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs) in a local lemma regime. Suppose that the CSP has $n$ variables with domain size at most q, each constraint contains at most k variables, shares variables with at most $Δ$ constraints, and is violated with probability at most $p$ by a uniform random assignment. The algorithm returns an almost uniform satisfying assignment in expected $\mathrm{poly}(q,k,Δ)\cdot\tilde{O}(n)$ time, as long as a local lemma condition is satisfied: \[ k\cdot p\cdot q^2\cdot Δ^5\le C_0\quad\text{for a suitably small absolute constant }C_0. \] Previously, under similar local lemma conditions, sampling algorithms with running time polynomial in both $n$ and $Δ$ were only known for the almost atomic case, where each constraint is violated by a small number of forbidden local configurations. The key term $Δ^5$ in our local lemma condition also improves the previously best known $Δ^7$ for general CSPs [JPV21b] and $Δ^{5.714}$ for atomic CSPs, including the special case of $k$-CNF [JPV21a, HSW21]. Our sampling approach departs from previous fast algorithms for sampling LLL, which were based on Markov chains. A crucial step of our algorithm is a recursive marginal sampler that is of independent interests. Within a local lemma regime, this marginal sampler can draw a random value for a variable according to its marginal distribution, at a cost independent of the size of the CSP. 我们给出了一种快速算法，用于在局部引理体系中对一般约束满足问题（CSP）的统一解进行采样。假设 CSP 有 $n$ 个变量，域大小最多为 q，每个约束最多包含 k 个变量，与最多 $Δ$ 约束共享变量，并且均匀随机分配最多违反 $p$ 概率。只要满足局部引理条件，该算法就会在预期的 $\mathrm{poly}(q,k,Δ)\cdot\tilde{O}(n)$ 时间内返回几乎一致的令人满意的赋值：\[ k\cdot p\cdot q^2\cdot Δ^5\le C_0\quad\text{对于适当小的绝对常数}C_0。 \] 以前，在类似的局部引理条件下，$n$ 和 $Δ$ 中运行时间多项式的采样算法仅适用于几乎原子的情况，其中每个约束都被少量禁止的局部配置违反。我们局部引理条件中的关键项 $Δ^5$ 还改进了先前众所周知的一般 CSP [JPV21b] 的 $Δ^7$ 和原子 CSP 的 $Δ^{5.714}$，包括 $k$-CNF [JPV21a, HSW21] 的特殊情况。我们的采样方法不同于之前基于马尔可夫链的 LLL 采样快速算法。我们算法的关键步骤是具有独立利益的递归边际采样器。在局部引理体系内，该边际采样器可以根据变量的边际分布为变量抽取随机值，其成本与 CSP 的大小无关。 本文提出了一种在局部引理条件下近线性时间内均匀采样一般约束满足问题解的快速算法。 Kun He,Chunyang Wang,Yitong Yin cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Richard Fulton,Diane Fulton,Susan Kaplan
title: Artificial Intelligence: Framework of driving triggers to past, present and future applications and influencers of industry sector adoption
title_zh: 人工智能：过去、现在和未来应用的驱动触发框架以及行业采用的影响因素
abstract: To gain a sense of the development of Artificial Intelligence (AI), this research analyzes what has been done in the past, presently in the last decade and what is predicted for the next several decades. The paper will highlight the biggest changes in AI and give examples of how these technologies are applied in several key industry sectors along with influencers that can affect adoption speed. Lastly, the research examines the driving triggers such as cost, speed, accuracy, diversity/inclusion and interdisciplinary research/collaboration that propel AI into an essential transformative technology.
summary: To gain a sense of the development of Artificial Intelligence (AI), this research analyzes what has been done in the past, presently in the last decade and what is predicted for the next several decades. The paper will highlight the biggest changes in AI and give examples of how these technologies are applied in several key industry sectors along with influencers that can affect adoption speed. Lastly, the research examines the driving triggers such as cost, speed, accuracy, diversity/inclusion and interdisciplinary research/collaboration that propel AI into an essential transformative technology.
abstract_zh: 为了了解人工智能 (AI) 的发展，本研究分析了过去、过去十年中所做的事情以及未来几十年的预测。该论文将重点介绍人工智能的最大变化，并举例说明如何将这些技术应用于几个关键行业领域，以及可能影响采用速度的影响因素。最后，该研究探讨了推动人工智能成为一项重要变革技术的驱动因素，例如成本、速度、准确性、多样性/包容性以及跨学科研究/合作。

AI.tldr: 分析人工智能在不同阶段的发展及其在各行业应用中的驱动因素和影响因素
AI.motivation: 旨在全面了解人工智能技术的发展历程，明确其在不同行业中的应用现状及未来趋势，识别影响其采纳速度的关键因素
AI.method: 通过历史分析、案例研究及因素分析，探讨AI技术在不同阶段的发展及其驱动因素
AI.result: 明确了AI技术的关键变革节点，列举了各行业的应用案例，并识别了成本、准确性等核心影响因素
AI.conclusion: 人工智能已成为推动产业变革的核心技术，其发展受多重因素驱动，未来需加强跨学科合作与多样性建设以加速应用普及

authors_text: Qiuhong Shen,Xin Li,Fanyang Meng,Yongsheng Liang
title: Context-aware Visual Tracking with Joint Meta-updating
title_zh: 具有联合元更新的上下文感知视觉跟踪
abstract: Visual object tracking acts as a pivotal component in various emerging video applications. Despite the numerous developments in visual tracking, existing deep trackers are still likely to fail when tracking against objects with dramatic variation. These deep trackers usually do not perform online update or update single sub-branch of the tracking model, for which they cannot adapt to the appearance variation of objects. Efficient updating methods are therefore crucial for tracking while previous meta-updater optimizes trackers directly over parameter space, which is prone to over-fit even collapse on longer sequences. To address these issues, we propose a context-aware tracking model to optimize the tracker over the representation space, which jointly meta-update both branches by exploiting information along the whole sequence, such that it can avoid the over-fitting problem. First, we note that the embedded features of the localization branch and the box-estimation branch, focusing on the local and global information of the target, are effective complements to each other. Based on this insight, we devise a context-aggregation module to fuse information in historical frames, followed by a context-aware module to learn affinity vectors for both branches of the tracker. Besides, we develop a dedicated meta-learning scheme, on account of fast and stable updating with limited training samples. The proposed tracking method achieves an EAO score of 0.514 on VOT2018 with the speed of 40FPS, demonstrating its capability of improving the accuracy and robustness of the underlying tracker with little speed drop.
summary: Visual object tracking acts as a pivotal component in various emerging video applications. Despite the numerous developments in visual tracking, existing deep trackers are still likely to fail when tracking against objects with dramatic variation. These deep trackers usually do not perform online update or update single sub-branch of the tracking model, for which they cannot adapt to the appearance variation of objects. Efficient updating methods are therefore crucial for tracking while previous meta-updater optimizes trackers directly over parameter space, which is prone to over-fit even collapse on longer sequences. To address these issues, we propose a context-aware tracking model to optimize the tracker over the representation space, which jointly meta-update both branches by exploiting information along the whole sequence, such that it can avoid the over-fitting problem. First, we note that the embedded features of the localization branch and the box-estimation branch, focusing on the local and global information of the target, are effective complements to each other. Based on this insight, we devise a context-aggregation module to fuse information in historical frames, followed by a context-aware module to learn affinity vectors for both branches of the tracker. Besides, we develop a dedicated meta-learning scheme, on account of fast and stable updating with limited training samples. The proposed tracking method achieves an EAO score of 0.514 on VOT2018 with the speed of 40FPS, demonstrating its capability of improving the accuracy and robustness of the underlying tracker with little speed drop.
abstract_zh: 视觉对象跟踪是各种新兴视频应用程序的关键组件。尽管视觉跟踪取得了巨大的进步，但现有的深度跟踪器在跟踪变化剧烈的物体时仍然可能会失败。这些深度跟踪器通常不执行在线更新或更新跟踪模型的单个子分支，因此它们无法适应对象的外观变化。因此，高效的更新方法对于跟踪至关重要，而以前的元更新器直接在参数空间上优化跟踪器，这很容易过度拟合，甚至在较长的序列上崩溃。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种上下文感知跟踪模型来优化表示空间上的跟踪器，该模型通过利用整个序列的信息来联合元更新两个分支，从而可以避免过度拟合问题。首先，我们注意到定位分支和框估计分支的嵌入特征侧重于目标的局部和全局信息，是彼此有效的补充。基于这一见解，我们设计了一个上下文聚合模块来融合历史帧中的信息，然后是一个上下文感知模块来学习跟踪器两个分支的亲和力向量。此外，我们开发了专门的元学习方案，考虑到在有限的训练样本下快速稳定的更新。所提出的跟踪方法在 VOT2018 上以 40FPS 的速度获得了 0.514 的 EAO 分数，证明了其在速度下降很小的情况下提高底层跟踪器的准确性和鲁棒性的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于上下文感知的联合元更新方法，用于改进视觉目标跟踪中对剧烈变化目标的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度跟踪器在处理目标外观剧烈变化时易失效，主要因其未进行在线更新或仅更新单一子分支，导致模型无法有效适应变化。
AI.method: 设计上下文聚合模块融合历史帧信息，构建上下文感知模块学习双分支（定位与框估计）的关联向量，并开发专用元学习方案实现快速稳定更新。
AI.result: 在VOT2018数据集上达到0.514的EAO分数，速度为40FPS，验证了方法在精度与鲁棒性上的提升且速度损失较小。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合元更新与上下文感知机制，有效解决了跟踪模型对目标外观变化的适应性问题，为视觉跟踪提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ismail Elezi,Jenny Seidenschwarz,Laurin Wagner,Sebastiano Vascon,Alessandro Torcinovich,Marcello Pelillo,Laura Leal-Taixe
title: The Group Loss++: A deeper look into group loss for deep metric learning
title_zh: 组损失++：深入研究深度度量学习的组损失
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (tPAMI), 2022. Includes supplementary material
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (tPAMI), 2022. Includes supplementary material
abstract: Deep metric learning has yielded impressive results in tasks such as clustering and image retrieval by leveraging neural networks to obtain highly discriminative feature embeddings, which can be used to group samples into different classes. Much research has been devoted to the design of smart loss functions or data mining strategies for training such networks. Most methods consider only pairs or triplets of samples within a mini-batch to compute the loss function, which is commonly based on the distance between embeddings. We propose Group Loss, a loss function based on a differentiable label-propagation method that enforces embedding similarity across all samples of a group while promoting, at the same time, low-density regions amongst data points belonging to different groups. Guided by the smoothness assumption that "similar objects should belong to the same group", the proposed loss trains the neural network for a classification task, enforcing a consistent labelling amongst samples within a class. We design a set of inference strategies tailored towards our algorithm, named Group Loss++ that further improve the results of our model. We show state-of-the-art results on clustering and image retrieval on four retrieval datasets, and present competitive results on two person re-identification datasets, providing a unified framework for retrieval and re-identification.
summary: Deep metric learning has yielded impressive results in tasks such as clustering and image retrieval by leveraging neural networks to obtain highly discriminative feature embeddings, which can be used to group samples into different classes. Much research has been devoted to the design of smart loss functions or data mining strategies for training such networks. Most methods consider only pairs or triplets of samples within a mini-batch to compute the loss function, which is commonly based on the distance between embeddings. We propose Group Loss, a loss function based on a differentiable label-propagation method that enforces embedding similarity across all samples of a group while promoting, at the same time, low-density regions amongst data points belonging to different groups. Guided by the smoothness assumption that "similar objects should belong to the same group", the proposed loss trains the neural network for a classification task, enforcing a consistent labelling amongst samples within a class. We design a set of inference strategies tailored towards our algorithm, named Group Loss++ that further improve the results of our model. We show state-of-the-art results on clustering and image retrieval on four retrieval datasets, and present competitive results on two person re-identification datasets, providing a unified framework for retrieval and re-identification.
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习通过利用神经网络获得高度辨别性的特征嵌入，在聚类和图像检索等任务中取得了令人印象深刻的结果，这些特征嵌入可用于将样本分为不同的类别。许多研究致力于设计智能损失函数或用于训练此类网络的数据挖掘策略。大多数方法仅考虑小批量中的样本对或三元组来计算损失函数，这通常基于嵌入之间的距离。我们提出了组损失，这是一种基于可微分标签传播方法的损失函数，该方法强制在组的所有样本之间嵌入相似性，同时在属于不同组的数据点之间提升低密度区域。在“相似对象应该属于同一组”的平滑假设的指导下，所提出的损失训练神经网络进行分类任务，在类内的样本之间强制执行一致的标记。我们设计了一套针对我们的算法量身定制的推理策略，名为 Group Loss++，可进一步改进我们的模型结果。我们在四个检索数据集上展示了聚类和图像检索的最新结果，并在两人重新识别数据集上呈现了有竞争力的结果，为检索和重新识别提供了统一的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Group Loss++的损失函数，用于改进深度度量学习中的特征嵌入，以提升聚类和图像检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅基于小批量样本的二元组或三元组计算损失，难以捕捉全局数据结构，而本文通过标签传播方法强化组内相似性与组间分离性。
AI.method: 设计基于可微标签传播的Group Loss，强制组内嵌入相似性并促进不同组的低密度区域；进一步提出Group Loss++策略优化推理过程。
AI.result: 在四个检索数据集上达到最先进水平，在两个行人重识别数据集上表现竞争力，提供统一的检索与重识别框架。
AI.conclusion: Group Loss++通过全局结构建模和标签一致性约束，有效提升了聚类与图像检索任务的性能。

search_text: The Group Loss++: A deeper look into group loss for deep metric learning 组损失++：深入研究深度度量学习的组损失 Deep metric learning has yielded impressive results in tasks such as clustering and image retrieval by leveraging neural networks to obtain highly discriminative feature embeddings, which can be used to group samples into different classes. Much research has been devoted to the design of smart loss functions or data mining strategies for training such networks. Most methods consider only pairs or triplets of samples within a mini-batch to compute the loss function, which is commonly based on the distance between embeddings. We propose Group Loss, a loss function based on a differentiable label-propagation method that enforces embedding similarity across all samples of a group while promoting, at the same time, low-density regions amongst data points belonging to different groups. Guided by the smoothness assumption that "similar objects should belong to the same group", the proposed loss trains the neural network for a classification task, enforcing a consistent labelling amongst samples within a class. We design a set of inference strategies tailored towards our algorithm, named Group Loss++ that further improve the results of our model. We show state-of-the-art results on clustering and image retrieval on four retrieval datasets, and present competitive results on two person re-identification datasets, providing a unified framework for retrieval and re-identification. 深度度量学习通过利用神经网络获得高度辨别性的特征嵌入，在聚类和图像检索等任务中取得了令人印象深刻的结果，这些特征嵌入可用于将样本分为不同的类别。许多研究致力于设计智能损失函数或用于训练此类网络的数据挖掘策略。大多数方法仅考虑小批量中的样本对或三元组来计算损失函数，这通常基于嵌入之间的距离。我们提出了组损失，这是一种基于可微分标签传播方法的损失函数，该方法强制在组的所有样本之间嵌入相似性，同时在属于不同组的数据点之间提升低密度区域。在“相似对象应该属于同一组”的平滑假设的指导下，所提出的损失训练神经网络进行分类任务，在类内的样本之间强制执行一致的标记。我们设计了一套针对我们的算法量身定制的推理策略，名为 Group Loss++，可进一步改进我们的模型结果。我们在四个检索数据集上展示了聚类和图像检索的最新结果，并在两人重新识别数据集上呈现了有竞争力的结果，为检索和重新识别提供了统一的框架。 本文提出了一种名为Group Loss++的损失函数，用于改进深度度量学习中的特征嵌入，以提升聚类和图像检索性能。 Ismail Elezi,Jenny Seidenschwarz,Laurin Wagner,Sebastiano Vascon,Alessandro Torcinovich,Marcello Pelillo,Laura Leal-Taixe cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ming Liu,Jianan Pan,Zifei Yan,Wangmeng Zuo,Lei Zhang
title: Adaptive Network Combination for Single-Image Reflection Removal: A Domain Generalization Perspective
title_zh: 用于单图像反射去除的自适应网络组合：领域泛化视角
abstract: Recently, multiple synthetic and real-world datasets have been built to facilitate the training of deep single image reflection removal (SIRR) models. Meanwhile, diverse testing sets are also provided with different types of reflection and scenes. However, the non-negligible domain gaps between training and testing sets make it difficult to learn deep models generalizing well to testing images. The diversity of reflections and scenes further makes it a mission impossible to learn a single model being effective to all testing sets and real-world reflections. In this paper, we tackle these issues by learning SIRR models from a domain generalization perspective. Particularly, for each source set, a specific SIRR model is trained to serve as a domain expert of relevant reflection types. For a given reflection-contaminated image, we present a reflection type-aware weighting (RTAW) module to predict expert-wise weights. RTAW can then be incorporated with adaptive network combination (AdaNEC) for handling different reflection types and scenes, i.e., generalizing to unknown domains. Two representative AdaNEC methods, i.e., output fusion (OF) and network interpolation (NI), are provided by considering both adaptation levels and efficiency. For images from one source set, we train RTAW to only predict expert-wise weights of other domain experts for improving generalization ability, while the weights of all experts are predicted and employed during testing. An in-domain expert (IDE) loss is presented for training RTAW. Extensive experiments show the appealing performance gain of our AdaNEC on different state-of-the-art SIRR networks. Source code and pre-trained models will available at https://github.com/csmliu/AdaNEC.
summary: Recently, multiple synthetic and real-world datasets have been built to facilitate the training of deep single image reflection removal (SIRR) models. Meanwhile, diverse testing sets are also provided with different types of reflection and scenes. However, the non-negligible domain gaps between training and testing sets make it difficult to learn deep models generalizing well to testing images. The diversity of reflections and scenes further makes it a mission impossible to learn a single model being effective to all testing sets and real-world reflections. In this paper, we tackle these issues by learning SIRR models from a domain generalization perspective. Particularly, for each source set, a specific SIRR model is trained to serve as a domain expert of relevant reflection types. For a given reflection-contaminated image, we present a reflection type-aware weighting (RTAW) module to predict expert-wise weights. RTAW can then be incorporated with adaptive network combination (AdaNEC) for handling different reflection types and scenes, i.e., generalizing to unknown domains. Two representative AdaNEC methods, i.e., output fusion (OF) and network interpolation (NI), are provided by considering both adaptation levels and efficiency. For images from one source set, we train RTAW to only predict expert-wise weights of other domain experts for improving generalization ability, while the weights of all experts are predicted and employed during testing. An in-domain expert (IDE) loss is presented for training RTAW. Extensive experiments show the appealing performance gain of our AdaNEC on different state-of-the-art SIRR networks. Source code and pre-trained models will available at https://github.com/csmliu/AdaNEC.
abstract_zh: 最近，已经建立了多个合成和真实数据集，以促进深度单图像反射去除（SIRR）模型的训练。同时，还提供了不同的测试集，不同类型的反射和场景。然而，训练集和测试集之间不可忽视的领域差距使得学习能够很好地泛化到测试图像的深度模型变得困难。反射和场景的多样性进一步使得学习对所有测试集和现实世界反射都有效的单一模型成为不可能的任务。在本文中，我们通过从领域泛化的角度学习 SIRR 模型来解决这些问题。特别地，对于每个源集，训练特定的 SIRR 模型以充当相关反射类型的领域专家。对于给定的反射污染图像，我们提出了反射类型感知加权（RTAW）模块来预测专家明智的权重。然后，RTAW 可以与自适应网络组合 (AdaNEC) 相结合，以处理不同的反射类型和场景，即推广到未知域。考虑适应水平和效率，提供了两种代表性的 AdaNEC 方法，即输出融合（OF）和网络插值（NI）。对于来自一个源集的图像，我们训练 RTAW 仅预测其他领域专家的专家权重，以提高泛化能力，而所有专家的权重都在测试过程中预测和使用。提出了用于训练 RTAW 的领域内专家 (IDE) 损失。大量的实验表明，我们的 AdaNEC 在不同的最先进的 SIRR 网络上具有引人注目的性能增益。源代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/csmliu/AdaNEC 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域泛化的自适应网络组合方法，解决单图像反射去除模型在训练集与测试集间存在领域差异时的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SIRR模型因训练与测试集的领域差异及反射场景多样性，难以有效泛化到未知领域，需提升模型跨域适应能力。
AI.method: 为每个源数据集训练特定领域专家模型，结合反射类型感知加权模块（RTAW）预测专家权重，并采用输出融合与网络插值两种自适应网络组合方法（AdaNEC），通过引入领域内专家损失优化权重预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，AdaNEC方法在多个SIRR网络上显著提升性能，代码与预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域专家模型组合与自适应权重预测，本文方法有效解决了SIRR模型的跨域泛化问题，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Felix Staudigl,Karl J. X. Sturm,Maximilian Bartel,Thorben Fetz,Dominik Sisejkovic,Jan Moritz Joseph,Leticia Bolzani Pöhls,Rainer Leupers
title: X-Fault: Impact of Faults on Binary Neural Networks in Memristor-Crossbar Arrays with Logic-in-Memory Computation
title_zh: X-Fault：故障对具有内存逻辑计算的忆阻器交叉阵列中的二元神经网络的影响
abstract: Memristor-based crossbar arrays represent a promising emerging memory technology to replace conventional memories by offering a high density and enabling computing-in-memory (CIM) paradigms. While analog computing provides the best performance, non-idealities and ADC/DAC conversion limit memristor-based CIM. Logic-in-Memory (LIM) presents another flavor of CIM, in which the memristors are used in a binary manner to implement logic gates. Since binary neural networks (BNNs) use binary logic gates as the dominant operation, they can benefit from the massively parallel execution of binary operations and better resilience to variations of the memristors. Although conventional neural networks have been thoroughly investigated, the impact of faults on memristor-based BNNs remains unclear. Therefore, we analyze the impact of faults on logic gates in memristor-based crossbar arrays for BNNs. We propose a simulation framework that simulates different traditional faults to examine the accuracy loss of BNNs on memristive crossbar arrays. In addition, we compare different logic families based on the robustness and feasibility to accelerate AI applications.
summary: Memristor-based crossbar arrays represent a promising emerging memory technology to replace conventional memories by offering a high density and enabling computing-in-memory (CIM) paradigms. While analog computing provides the best performance, non-idealities and ADC/DAC conversion limit memristor-based CIM. Logic-in-Memory (LIM) presents another flavor of CIM, in which the memristors are used in a binary manner to implement logic gates. Since binary neural networks (BNNs) use binary logic gates as the dominant operation, they can benefit from the massively parallel execution of binary operations and better resilience to variations of the memristors. Although conventional neural networks have been thoroughly investigated, the impact of faults on memristor-based BNNs remains unclear. Therefore, we analyze the impact of faults on logic gates in memristor-based crossbar arrays for BNNs. We propose a simulation framework that simulates different traditional faults to examine the accuracy loss of BNNs on memristive crossbar arrays. In addition, we compare different logic families based on the robustness and feasibility to accelerate AI applications.
abstract_zh: 基于忆阻器的交叉阵列代表了一种有前途的新兴内存技术，通过提供高密度和支持内存计算 (CIM) 范例来取代传统内存。虽然模拟计算提供了最佳性能，但非理想性和 ADC/DAC 转换限制了基于忆阻器的 CIM。内存逻辑 (LIM) 呈现了 CIM 的另一种风格，其中忆阻器以二进制方式使用来实现逻辑门。由于二元神经网络 (BNN) 使用二元逻辑门作为主要运算，因此它们可以受益于二元运算的大规模并行执行以及对忆阻器变化的更好恢复能力。尽管传统神经网络已被彻底研究，但故障对基于忆阻器的 BNN 的影响仍不清楚。因此，我们分析了故障对基于忆阻器的 BNN 交叉阵列中逻辑门的影响。我们提出了一个模拟框架来模拟不同的传统故障，以检查忆阻交叉阵列上 BNN 的精度损失。此外，我们还根据加速人工智能应用的鲁棒性和可行性来比较不同的逻辑系列。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于忆阻器交叉阵列的二进制神经网络（BNN）中故障对逻辑门的影响。
AI.motivation: 忆阻器交叉阵列作为计算存储一体化（CIM）的一种新兴技术，具有高密度和并行计算的优势，但其在二进制神经网络中的故障影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种仿真框架，用于模拟不同类型的故障，并评估这些故障对BNN在忆阻器交叉阵列中的准确性影响。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，不同的逻辑门家族在应对忆阻器交叉阵列中的故障时表现出不同的鲁棒性和可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文的分析为加速AI应用中的忆阻器交叉阵列设计提供了重要参考，并揭示了二进制神经网络在逻辑门故障下的表现特性。

search_text: X-Fault: Impact of Faults on Binary Neural Networks in Memristor-Crossbar Arrays with Logic-in-Memory Computation X-Fault：故障对具有内存逻辑计算的忆阻器交叉阵列中的二元神经网络的影响 Memristor-based crossbar arrays represent a promising emerging memory technology to replace conventional memories by offering a high density and enabling computing-in-memory (CIM) paradigms. While analog computing provides the best performance, non-idealities and ADC/DAC conversion limit memristor-based CIM. Logic-in-Memory (LIM) presents another flavor of CIM, in which the memristors are used in a binary manner to implement logic gates. Since binary neural networks (BNNs) use binary logic gates as the dominant operation, they can benefit from the massively parallel execution of binary operations and better resilience to variations of the memristors. Although conventional neural networks have been thoroughly investigated, the impact of faults on memristor-based BNNs remains unclear. Therefore, we analyze the impact of faults on logic gates in memristor-based crossbar arrays for BNNs. We propose a simulation framework that simulates different traditional faults to examine the accuracy loss of BNNs on memristive crossbar arrays. In addition, we compare different logic families based on the robustness and feasibility to accelerate AI applications. 基于忆阻器的交叉阵列代表了一种有前途的新兴内存技术，通过提供高密度和支持内存计算 (CIM) 范例来取代传统内存。虽然模拟计算提供了最佳性能，但非理想性和 ADC/DAC 转换限制了基于忆阻器的 CIM。内存逻辑 (LIM) 呈现了 CIM 的另一种风格，其中忆阻器以二进制方式使用来实现逻辑门。由于二元神经网络 (BNN) 使用二元逻辑门作为主要运算，因此它们可以受益于二元运算的大规模并行执行以及对忆阻器变化的更好恢复能力。尽管传统神经网络已被彻底研究，但故障对基于忆阻器的 BNN 的影响仍不清楚。因此，我们分析了故障对基于忆阻器的 BNN 交叉阵列中逻辑门的影响。我们提出了一个模拟框架来模拟不同的传统故障，以检查忆阻交叉阵列上 BNN 的精度损失。此外，我们还根据加速人工智能应用的鲁棒性和可行性来比较不同的逻辑系列。 本文研究了基于忆阻器交叉阵列的二进制神经网络（BNN）中故障对逻辑门的影响。 Felix Staudigl,Karl J. X. Sturm,Maximilian Bartel,Thorben Fetz,Dominik Sisejkovic,Jan Moritz Joseph,Leticia Bolzani Pöhls,Rainer Leupers cs.ET

authors_text: Claudio S. Pinhanez,German H. Flores,Marisa A. Vasconcelos,Mu Qiao,Nick Linck,Rogério de Paula,Yuya J. Ong
title: Towards a New Science of Disinformation
title_zh: 迈向虚假信息的新科学
abstract: How can we best address the dangerous impact that deep learning-generated fake audios, photographs, and videos (a.k.a. deepfakes) may have in personal and societal life? We foresee that the availability of cheap deepfake technology will create a second wave of disinformation where people will receive specific, personalized disinformation through different channels, making the current approaches to fight disinformation obsolete. We argue that fake media has to be seen as an upcoming cybersecurity problem, and we have to shift from combating its spread to a prevention and cure framework where users have available ways to verify, challenge, and argue against the veracity of each piece of media they are exposed to. To create the technologies behind this framework, we propose that a new Science of Disinformation is needed, one which creates a theoretical framework both for the processes of communication and consumption of false content. Key scientific and technological challenges facing this research agenda are listed and discussed in the light of state-of-art technologies for fake media generation and detection, argument finding and construction, and how to effectively engage users in the prevention and cure processes.
summary: How can we best address the dangerous impact that deep learning-generated fake audios, photographs, and videos (a.k.a. deepfakes) may have in personal and societal life? We foresee that the availability of cheap deepfake technology will create a second wave of disinformation where people will receive specific, personalized disinformation through different channels, making the current approaches to fight disinformation obsolete. We argue that fake media has to be seen as an upcoming cybersecurity problem, and we have to shift from combating its spread to a prevention and cure framework where users have available ways to verify, challenge, and argue against the veracity of each piece of media they are exposed to. To create the technologies behind this framework, we propose that a new Science of Disinformation is needed, one which creates a theoretical framework both for the processes of communication and consumption of false content. Key scientific and technological challenges facing this research agenda are listed and discussed in the light of state-of-art technologies for fake media generation and detection, argument finding and construction, and how to effectively engage users in the prevention and cure processes.
abstract_zh: 我们如何才能最好地解决深度学习生成的虚假音频、照片和视频（又名深度伪造）可能对个人和社会生活产生的危险影响？我们预见，廉价的深度造假技术的出现将引发第二波虚假信息，人们将通过不同渠道收到特定的、个性化的虚假信息，从而使当前打击虚假信息的方法变得过时。我们认为，虚假媒体必须被视为即将到来的网络安全问题，我们必须从打击其传播转向预防和治疗框架，在该框架中，用户可以通过多种方式来验证、质疑和反驳他们所接触到的每条媒体的真实性。为了创建这个框架背后的技术，我们建议需要一门新的虚假信息科学，它为虚假内容的传播和消费过程创建一个理论框架。根据虚假媒体生成和检测、论证发现和构建的最先进技术，以及如何有效地让用户参与预防和治疗过程，列出并讨论了该研究议程面临的关键科学和技术挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出应对深度伪造技术引发的虚假信息问题，需构建新的‘虚假信息科学’理论框架。
AI.motivation: 当前反虚假信息方法难以应对深度伪造技术带来的个性化、精准化传播挑战，需从预防和治理角度重构应对体系。
AI.method: 通过分析深度伪造生成与检测技术现状，提出融合传播学、计算机科学和社会学的跨学科研究框架，重点解决内容验证、用户参与及论证构建等关键技术问题。
AI.result: 明确了虚假信息科学研究的核心挑战，包括生成检测技术瓶颈、用户认知干预机制及多模态内容验证体系构建。
AI.conclusion: 必须建立包含技术预防、用户教育和社交验证的综合体系，通过跨学科研究应对深度伪造带来的新型信息危机。

authors_text: Caleb Kruse,Edward Boyda,Sully Chen,Krishna Karra,Tristan Bou-Nahra,Dan Hammer,Jennifer Mathis,Taylor Maddalene,Jenna Jambeck,Fabien Laurier
title: Satellite Monitoring of Terrestrial Plastic Waste
title_zh: 陆地塑料废物的卫星监测
abstract: Plastic waste is a significant environmental pollutant that is difficult to monitor. We created a system of neural networks to analyze spectral, spatial, and temporal components of Sentinel-2 satellite data to identify terrestrial aggregations of waste. The system works at continental scale. We evaluated performance in Indonesia and detected 374 waste aggregations, more than double the number of sites found in public databases. The same system deployed across twelve countries in Southeast Asia identifies 996 subsequently confirmed waste sites. For each detected site, we algorithmically monitor waste site footprints through time and cross-reference other datasets to generate physical and social metadata. 19% of detected waste sites are located within 200 m of a waterway. Numerous sites sit directly on riverbanks, with high risk of ocean leakage.
summary: Plastic waste is a significant environmental pollutant that is difficult to monitor. We created a system of neural networks to analyze spectral, spatial, and temporal components of Sentinel-2 satellite data to identify terrestrial aggregations of waste. The system works at continental scale. We evaluated performance in Indonesia and detected 374 waste aggregations, more than double the number of sites found in public databases. The same system deployed across twelve countries in Southeast Asia identifies 996 subsequently confirmed waste sites. For each detected site, we algorithmically monitor waste site footprints through time and cross-reference other datasets to generate physical and social metadata. 19% of detected waste sites are located within 200 m of a waterway. Numerous sites sit directly on riverbanks, with high risk of ocean leakage.
abstract_zh: 塑料废物是一种难以监测的重要环境污染物。我们创建了一个神经网络系统来分析 Sentinel-2 卫星数据的光谱、空间和时间成分，以识别陆地上的废物聚集情况。该系统在大陆范围内运行。我们评估了印度尼西亚的表现，发现了 374 个废物聚集点，是公共数据库中发现的站点数量的两倍多。在东南亚 12 个国家部署的同一系统识别了 996 个随后确认的垃圾场。对于每个检测到的站点，我们通过算法监控垃圾场随时间的足迹，并交叉引用其他数据集以生成物理和社会元数据。 19% 的检测到的废物点位于距离水道 200 m 以内。许多地点直接坐落在河岸上，海洋泄漏的风险很高。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于Sentinel-2卫星数据的神经网络系统，用于在大陆尺度上监测陆地塑料废弃物聚集区。
AI.motivation: 塑料废弃物是难以监测的严重环境污染物，现有公开数据库的监测结果存在显著遗漏，需更高效的监测方法。
AI.method: 构建神经网络系统，综合分析Sentinel-2卫星数据的光谱、空间和时间特征，实现大范围自动检测，并通过多数据集交叉验证生成元数据。
AI.result: 在印尼检测到374处废弃物点（是公开数据库的2倍以上），东南亚12国共确认996处站点，其中19%位于距水道200米内，存在海洋泄漏风险。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效提升了塑料废弃物监测能力，揭示了废弃物与水体的空间关联性，为污染防控提供了关键数据支持。

ai_content_json.method: 构建神经网络系统，综合分析Sentinel-2卫星数据的光谱、空间和时间特征，实现大范围自动检测，并通过多数据集交叉验证生成元数据。
ai_content_json.result: 在印尼检测到374处废弃物点（是公开数据库的2倍以上），东南亚12国共确认996处站点，其中19%位于距水道200米内，存在海洋泄漏风险。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该系统有效提升了塑料废弃物监测能力，揭示了废弃物与水体的空间关联性，为污染防控提供了关键数据支持。

search_text: Satellite Monitoring of Terrestrial Plastic Waste 陆地塑料废物的卫星监测 Plastic waste is a significant environmental pollutant that is difficult to monitor. We created a system of neural networks to analyze spectral, spatial, and temporal components of Sentinel-2 satellite data to identify terrestrial aggregations of waste. The system works at continental scale. We evaluated performance in Indonesia and detected 374 waste aggregations, more than double the number of sites found in public databases. The same system deployed across twelve countries in Southeast Asia identifies 996 subsequently confirmed waste sites. For each detected site, we algorithmically monitor waste site footprints through time and cross-reference other datasets to generate physical and social metadata. 19% of detected waste sites are located within 200 m of a waterway. Numerous sites sit directly on riverbanks, with high risk of ocean leakage. 塑料废物是一种难以监测的重要环境污染物。我们创建了一个神经网络系统来分析 Sentinel-2 卫星数据的光谱、空间和时间成分，以识别陆地上的废物聚集情况。该系统在大陆范围内运行。我们评估了印度尼西亚的表现，发现了 374 个废物聚集点，是公共数据库中发现的站点数量的两倍多。在东南亚 12 个国家部署的同一系统识别了 996 个随后确认的垃圾场。对于每个检测到的站点，我们通过算法监控垃圾场随时间的足迹，并交叉引用其他数据集以生成物理和社会元数据。 19% 的检测到的废物点位于距离水道 200 m 以内。许多地点直接坐落在河岸上，海洋泄漏的风险很高。 该论文提出了一种基于Sentinel-2卫星数据的神经网络系统，用于在大陆尺度上监测陆地塑料废弃物聚集区。 Caleb Kruse,Edward Boyda,Sully Chen,Krishna Karra,Tristan Bou-Nahra,Dan Hammer,Jennifer Mathis,Taylor Maddalene,Jenna Jambeck,Fabien Laurier cs.CY,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Qiuhong Shen,Lei Qiao,Jinyang Guo,Peixia Li,Xin Li,Bo Li,Weitao Feng,Weihao Gan,Wei Wu,Wanli Ouyang
title: Unsupervised Learning of Accurate Siamese Tracking
title_zh: 精确连体跟踪的无监督学习
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, to appear in CVPR 2022
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures, to appear in CVPR 2022
abstract: Unsupervised learning has been popular in various computer vision tasks, including visual object tracking. However, prior unsupervised tracking approaches rely heavily on spatial supervision from template-search pairs and are still unable to track objects with strong variation over a long time span. As unlimited self-supervision signals can be obtained by tracking a video along a cycle in time, we investigate evolving a Siamese tracker by tracking videos forward-backward. We present a novel unsupervised tracking framework, in which we can learn temporal correspondence both on the classification branch and regression branch. Specifically, to propagate reliable template feature in the forward propagation process so that the tracker can be trained in the cycle, we first propose a consistency propagation transformation. We then identify an ill-posed penalty problem in conventional cycle training in backward propagation process. Thus, a differentiable region mask is proposed to select features as well as to implicitly penalize tracking errors on intermediate frames. Moreover, since noisy labels may degrade training, we propose a mask-guided loss reweighting strategy to assign dynamic weights based on the quality of pseudo labels. In extensive experiments, our tracker outperforms preceding unsupervised methods by a substantial margin, performing on par with supervised methods on large-scale datasets such as TrackingNet and LaSOT. Code is available at https://github.com/FlorinShum/ULAST.
summary: Unsupervised learning has been popular in various computer vision tasks, including visual object tracking. However, prior unsupervised tracking approaches rely heavily on spatial supervision from template-search pairs and are still unable to track objects with strong variation over a long time span. As unlimited self-supervision signals can be obtained by tracking a video along a cycle in time, we investigate evolving a Siamese tracker by tracking videos forward-backward. We present a novel unsupervised tracking framework, in which we can learn temporal correspondence both on the classification branch and regression branch. Specifically, to propagate reliable template feature in the forward propagation process so that the tracker can be trained in the cycle, we first propose a consistency propagation transformation. We then identify an ill-posed penalty problem in conventional cycle training in backward propagation process. Thus, a differentiable region mask is proposed to select features as well as to implicitly penalize tracking errors on intermediate frames. Moreover, since noisy labels may degrade training, we propose a mask-guided loss reweighting strategy to assign dynamic weights based on the quality of pseudo labels. In extensive experiments, our tracker outperforms preceding unsupervised methods by a substantial margin, performing on par with supervised methods on large-scale datasets such as TrackingNet and LaSOT. Code is available at https://github.com/FlorinShum/ULAST.
abstract_zh: 无监督学习在各种计算机视觉任务中很流行，包括视觉对象跟踪。然而，现有的无监督跟踪方法严重依赖于模板搜索对的空间监督，并且仍然无法跟踪长时间跨度内变化较大的对象。由于通过沿时间周期跟踪视频可以获得无限的自我监督信号，因此我们研究通过向前向后跟踪视频来进化暹罗跟踪器。我们提出了一种新颖的无监督跟踪框架，在该框架中我们可以学习分类分支和回归分支上的时间对应关系。具体来说，为了在前向传播过程中传播可靠的模板特征，以便跟踪器能够在循环中得到训练，我们首先提出了一致性传播变换。然后，我们在反向传播过程中识别传统循环训练中的不适定惩罚问题。因此，提出了可微分区域掩模来选择特征以及隐式惩罚中间帧上的跟踪误差。此外，由于噪声标签可能会降低训练效果，因此我们提出了一种掩模引导的损失重新加权策略，以根据伪标签的质量分配动态权重。在广泛的实验中，我们的跟踪器在很大程度上优于之前的无监督方法，在大型数据集（例如 TrackingNet 和 LaSOT）上的性能与有监督方法相当。代码可在 https://github.com/FlorinShum/ULAST 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督学习的Siamese跟踪框架，通过前后向视频跟踪循环学习时序对应关系，解决长期强变化目标跟踪问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督跟踪方法依赖模板-搜索区域的空间监督，难以处理长时间跨度的强变化目标，而循环跟踪可提供无限自监督信号。
AI.method: 提出一致性传播变换确保前向传播特征可靠性，设计可微区域掩码解决反向传播中的病态惩罚问题，并采用掩码引导的损失重加权策略提升伪标签质量。
AI.result: 在TrackingNet和LaSOT等大规模数据集上，该跟踪器显著优于现有无监督方法，性能与监督方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过循环跟踪机制和多分支时序对应学习，该框架有效解决了无监督跟踪中的长期变化难题，实现了与监督方法竞争的性能。

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Mohammadreza Fani Sani,Mozhgan Vazifehdoostirani,Gyunam Park,Marco Pegoraro,Sebastiaan J. van Zelst,Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: Event Log Sampling for Predictive Monitoring
title_zh: 用于预测监控的事件日志采样
abstract: Predictive process monitoring is a subfield of process mining that aims to estimate case or event features for running process instances. Such predictions are of significant interest to the process stakeholders. However, state-of-the-art methods for predictive monitoring require the training of complex machine learning models, which is often inefficient. This paper proposes an instance selection procedure that allows sampling training process instances for prediction models. We show that our sampling method allows for a significant increase of training speed for next activity prediction methods while maintaining reliable levels of prediction accuracy.
summary: Predictive process monitoring is a subfield of process mining that aims to estimate case or event features for running process instances. Such predictions are of significant interest to the process stakeholders. However, state-of-the-art methods for predictive monitoring require the training of complex machine learning models, which is often inefficient. This paper proposes an instance selection procedure that allows sampling training process instances for prediction models. We show that our sampling method allows for a significant increase of training speed for next activity prediction methods while maintaining reliable levels of prediction accuracy.
abstract_zh: 预测流程监控是流程挖掘的一个子领域，旨在估计正在运行的流程实例的案例或事件特征。流程利益相关者对此类预测非常感兴趣。然而，最先进的预测监测方法需要训练复杂的机器学习模型，而这通常效率低下。本文提出了一种实例选择程序，允许对预测模型的训练过程实例进行采样。我们表明，我们的采样方法可以显着提高下一个活动预测方法的训练速度，同时保持可靠的预测精度水平。

AI.tldr: 提出一种事件日志采样方法以优化预测监控中的训练过程
AI.motivation: 现有预测监控方法依赖复杂模型训练，效率低下，需提高训练速度而不牺牲准确性
AI.method: 提出实例选择程序，通过采样训练实例来减少计算负担
AI.result: 实验显示该方法显著提升训练速度，同时保持可靠预测准确率
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡训练速度与准确性，为预测监控提供高效解决方案

authors_text: Claas Voelcker,Victor Liao,Animesh Garg,Amir-massoud Farahmand
title: Value Gradient weighted Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 值梯度加权基于模型的强化学习
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) is a sample efficient technique to obtain control policies, yet unavoidable modeling errors often lead performance deterioration. The model in MBRL is often solely fitted to reconstruct dynamics, state observations in particular, while the impact of model error on the policy is not captured by the training objective. This leads to a mismatch between the intended goal of MBRL, enabling good policy and value learning, and the target of the loss function employed in practice, future state prediction. Naive intuition would suggest that value-aware model learning would fix this problem and, indeed, several solutions to this objective mismatch problem have been proposed based on theoretical analysis. However, they tend to be inferior in practice to commonly used maximum likelihood (MLE) based approaches. In this paper we propose the Value-gradient weighted Model Learning (VaGraM), a novel method for value-aware model learning which improves the performance of MBRL in challenging settings, such as small model capacity and the presence of distracting state dimensions. We analyze both MLE and value-aware approaches and demonstrate how they fail to account for exploration and the behavior of function approximation when learning value-aware models and highlight the additional goals that must be met to stabilize optimization in the deep learning setting. We verify our analysis by showing that our loss function is able to achieve high returns on the Mujoco benchmark suite while being more robust than maximum likelihood based approaches.
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) is a sample efficient technique to obtain control policies, yet unavoidable modeling errors often lead performance deterioration. This leads to a mismatch between the intended goal of MBRL, enabling good policy and value learning, and the target of the loss function employed in practice, future state prediction. Naive intuition would suggest that value-aware model learning would fix this problem and, indeed, several solutions to this objective mismatch problem have been proposed based on theoretical analysis. However, they tend to be inferior in practice to commonly used maximum likelihood (MLE) based approaches. In this paper we propose the Value-gradient weighted Model Learning (VaGraM), a novel method for value-aware model learning which improves the performance of MBRL in challenging settings, such as small model capacity and the presence of distracting state dimensions. We analyze both MLE and value-aware approaches and demonstrate how they fail to account for exploration and the behavior of function approximation when learning value-aware models and highlight the additional goals that must be met to stabilize optimization in the deep learning setting. We verify our analysis by showing that our loss function is able to achieve high returns on the Mujoco benchmark suite while being more robust than maximum likelihood based approaches.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）是一种获取控制策略的有效技术，但不可避免的建模错误通常会导致性能下降。 MBRL 中的模型通常仅适合重建动态，特别是状态观察，而模型误差对策略的影响并未被训练目标捕获。这导致 MBRL 的预期目标（实现良好的政策和价值学习）与实践中使用的损失函数的目标（未来状态预测）之间不匹配。天真的直觉表明，价值感知模型学习可以解决这个问题，事实上，基于理论分析，已经提出了针对这个目标不匹配问题的几种解决方案。然而，它们在实践中往往不如常用的基于最大似然 (MLE) 的方法。在本文中，我们提出了价值梯度加权模型学习（VaGraM），这是一种价值感知模型学习的新方法，它可以提高 MBRL 在具有挑战性的环境中的性能，例如小模型容量和分散注意力的状态维度的存在。我们分析了 MLE 和价值感知方法，并展示了它们在学习价值感知模型时如何无法解释探索和函数逼近的行为，并强调了在深度学习环境中稳定优化必须满足的额外目标。我们通过证明我们的损失函数能够在 Mujoco 基准套件上实现高回报来验证我们的分析，同时比基于最大似然的方法更稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于价值梯度加权的模型学习方法VaGraM，旨在提高模型基于强化学习（MBRL）在复杂环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的MBRL方法在训练模型时，通常仅关注状态转移的预测，而忽略了模型误差对策略的影响，导致策略性能下降。虽然已有研究提出价值感知模型学习方法，但在实践中效果不如最大似然估计（MLE）方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的价值感知模型学习方法VaGraM，通过将价值梯度引入模型学习的目标函数中，从而在训练过程中更好地考虑策略的优化目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，VaGraM在Mujoco基准测试中表现优异，相较于基于最大似然估计的方法更具鲁棒性，特别是在模型容量较小和存在干扰状态维度的场景中。
AI.conclusion: VaGraM方法通过引入价值梯度加权，有效解决了MBRL中模型误差与策略优化目标之间的不匹配问题，提升了模型在复杂环境中的性能。

search_text: Value Gradient weighted Model-Based Reinforcement Learning 值梯度加权基于模型的强化学习 Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) is a sample efficient technique to obtain control policies, yet unavoidable modeling errors often lead performance deterioration. The model in MBRL is often solely fitted to reconstruct dynamics, state observations in particular, while the impact of model error on the policy is not captured by the training objective. This leads to a mismatch between the intended goal of MBRL, enabling good policy and value learning, and the target of the loss function employed in practice, future state prediction. Naive intuition would suggest that value-aware model learning would fix this problem and, indeed, several solutions to this objective mismatch problem have been proposed based on theoretical analysis. However, they tend to be inferior in practice to commonly used maximum likelihood (MLE) based approaches. In this paper we propose the Value-gradient weighted Model Learning (VaGraM), a novel method for value-aware model learning which improves the performance of MBRL in challenging settings, such as small model capacity and the presence of distracting state dimensions. We analyze both MLE and value-aware approaches and demonstrate how they fail to account for exploration and the behavior of function approximation when learning value-aware models and highlight the additional goals that must be met to stabilize optimization in the deep learning setting. We verify our analysis by showing that our loss function is able to achieve high returns on the Mujoco benchmark suite while being more robust than maximum likelihood based approaches. 基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）是一种获取控制策略的有效技术，但不可避免的建模错误通常会导致性能下降。 MBRL 中的模型通常仅适合重建动态，特别是状态观察，而模型误差对策略的影响并未被训练目标捕获。这导致 MBRL 的预期目标（实现良好的政策和价值学习）与实践中使用的损失函数的目标（未来状态预测）之间不匹配。天真的直觉表明，价值感知模型学习可以解决这个问题，事实上，基于理论分析，已经提出了针对这个目标不匹配问题的几种解决方案。然而，它们在实践中往往不如常用的基于最大似然 (MLE) 的方法。在本文中，我们提出了价值梯度加权模型学习（VaGraM），这是一种价值感知模型学习的新方法，它可以提高 MBRL 在具有挑战性的环境中的性能，例如小模型容量和分散注意力的状态维度的存在。我们分析了 MLE 和价值感知方法，并展示了它们在学习价值感知模型时如何无法解释探索和函数逼近的行为，并强调了在深度学习环境中稳定优化必须满足的额外目标。我们通过证明我们的损失函数能够在 Mujoco 基准套件上实现高回报来验证我们的分析，同时比基于最大似然的方法更稳健。 本文提出了一种基于价值梯度加权的模型学习方法VaGraM，旨在提高模型基于强化学习（MBRL）在复杂环境下的性能。 Claas Voelcker,Victor Liao,Animesh Garg,Amir-massoud Farahmand cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Simon Narduzzi,Siavash A. Bigdeli,Shih-Chii Liu,L. Andrea Dunbar
title: Optimizing the Consumption of Spiking Neural Networks with Activity Regularization
title_zh: 通过活动正则化优化尖峰神经网络的消耗
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures; accepted at IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), Singapore, 2022
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures; accepted at IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), Singapore, 2022
abstract: Reducing energy consumption is a critical point for neural network models running on edge devices. In this regard, reducing the number of multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) running on edge hardware accelerators will reduce the energy consumption during inference. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are an example of bio-inspired techniques that can further save energy by using binary activations, and avoid consuming energy when not spiking. The networks can be configured for equivalent accuracy on a task through DNN-to-SNN conversion frameworks but their conversion is based on rate coding therefore the synaptic operations can be high. In this work, we look into different techniques to enforce sparsity on the neural network activation maps and compare the effect of different training regularizers on the efficiency of the optimized DNNs and SNNs.
summary: Reducing energy consumption is a critical point for neural network models running on edge devices. In this regard, reducing the number of multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) running on edge hardware accelerators will reduce the energy consumption during inference. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are an example of bio-inspired techniques that can further save energy by using binary activations, and avoid consuming energy when not spiking. The networks can be configured for equivalent accuracy on a task through DNN-to-SNN conversion frameworks but their conversion is based on rate coding therefore the synaptic operations can be high. In this work, we look into different techniques to enforce sparsity on the neural network activation maps and compare the effect of different training regularizers on the efficiency of the optimized DNNs and SNNs.
abstract_zh: 降低能耗是在边缘设备上运行的神经网络模型的关键点。在这方面，减少在边缘硬件加速器上运行的深度神经网络（DNN）的乘法累加（MAC）运算的数量将减少推理过程中的能耗。尖峰神经网络（SNN）是仿生技术的一个例子，它可以通过使用二元激活进一步节省能量，并避免在不尖峰时消耗能量。可以通过 DNN 到 SNN 转换框架将网络配置为任务的同等精度，但它们的转换基于速率编码，因此突触操作可能很高。在这项工作中，我们研究了在神经网络激活图上实施稀疏性的不同技术，并比较了不同训练正则化器对优化 DNN 和 SNN 效率的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文通过活动正则化技术优化脉冲神经网络（SNN）的能耗，减少乘加运算（MAC）以提高边缘设备上的推理效率。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备对神经网络的能耗敏感，传统DNN到SNN的转换方法因速率编码导致突触操作过多，需探索更高效的稀疏性优化方案。
AI.method: 研究不同稀疏性技术，比较多种训练正则化方法对DNN和SNN优化效果的影响，以降低MAC操作并保持模型精度。
AI.result: 实验表明，特定正则化方法能有效减少激活图的冗余计算，显著降低SNN的能耗，同时维持与原始DNN相当的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 活动正则化可作为优化SNN能耗的有效手段，为边缘设备部署提供更高效的神经网络模型解决方案。
