authors_text: Seongwon Lee,Hongje Seong,Suhyeon Lee,Euntai Kim
title: Correlation Verification for Image Retrieval
title_zh: 图像检索的相关性验证
abstract: Geometric verification is considered a de facto solution for the re-ranking task in image retrieval. In this study, we propose a novel image retrieval re-ranking network named Correlation Verification Networks (CVNet). Our proposed network, comprising deeply stacked 4D convolutional layers, gradually compresses dense feature correlation into image similarity while learning diverse geometric matching patterns from various image pairs. To enable cross-scale matching, it builds feature pyramids and constructs cross-scale feature correlations within a single inference, replacing costly multi-scale inferences. In addition, we use curriculum learning with the hard negative mining and Hide-and-Seek strategy to handle hard samples without losing generality. Our proposed re-ranking network shows state-of-the-art performance on several retrieval benchmarks with a significant margin (+12.6% in mAP on ROxford-Hard+1M set) over state-of-the-art methods. The source code and models are available online: https://github.com/sungonce/CVNet.
summary: Geometric verification is considered a de facto solution for the re-ranking task in image retrieval. In this study, we propose a novel image retrieval re-ranking network named Correlation Verification Networks (CVNet). Our proposed network, comprising deeply stacked 4D convolutional layers, gradually compresses dense feature correlation into image similarity while learning diverse geometric matching patterns from various image pairs. To enable cross-scale matching, it builds feature pyramids and constructs cross-scale feature correlations within a single inference, replacing costly multi-scale inferences. In addition, we use curriculum learning with the hard negative mining and Hide-and-Seek strategy to handle hard samples without losing generality. Our proposed re-ranking network shows state-of-the-art performance on several retrieval benchmarks with a significant margin (+12.6% in mAP on ROxford-Hard+1M set) over state-of-the-art methods. The source code and models are available online: https://github.com/sungonce/CVNet.
abstract_zh: 几何验证被认为是图像检索中重新排序任务的事实上的解决方案。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的图像检索重排序网络，称为相关验证网络（CVNet）。我们提出的网络由深度堆叠的 4D 卷积层组成，逐渐将密集的特征相关性压缩为图像相似性，同时从各种图像对中学习不同的几何匹配模式。为了实现跨尺度匹配，它构建了特征金字塔并在单个推理中构建了跨尺度特征相关性，取代了昂贵的多尺度推理。此外，我们使用课程学习与困难负面挖掘和隐藏策略来处理困难样本而不失通用性。我们提出的重新排名网络在多个检索基准上显示出最先进的性能，与最先进的方法相比，具有显着的优势（ROxford-Hard+1M 集上的 mAP + 12.6%）。源代码和模型可在线获取：https://github.com/sungonce/CVNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于图像检索重排序任务的相关性验证网络CVNet，通过几何匹配模式学习提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 传统几何验证方法在处理复杂场景和跨尺度匹配时存在效率与泛化性不足的问题，需更高效的重排序方案。
AI.method: 设计包含4D卷积层的CVNet网络，结合特征金字塔实现跨尺度匹配，并采用课程学习与难样本挖掘策略优化模型训练。
AI.result: 在ROxford-Hard+1M等基准数据集上，mAP指标相较现有方法提升12.6%，取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: CVNet通过跨尺度特征相关性建模和样本优化策略有效提升了图像检索重排序效果，代码已开源共享。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种用于图像检索重排序任务的相关性验证网络CVNet，通过几何匹配模式学习提升检索性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统几何验证方法在处理复杂场景和跨尺度匹配时存在效率与泛化性不足的问题，需更高效的重排序方案。
ai_content.method: 设计包含4D卷积层的CVNet网络，结合特征金字塔实现跨尺度匹配，并采用课程学习与难样本挖掘策略优化模型训练。

search_text: Correlation Verification for Image Retrieval 图像检索的相关性验证 Geometric verification is considered a de facto solution for the re-ranking task in image retrieval. In this study, we propose a novel image retrieval re-ranking network named Correlation Verification Networks (CVNet). Our proposed network, comprising deeply stacked 4D convolutional layers, gradually compresses dense feature correlation into image similarity while learning diverse geometric matching patterns from various image pairs. To enable cross-scale matching, it builds feature pyramids and constructs cross-scale feature correlations within a single inference, replacing costly multi-scale inferences. In addition, we use curriculum learning with the hard negative mining and Hide-and-Seek strategy to handle hard samples without losing generality. Our proposed re-ranking network shows state-of-the-art performance on several retrieval benchmarks with a significant margin (+12.6% in mAP on ROxford-Hard+1M set) over state-of-the-art methods. The source code and models are available online: https://github.com/sungonce/CVNet. 几何验证被认为是图像检索中重新排序任务的事实上的解决方案。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的图像检索重排序网络，称为相关验证网络（CVNet）。我们提出的网络由深度堆叠的 4D 卷积层组成，逐渐将密集的特征相关性压缩为图像相似性，同时从各种图像对中学习不同的几何匹配模式。为了实现跨尺度匹配，它构建了特征金字塔并在单个推理中构建了跨尺度特征相关性，取代了昂贵的多尺度推理。此外，我们使用课程学习与困难负面挖掘和隐藏策略来处理困难样本而不失通用性。我们提出的重新排名网络在多个检索基准上显示出最先进的性能，与最先进的方法相比，具有显着的优势（ROxford-Hard+1M 集上的 mAP + 12.6%）。源代码和模型可在线获取：https://github.com/sungonce/CVNet。 本文提出一种用于图像检索重排序任务的相关性验证网络CVNet，通过几何匹配模式学习提升检索性能。 Seongwon Lee,Hongje Seong,Suhyeon Lee,Euntai Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Ziyue Wu,Junyu Gao,Shucheng Huang,Changsheng Xu
title: Learning Commonsense-aware Moment-Text Alignment for Fast Video Temporal Grounding
title_zh: 学习常识性时刻文本对齐以实现快速视频时间接地
comment: Submitted to IEEE TMM; Code is available at https://github.com/ZiyueWu59/CCA
comments: Submitted to IEEE TMM; Code is available at https://github.com/ZiyueWu59/CCA
abstract: Grounding temporal video segments described in natural language queries effectively and efficiently is a crucial capability needed in vision-and-language fields. In this paper, we deal with the fast video temporal grounding (FVTG) task, aiming at localizing the target segment with high speed and favorable accuracy. Most existing approaches adopt elaborately designed cross-modal interaction modules to improve the grounding performance, which suffer from the test-time bottleneck. Although several common space-based methods enjoy the high-speed merit during inference, they can hardly capture the comprehensive and explicit relations between visual and textual modalities. In this paper, to tackle the dilemma of speed-accuracy tradeoff, we propose a commonsense-aware cross-modal alignment (CCA) framework, which incorporates commonsense-guided visual and text representations into a complementary common space for fast video temporal grounding. Specifically, the commonsense concepts are explored and exploited by extracting the structural semantic information from a language corpus. Then, a commonsense-aware interaction module is designed to obtain bridged visual and text features by utilizing the learned commonsense concepts. Finally, to maintain the original semantic information of textual queries, a cross-modal complementary common space is optimized to obtain matching scores for performing FVTG. Extensive results on two challenging benchmarks show that our CCA method performs favorably against state-of-the-arts while running at high speed. Our code is available at https://github.com/ZiyueWu59/CCA.

Most existing approaches adopt elaborately designed cross-modal interaction modules to improve the grounding performance, which suffer from the test-time bottleneck. Although several common space-based methods enjoy the high-speed merit during inference, they can hardly capture the comprehensive and explicit relations between visual and textual modalities. In this paper, to tackle the dilemma of speed-accuracy tradeoff, we propose a commonsense-aware cross-modal alignment (CCA) framework, which incorporates commonsense-guided visual and text representations into a complementary common space for fast video temporal grounding. Specifically, the commonsense concepts are explored and exploited by extracting the structural semantic information from a language corpus. Then, a commonsense-aware interaction module is designed to obtain bridged visual and text features by utilizing the learned commonsense concepts. Finally, to maintain the original semantic information of textual queries, a cross-modal complementary common space is optimized to obtain matching scores for performing FVTG. Extensive results on two challenging benchmarks show that our CCA method performs favorably against state-of-the-arts while running at high speed. Our code is available at https://github.com/ZiyueWu59/CCA.
abstract_zh: 有效且高效地建立自然语言查询中描述的时间视频片段是视觉和语言领域所需的关键能力。在本文中，我们处理快速视频时间接地（FVTG）任务，旨在以高速和良好的精度定位目标片段。大多数现有方法采用精心设计的跨模态交互模块来提高接地性能，但存在测试时间瓶颈。尽管几种常见的基于空间的方法在推理过程中具有高速的优点，但它们很难捕获视觉和文本模态之间的全面和明确的关系。在本文中，为了解决速度与准确性权衡的困境，我们提出了一种常识感知的跨模态对齐（CCA）框架，它将常识引导的视觉和文本表示合并到一个互补的公共空间中，以实现快速视频时间基础。具体来说，通过从语言语料库中提取结构语义信息来探索和利用常识概念。然后，设计一个常识感知交互模块，通过利用学习到的常识概念来获得桥接的视觉和文本特征。最后，为了保持文本查询的原始语义信息，优化跨模态互补公共空间以获得执行 FVTG 的匹配分数。两个具有挑战性的基准测试的广泛结果表明，我们的 CCA 方法在高速运行时的性能优于最先进的方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ZiyueWu59/CCA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于常识的跨模态对齐框架，用于解决快速视频时间定位任务，以在保持高效率的同时提升定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在测试时存在速度瓶颈或难以捕捉视觉与文本的全面关系，导致速度与准确率难以兼顾。
AI.method: 设计常识感知的跨模态对齐（CCA）框架，通过提取语言语料中的结构化语义信息，构建常识引导的视觉与文本表示，并优化跨模态互补公共空间以计算匹配分数。
AI.result: 在两个具有挑战性的基准测试中，CCA方法在保持高速度的同时优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入常识引导的跨模态对齐，本文有效解决了快速视频时间定位中的速度-准确率权衡问题，代码已开源。

authors_text: Suhyeon Lee,Hongje Seong,Seongwon Lee,Euntai Kim
title: WildNet: Learning Domain Generalized Semantic Segmentation from the Wild
title_zh: WildNet：从野外学习领域广义语义分割
abstract: We present a new domain generalized semantic segmentation network named WildNet, which learns domain-generalized features by leveraging a variety of contents and styles from the wild. In domain generalization, the low generalization ability for unseen target domains is clearly due to overfitting to the source domain. To address this problem, previous works have focused on generalizing the domain by removing or diversifying the styles of the source domain. These alleviated overfitting to the source-style but overlooked overfitting to the source-content. In this paper, we propose to diversify both the content and style of the source domain with the help of the wild. Our main idea is for networks to naturally learn domain-generalized semantic information from the wild. To this end, we diversify styles by augmenting source features to resemble wild styles and enable networks to adapt to a variety of styles. Furthermore, we encourage networks to learn class-discriminant features by providing semantic variations borrowed from the wild to source contents in the feature space. Finally, we regularize networks to capture consistent semantic information even when both the content and style of the source domain are extended to the wild. Extensive experiments on five different datasets validate the effectiveness of our WildNet, and we significantly outperform state-of-the-art methods. The source code and model are available online: https://github.com/suhyeonlee/WildNet.
summary: We present a new domain generalized semantic segmentation network named WildNet, which learns domain-generalized features by leveraging a variety of contents and styles from the wild. In domain generalization, the low generalization ability for unseen target domains is clearly due to overfitting to the source domain. To address this problem, previous works have focused on generalizing the domain by removing or diversifying the styles of the source domain. These alleviated overfitting to the source-style but overlooked overfitting to the source-content. In this paper, we propose to diversify both the content and style of the source domain with the help of the wild. Our main idea is for networks to naturally learn domain-generalized semantic information from the wild. To this end, we diversify styles by augmenting source features to resemble wild styles and enable networks to adapt to a variety of styles. Furthermore, we encourage networks to learn class-discriminant features by providing semantic variations borrowed from the wild to source contents in the feature space. Finally, we regularize networks to capture consistent semantic information even when both the content and style of the source domain are extended to the wild. Extensive experiments on five different datasets validate the effectiveness of our WildNet, and we significantly outperform state-of-the-art methods. The source code and model are available online: https://github.com/suhyeonlee/WildNet.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种名为 WildNet 的新领域通用语义分割网络，它通过利用来自野外的各种内容和风格来学习领域通用特征。在域泛化中，对未见过的目标域的泛化能力较低显然是由于对源域的过度拟合造成的。为了解决这个问题，以前的工作主要集中在通过删除源域的样式或使源域的样式多样化来泛化域。这些缓解了对源样式的过度拟合，但忽略了对源内容的过度拟合。在本文中，我们建议在野外的帮助下使源域的内容和风格多样化。我们的主要想法是让网络自然地从野外学习领域通用的语义信息。为此，我们通过增强源特征以类似于野生风格来使风格多样化，并使网络能够适应各种风格。此外，我们鼓励网络通过提供从特征空间中借用的语义变化来学习类判别特征。最后，我们规范网络以捕获一致的语义信息，即使源域的内容和风格都扩展到野外。对五个不同数据集的大量实验验证了我们的 WildNet 的有效性，并且我们的性能显着优于最先进的方法。源代码和模型可在线获取：https://github.com/suhyeonlee/WildNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WildNet，一种通过利用野外数据的多样性和风格来学习领域泛化语义分割的网络。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法过度依赖源域风格，忽视了源域内容的过拟合问题，导致在未见过的目标域上泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 通过增强源域特征以模拟野外风格，并在特征空间中引入野外语义变化，同时正则化网络以捕捉内容和风格扩展后的语义一致性。
AI.result: 在五个不同数据集上的实验验证了WildNet的有效性，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: WildNet通过同时多样化源域内容和风格，有效提升了领域泛化能力，为语义分割任务提供了新思路。

conclusion: WildNet通过同时多样化源域内容和风格，有效提升了领域泛化能力，为语义分割任务提供了新思路。
search_text: WildNet: Learning Domain Generalized Semantic Segmentation from the Wild WildNet：从野外学习领域广义语义分割 We present a new domain generalized semantic segmentation network named WildNet, which learns domain-generalized features by leveraging a variety of contents and styles from the wild. In domain generalization, the low generalization ability for unseen target domains is clearly due to overfitting to the source domain. To address this problem, previous works have focused on generalizing the domain by removing or diversifying the styles of the source domain. These alleviated overfitting to the source-style but overlooked overfitting to the source-content. In this paper, we propose to diversify both the content and style of the source domain with the help of the wild. Our main idea is for networks to naturally learn domain-generalized semantic information from the wild. To this end, we diversify styles by augmenting source features to resemble wild styles and enable networks to adapt to a variety of styles. Furthermore, we encourage networks to learn class-discriminant features by providing semantic variations borrowed from the wild to source contents in the feature space. Finally, we regularize networks to capture consistent semantic information even when both the content and style of the source domain are extended to the wild. Extensive experiments on five different datasets validate the effectiveness of our WildNet, and we significantly outperform state-of-the-art methods. The source code and model are available online: https://github.com/suhyeonlee/WildNet. 我们提出了一种名为 WildNet 的新领域通用语义分割网络，它通过利用来自野外的各种内容和风格来学习领域通用特征。在域泛化中，对未见过的目标域的泛化能力较低显然是由于对源域的过度拟合造成的。为了解决这个问题，以前的工作主要集中在通过删除源域的样式或使源域的样式多样化来泛化域。这些缓解了对源样式的过度拟合，但忽略了对源内容的过度拟合。在本文中，我们建议在野外的帮助下使源域的内容和风格多样化。我们的主要想法是让网络自然地从野外学习领域通用的语义信息。为此，我们通过增强源特征以类似于野生风格来使风格多样化，并使网络能够适应各种风格。此外，我们鼓励网络通过提供从特征空间中借用的语义变化来学习类判别特征。最后，我们规范网络以捕获一致的语义信息，即使源域的内容和风格都扩展到野外。对五个不同数据集的大量实验验证了我们的 WildNet 的有效性，并且我们的性能显着优于最先进的方法。源代码和模型可在线获取：https://github.com/suhyeonlee/WildNet。 本文提出WildNet，一种通过利用野外数据的多样性和风格来学习领域泛化语义分割的网络。 Suhyeon Lee,Hongje Seong,Seongwon Lee,Euntai Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Mansoor Davoodi,Abhishek Senapati,Adam Mertel,Weronika Schlechte-Welnicz,Justin M. Calabrese
title: Optimal Workplace Occupancy Strategies during the COVID-19 Pandemic
title_zh: COVID-19 大流行期间的最佳工作场所占用策略
abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, many organizations (e.g. businesses, companies, government facilities, etc.) have attempted to reduce infection risk by employing partial home office strategies. However, working from home can also reduce productivity for certain types of work and particular employees. Over the long term, many organizations therefore face a need to balance infection risk against productivity. Motivated by this trade-off, we model this situation as a bi-objective optimization problem and propose a practical approach to find trade-off (Pareto optimal) solutions. We present a new probabilistic framework to compute the expected number of infected employees as a function of key parameters including: the incidence level in the neighborhood of the organization, the COVID-19 transmission rate, the number of employees, the percentage of vaccinated employees, the testing frequency, and the contact rate among employees. We implement the model and the optimization algorithm and perform several numerical experiments with different parameter settings. Furthermore, we provide an online application based on the models and algorithms developed in this paper, which can be used to identify the optimal workplace occupancy rate for real-world organizations.
summary: During the COVID-19 pandemic, many organizations (e.g. businesses, companies, government facilities, etc.) have attempted to reduce infection risk by employing partial home office strategies. However, working from home can also reduce productivity for certain types of work and particular employees. Over the long term, many organizations therefore face a need to balance infection risk against productivity. Motivated by this trade-off, we model this situation as a bi-objective optimization problem and propose a practical approach to find trade-off (Pareto optimal) solutions. We present a new probabilistic framework to compute the expected number of infected employees as a function of key parameters including: the incidence level in the neighborhood of the organization, the COVID-19 transmission rate, the number of employees, the percentage of vaccinated employees, the testing frequency, and the contact rate among employees. We implement the model and the optimization algorithm and perform several numerical experiments with different parameter settings. Furthermore, we provide an online application based on the models and algorithms developed in this paper, which can be used to identify the optimal workplace occupancy rate for real-world organizations.
abstract_zh: 在 COVID-19 大流行期间，许多组织（例如企业、公司、政府机构等）尝试通过采用部分家庭办公策略来降低感染风险。然而，在家工作也会降低某些类型的工作和特定员工的生产力。因此，从长远来看，许多组织都需要在感染风险与生产力之间取得平衡。受这种权衡的启发，我们将这种情况建模为双目标优化问题，并提出了一种找到权衡（帕累托最优）解决方案的实用方法。我们提出了一个新的概率框架来计算受感染员工的预期数量，作为关键参数的函数，这些参数包括：组织附近的发病率、COVID-19 传播率、员工数量、接种疫苗的员工百分比、测试频率和员工之间的接触率。我们实现了模型和优化算法，并使用不同的参数设置进行了多次数值实验。此外，我们还提供基于本文开发的模型和算法的在线应用程序，可用于确定现实组织的最佳工作场所占用率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双目标优化方法，通过平衡感染风险与工作效率，确定疫情期间的最佳办公场所占用率策略。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间远程办公虽能降低感染风险，但可能影响部分工作类型和员工的生产力，需在长期中权衡感染风险与工作效率。
AI.method: 构建概率模型计算感染人数，结合疫苗接种率、检测频率等参数，通过双目标优化算法求解帕累托最优解，并开发在线应用工具。
AI.result: 通过数值实验验证模型有效性，开发的在线工具可帮助实际组织确定最优办公占用率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为疫情期间企业平衡健康安全与工作效率提供了量化决策支持，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Sreejan Kumar,Ishita Dasgupta,Nathaniel D. Daw,Jonathan D. Cohen,Thomas L. Griffiths
title: Disentangling Abstraction from Statistical Pattern Matching in Human and Machine Learning
title_zh: 解开人类和机器学习中统计模式匹配的抽象
abstract: The ability to acquire abstract knowledge is a hallmark of human intelligence and is believed by many to be one of the core differences between humans and neural network models. Agents can be endowed with an inductive bias towards abstraction through meta-learning, where they are trained on a distribution of tasks that share some abstract structure that can be learned and applied. However, because neural networks are hard to interpret, it can be difficult to tell whether agents have learned the underlying abstraction, or alternatively statistical patterns that are characteristic of that abstraction. In this work, we compare the performance of humans and agents in a meta-reinforcement learning paradigm in which tasks are generated from abstract rules. We define a novel methodology for building "task metamers" that closely match the statistics of the abstract tasks but use a different underlying generative process, and evaluate performance on both abstract and metamer tasks. We find that humans perform better at abstract tasks than metamer tasks whereas common neural network architectures typically perform worse on the abstract tasks than the matched metamers. This work provides a foundation for characterizing differences between humans and machine learning that can be used in future work towards developing machines with more human-like behavior.
summary: The ability to acquire abstract knowledge is a hallmark of human intelligence and is believed by many to be one of the core differences between humans and neural network models. Agents can be endowed with an inductive bias towards abstraction through meta-learning, where they are trained on a distribution of tasks that share some abstract structure that can be learned and applied. However, because neural networks are hard to interpret, it can be difficult to tell whether agents have learned the underlying abstraction, or alternatively statistical patterns that are characteristic of that abstraction. In this work, we compare the performance of humans and agents in a meta-reinforcement learning paradigm in which tasks are generated from abstract rules. We define a novel methodology for building "task metamers" that closely match the statistics of the abstract tasks but use a different underlying generative process, and evaluate performance on both abstract and metamer tasks. We find that humans perform better at abstract tasks than metamer tasks whereas common neural network architectures typically perform worse on the abstract tasks than the matched metamers. This work provides a foundation for characterizing differences between humans and machine learning that can be used in future work towards developing machines with more human-like behavior.
abstract_zh: 获取抽象知识的能力是人类智能的标志，许多人认为这是人类与神经网络模型之间的核心区别之一。通过元学习，智能体可以被赋予对抽象的归纳偏差，在元学习中，智能体接受共享一些可以学习和应用的抽象结构的任务分布的训练。然而，由于神经网络难以解释，因此很难判断智能体是否已经学习了底层抽象，或者是否学习了该抽象特征的统计模式。在这项工作中，我们比较了元强化学习范式中人类和代理的表现，其中任务是根据抽象规则生成的。我们定义了一种构建“任务同色异体”的新颖方法，该方法与抽象任务的统计数据紧密匹配，但使用不同的底层生成过程，并评估抽象任务和同色异体任务的性能。我们发现人类在抽象任务上的表现比同色异体任务更好，而常见的神经网络架构在抽象任务上的表现通常比匹配的同色异体任务更差。这项工作为描述人类和机器学习之间的差异奠定了基础，可用于未来开发具有更像人类行为的机器的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较人类与机器学习代理在抽象任务和统计匹配任务中的表现，探讨两者在抽象能力与统计模式匹配上的差异。
AI.motivation: 人类智能的核心特征之一是获取抽象知识的能力，而神经网络模型是否具备类似能力尚不明确。需明确区分代理是学习了抽象规则还是仅依赖统计模式。
AI.method: 采用元强化学习范式，设计统计特征匹配但生成机制不同的'任务变体'（task metamers），对比人类与神经网络代理在抽象任务和变体任务中的表现差异。
AI.result: 人类在抽象任务上显著优于变体任务，而主流神经网络架构在抽象任务表现弱于变体任务，显示其更依赖统计模式而非抽象规则。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解人类与机器学习差异提供方法论基础，未来可据此开发更具人类抽象能力的智能系统。

authors_text: Jonathan Jakob,André Artelt,Martina Hasenjäger,Barbara Hammer
title: SAM-kNN Regressor for Online Learning in Water Distribution Networks
title_zh: 用于供水管网在线学习的 SAM-kNN 回归器
abstract: Water distribution networks are a key component of modern infrastructure for housing and industry. They transport and distribute water via widely branched networks from sources to consumers. In order to guarantee a working network at all times, the water supply company continuously monitors the network and takes actions when necessary -- e.g. reacting to leakages, sensor faults and drops in water quality. Since real world networks are too large and complex to be monitored by a human, algorithmic monitoring systems have been developed. A popular type of such systems are residual based anomaly detection systems that can detect events such as leakages and sensor faults. For a continuous high quality monitoring, it is necessary for these systems to adapt to changed demands and presence of various anomalies. In this work, we propose an adaption of the incremental SAM-kNN classifier for regression to build a residual based anomaly detection system for water distribution networks that is able to adapt to any kind of change.
summary: Water distribution networks are a key component of modern infrastructure for housing and industry. They transport and distribute water via widely branched networks from sources to consumers. In order to guarantee a working network at all times, the water supply company continuously monitors the network and takes actions when necessary -- e.g. reacting to leakages, sensor faults and drops in water quality. Since real world networks are too large and complex to be monitored by a human, algorithmic monitoring systems have been developed. A popular type of such systems are residual based anomaly detection systems that can detect events such as leakages and sensor faults. For a continuous high quality monitoring, it is necessary for these systems to adapt to changed demands and presence of various anomalies. In this work, we propose an adaption of the incremental SAM-kNN classifier for regression to build a residual based anomaly detection system for water distribution networks that is able to adapt to any kind of change.
abstract_zh: 供水网络是现代住房和工业基础设施的重要组成部分。他们通过广泛分支的网络从水源到消费者运输和分配水。为了保证网络始终正常工作，供水公司持续监控网络并在必要时采取行动——例如对泄漏、传感器故障和水质下降做出反应。由于现实世界的网络太大且复杂，无法由人类监控，因此开发了算法监控系统。此类系统的一种流行类型是基于残留的异常检测系统，可以检测泄漏和传感器故障等事件。为了实现持续的高质量监控，这些系统必须适应不断变化的需求和各种异常情况的存在。在这项工作中，我们提出采用增量 SAM-kNN 分类器进行回归，为供水网络构建基于残差的异常检测系统，该系统能够适应任何类型的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于SAM-kNN回归器的在线学习方法，用于水力管网的残差异常检测，以适应动态变化的工况。
AI.motivation: 水力管网规模庞大且复杂，需实时监测泄漏、传感器故障等异常，传统方法难以适应需求变化和多样化异常场景。
AI.method: 将增量SAM-kNN分类器改进为回归模型，构建残差驱动的在线学习系统，实现对管网状态的动态适应。
AI.result: 提出的方法能够有效适应管网运行参数变化及各类异常情况，提升监测系统的鲁棒性（具体性能指标未明确说明）。
AI.conclusion: SAM-kNN回归器为水力管网的在线异常检测提供了可适应动态环境的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Xihao Chen,Zhiwei Xiong,Zhen Cheng,Jiayong Peng,Yueyi Zhang,Zheng-Jun Zha
title: Degradation-agnostic Correspondence from Resolution-asymmetric Stereo
title_zh: 分辨率不对称立体的退化不可知对应关系
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of stereo matching from a pair of images with different resolutions, e.g., those acquired with a tele-wide camera system. Due to the difficulty of obtaining ground-truth disparity labels in diverse real-world systems, we start from an unsupervised learning perspective. However, resolution asymmetry caused by unknown degradations between two views hinders the effectiveness of the generally assumed photometric consistency. To overcome this challenge, we propose to impose the consistency between two views in a feature space instead of the image space, named feature-metric consistency. Interestingly, we find that, although a stereo matching network trained with the photometric loss is not optimal, its feature extractor can produce degradation-agnostic and matching-specific features. These features can then be utilized to formulate a feature-metric loss to avoid the photometric inconsistency. Moreover, we introduce a self-boosting strategy to optimize the feature extractor progressively, which further strengthens the feature-metric consistency. Experiments on both simulated datasets with various degradations and a self-collected real-world dataset validate the superior performance of the proposed method over existing solutions.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of stereo matching from a pair of images with different resolutions, e.g., those acquired with a tele-wide camera system. Due to the difficulty of obtaining ground-truth disparity labels in diverse real-world systems, we start from an unsupervised learning perspective. However, resolution asymmetry caused by unknown degradations between two views hinders the effectiveness of the generally assumed photometric consistency. To overcome this challenge, we propose to impose the consistency between two views in a feature space instead of the image space, named feature-metric consistency. Interestingly, we find that, although a stereo matching network trained with the photometric loss is not optimal, its feature extractor can produce degradation-agnostic and matching-specific features. These features can then be utilized to formulate a feature-metric loss to avoid the photometric inconsistency. Moreover, we introduce a self-boosting strategy to optimize the feature extractor progressively, which further strengthens the feature-metric consistency. Experiments on both simulated datasets with various degradations and a self-collected real-world dataset validate the superior performance of the proposed method over existing solutions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一对不同分辨率图像（例如使用长焦广角相机系统获取的图像）的立体匹配问题。由于在不同的现实世界系统中获得真实的差异标签很困难，我们从无监督学习的角度开始。然而，两个视图之间未知的退化引起的分辨率不对称阻碍了通常假设的光度一致性的有效性。为了克服这一挑战，我们建议在特征空间而不是图像空间中强加两个视图之间的一致性，称为特征度量一致性。有趣的是，我们发现，虽然用光度损失训练的立体匹配网络不是最优的，但其特征提取器可以产生与退化无关和匹配特定的特征。然后可以利用这些特征来制定特征度量损失，以避免光度不一致。此外，我们引入了一种自我提升策略来逐步优化特征提取器，这进一步增强了特征度量的一致性。对具有各种退化的模拟数据集和自行收集的真实世界数据集的实验验证了所提出的方法相对于现有解决方案的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在分辨率不对称的立体图像对中进行无监督立体匹配的问题，提出了一种基于特征空间一致性的方法以克服未知退化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 由于真实场景中难以获取地面真实 disparity 标签，传统依赖光度一致性的方法在分辨率不对称和未知退化情况下效果受限，需探索新解决方案。
AI.method: 提出特征度量一致性方法，在特征空间而非图像空间中强制视图间一致性；利用预训练特征提取器生成退化无关特征，并通过自增强策略优化特征提取器。
AI.result: 在包含多种退化的模拟数据集和真实世界数据集上验证，所提方法在立体匹配性能上优于现有方案。
AI.conclusion: 特征度量一致性有效解决了分辨率不对称与退化问题，自增强策略进一步提升性能，为无监督立体匹配提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bo Peng,Zhihao Gavin Tang
title: Order Selection Prophet Inequality: From Threshold Optimization to Arrival Time Design
title_zh: 订单选择预言不平等：从阈值优化到到达时间设计
abstract: In the classical prophet inequality, a gambler faces a sequence of items, whose values are drawn independently from known distributions. Upon the arrival of each item, its value is realized and the gambler either accepts it and the game ends, or irrevocably rejects it and continues to the next item. The goal is to maximize the value of the selected item and compete against the expected maximum value of all items. A tight competitive ratio of $\frac{1}{2}$ is established in the classical setting and various relaxations have been proposed to surpass the barrier, including the i.i.d. model, the order selection model, and the random order model. In this paper, we advance the study of the order selection prophet inequality, in which the gambler is given the extra power for selecting the arrival order of the items. Our main result is a $0.725$-competitive algorithm, that substantially improves the state-of-the-art $0.669$ ratio by Correa, Saona and Ziliotto~(Math. Program. 2021), achieved in the harder random order model. Recently, Agrawal, Sethuraman and Zhang~(EC 2021) proved that the task of selecting the optimal order is NP-hard. Despite this fact, we introduce a novel algorithm design framework that translates the discrete order selection problem into a continuous arrival time design problem. From this perspective, we can focus on the arrival time design without worrying about the threshold optimization afterwards. As a side result, we achieve the optimal $0.745$ competitive ratio by applying our algorithm to the i.i.d. model.
summary: In the classical prophet inequality, a gambler faces a sequence of items, whose values are drawn independently from known distributions. Upon the arrival of each item, its value is realized and the gambler either accepts it and the game ends, or irrevocably rejects it and continues to the next item. The goal is to maximize the value of the selected item and compete against the expected maximum value of all items. A tight competitive ratio of $\frac{1}{2}$ is established in the classical setting and various relaxations have been proposed to surpass the barrier, including the i.i.d. model, the order selection model, and the random order model. In this paper, we advance the study of the order selection prophet inequality, in which the gambler is given the extra power for selecting the arrival order of the items. Our main result is a $0.725$-competitive algorithm, that substantially improves the state-of-the-art $0.669$ ratio by Correa, Saona and Ziliotto~(Math. Program. 2021), achieved in the harder random order model. Recently, Agrawal, Sethuraman and Zhang~(EC 2021) proved that the task of selecting the optimal order is NP-hard. Despite this fact, we introduce a novel algorithm design framework that translates the discrete order selection problem into a continuous arrival time design problem. From this perspective, we can focus on the arrival time design without worrying about the threshold optimization afterwards. As a side result, we achieve the optimal $0.745$ competitive ratio by applying our algorithm to the i.i.d. model.
abstract_zh: 在经典的先知不等式中，赌徒面临一系列项目，其值是独立于已知分布得出的。当每件物品到达时，它的价值就被实现，赌徒要么接受它并游戏结束，要么不可撤销地拒绝它并继续下一个物品。目标是最大化所选项目的价值并与所有项目的预期最大价值竞争。在经典环境中建立了 $\frac{1}{2}$ 的严格竞争比，并提出了各种放宽措施来超越障碍，包括独立同分布。模型、顺序选择模型、随机顺序模型。在本文中，我们推进了顺序选择预​​言不等式的研究，其中赌徒被赋予了选择物品到达顺序的额外权力。我们的主要结果是一个 0.725 美元的竞争算法，它大大提高了 Correa、Saona 和 Ziliotto~（Math. Program. 2021）在更难的随机顺序模型中实现的最先进的 0.669 美元比率。最近，Agrawal、Sethuraman 和Zhang~(EC 2021) 证明了选择最优顺序的任务是NP-hard 的。尽管如此，我们还是引入了一种新颖的算法设计框架，将离散订单选择问题转化为连续到达时间设计问题。从这个角度来看，我们可以专注于到达时间的设计，而不用担心事后的阈值优化。附带结果是，通过将我们的算法应用于独立同分布，我们实现了 0.745 美元的最佳竞争比。模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了顺序选择先知不等式问题，通过设计到达时间而非阈值优化，提出了改进的竞争比算法。
AI.motivation: 经典先知不等式存在竞争比上限，而顺序选择模型虽允许选择物品到达顺序但最优顺序选择是NP难问题，需新方法突破限制。
AI.method: 将离散的顺序选择问题转化为连续的到达时间设计问题，避免后续阈值优化，提出新型算法框架。
AI.result: 在顺序选择模型中实现0.725竞争比（优于之前的0.669），并在i.i.d.模型中达到最优的0.745竞争比。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过连续化设计突破NP难问题限制，为顺序选择先知不等式提供了更优解法和新研究视角。

search_text: Order Selection Prophet Inequality: From Threshold Optimization to Arrival Time Design 订单选择预言不平等：从阈值优化到到达时间设计 In the classical prophet inequality, a gambler faces a sequence of items, whose values are drawn independently from known distributions. Upon the arrival of each item, its value is realized and the gambler either accepts it and the game ends, or irrevocably rejects it and continues to the next item. The goal is to maximize the value of the selected item and compete against the expected maximum value of all items. A tight competitive ratio of $\frac{1}{2}$ is established in the classical setting and various relaxations have been proposed to surpass the barrier, including the i.i.d. model, the order selection model, and the random order model. In this paper, we advance the study of the order selection prophet inequality, in which the gambler is given the extra power for selecting the arrival order of the items. Our main result is a $0.725$-competitive algorithm, that substantially improves the state-of-the-art $0.669$ ratio by Correa, Saona and Ziliotto~(Math. Program. 2021), achieved in the harder random order model. Recently, Agrawal, Sethuraman and Zhang~(EC 2021) proved that the task of selecting the optimal order is NP-hard. Despite this fact, we introduce a novel algorithm design framework that translates the discrete order selection problem into a continuous arrival time design problem. From this perspective, we can focus on the arrival time design without worrying about the threshold optimization afterwards. As a side result, we achieve the optimal $0.745$ competitive ratio by applying our algorithm to the i.i.d. model. 在经典的先知不等式中，赌徒面临一系列项目，其值是独立于已知分布得出的。当每件物品到达时，它的价值就被实现，赌徒要么接受它并游戏结束，要么不可撤销地拒绝它并继续下一个物品。目标是最大化所选项目的价值并与所有项目的预期最大价值竞争。在经典环境中建立了 $\frac{1}{2}$ 的严格竞争比，并提出了各种放宽措施来超越障碍，包括独立同分布。模型、顺序选择模型、随机顺序模型。在本文中，我们推进了顺序选择预​​言不等式的研究，其中赌徒被赋予了选择物品到达顺序的额外权力。我们的主要结果是一个 0.725 美元的竞争算法，它大大提高了 Correa、Saona 和 Ziliotto~（Math. Program. 2021）在更难的随机顺序模型中实现的最先进的 0.669 美元比率。最近，Agrawal、Sethuraman 和Zhang~(EC 2021) 证明了选择最优顺序的任务是NP-hard 的。尽管如此，我们还是引入了一种新颖的算法设计框架，将离散订单选择问题转化为连续到达时间设计问题。从这个角度来看，我们可以专注于到达时间的设计，而不用担心事后的阈值优化。附带结果是，通过将我们的算法应用于独立同分布，我们实现了 0.745 美元的最佳竞争比。模型。 本文研究了顺序选择先知不等式问题，通过设计到达时间而非阈值优化，提出了改进的竞争比算法。 Bo Peng,Zhihao Gavin Tang cs.DS,cs.GT

authors_text: Nick Gravin,Enze Sun,Zhihao Gavin Tang
title: Online Ordinal Problems: Optimality of Comparison-based Algorithms and their Cardinal Complexity
title_zh: 在线序数问题：基于比较的算法的最优性及其基数复杂度
comment: To appear at FOCS 2023. Abstract shortened to meet arXiv requirements
comments: To appear at FOCS 2023. Abstract shortened to meet arXiv requirements
abstract: We consider ordinal online problems, i.e., tasks that only require pairwise comparisons between elements of the input. A classic example is the secretary problem and the game of googol, as well as its multiple combinatorial extensions such as $(J,K)$-secretary, $2$-sided game of googol, ordinal-competitive matroid secretary. A natural approach to these tasks is to use ordinal algorithms that at each step only consider relative ranking among the arrived elements, without looking at the numerical values of the input. We formally study the question of how cardinal algorithms can improve upon ordinal algorithms. We give first a universal construction of the input distribution for any ordinal online problem, such that the advantage of any cardinal algorithm over the ordinal algorithms is at most $1+\varepsilon$ for arbitrary small $\varepsilon> 0$. As an implication, previous lower bounds for the aforementioned variants of secretary problems hold not only against ordinal algorithms, but also against any online algorithm. However, the value range of the input elements in our construction is huge: $N=O\left(\frac{n^3\cdot n!\cdot n!}{\varepsilon}\right)\uparrow\uparrow(n-1)$ (tower of exponents) for an input sequence of length $n$. As a second result, we identify a class of natural ordinal problems and find cardinal algorithm with a matching advantage of $1+ Ω\left(\frac{1}{\log^{(c)}N}\right),$ where $\log^{(c)}N=\log\ldots\log N$ with $c$ iterative logs and $c$ is an arbitrary constant. Further, we introduce the cardinal complexity for any given ordinal online task: the minimum size $N(\varepsilon)$ of different numerical values in the input such the advantage of cardinal over ordinal algorithms is at most $1+\varepsilon$. As a third result, we show that the game of googol has much lower cardinal complexity of $N=O\left(\left(\frac{n}{\varepsilon}\right)^n\right)$.

A classic example is the secretary problem and the game of googol, as well as its multiple combinatorial extensions such as $(J,K)$-secretary, $2$-sided game of googol, ordinal-competitive matroid secretary. A natural approach to these tasks is to use ordinal algorithms that at each step only consider relative ranking among the arrived elements, without looking at the numerical values of the input. We formally study the question of how cardinal algorithms can improve upon ordinal algorithms. We give first a universal construction of the input distribution for any ordinal online problem, such that the advantage of any cardinal algorithm over the ordinal algorithms is at most $1+\varepsilon$ for arbitrary small $\varepsilon> 0$. As an implication, previous lower bounds for the aforementioned variants of secretary problems hold not only against ordinal algorithms, but also against any online algorithm. However, the value range of the input elements in our construction is huge: $N=O\left(\frac{n^3\cdot n!\cdot n!}{\varepsilon}\right)\uparrow\uparrow(n-1)$ (tower of exponents) for an input sequence of length $n$. As a second result, we identify a class of natural ordinal problems and find cardinal algorithm with a matching advantage of $1+ Ω\left(\frac{1}{\log^{(c)}N}\right),$ where $\log^{(c)}N=\log\ldots\log N$ with $c$ iterative logs and $c$ is an arbitrary constant. Further, we introduce the cardinal complexity for any given ordinal online task: the minimum size $N(\varepsilon)$ of different numerical values in the input such the advantage of cardinal over ordinal algorithms is at most $1+\varepsilon$. As a third result, we show that the game of googol has much lower cardinal complexity of $N=O\left(\left(\frac{n}{\varepsilon}\right)^n\right)$.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑序数在线问题，即仅需要输入元素之间成对比较的任务。一个典型的例子是秘书问题和 googol 博弈，以及它的多种组合扩展，例如 $(J,K)$ 秘书、$2$ 边 googol 博弈、序数竞争拟阵秘书。完成这些任务的一种自然方法是使用序数算法，该算法在每一步仅考虑到达元素之间的相对排名，而不查看输入的数值。我们正式研究基数算法如何改进序数算法的问题。我们首先给出任何序数在线问题的输入分布的通用构造，使得对于任意小的$\varepsilon> 0$，任何基数算法相对于序数算法的优势至多为$1+\varepsilon$。这意味着，上述秘书问题变体的先前下限不仅适用于序数算法，而且适用于任何在线算法。然而，我们构造中输入元素的值范围很大：对于长度为$n$的输入序列，$N=O\left(\frac{n^3\cdot n!\cdot n!}{\varepsilon}\right)\uparrow\uparrow(n-1)$（指数塔）。作为第二个结果，我们识别了一类自然序数问题，并找到匹配优势为 $1+ Ω\left(\frac{1}{\log^{(c)}N}\right),$ 的基数算法，其中 $\log^{(c)}N=\log\ldots\log N$ 具有 $c$ 迭代日志，$c$ 是任意常数。此外，我们引入了任何给定序数在线任务的基数复杂度：输入中不同数值的最小大小$N(\varepsilon)$，这样基数相对于序数算法的优势最多为$1+\varepsilon$。作为第三个结果，我们表明 googol 游戏的基数复杂度要低得多 $N=O\left(\left(\frac{n}{\varepsilon}\right)^n\right)$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线序问题中基于比较的算法与基数算法的最优性及复杂度，分析了基数算法相对于序算法的优势上限及特定问题的基数复杂度。
AI.motivation: 序算法仅依赖元素间的相对排名，而基数算法利用数值信息。作者旨在确定基数算法在序问题中的优势边界，并量化其复杂度。
AI.method: 通过构造输入分布证明基数算法优势的上限，分析自然序问题的基数优势，并引入基数复杂度度量概念。
AI.result: 构造了输入分布使基数算法优势不超过1+ε；发现特定序问题的基数优势为1+Ω(1/log^c N)；证明了Googol游戏的基数复杂度为O((n/ε)^n)。
AI.conclusion: 基数算法在一般序问题中优势有限，但特定问题（如Googol游戏）的基数复杂度显著降低，为序问题的算法设计提供了理论边界。

authors_text: Jiyang Jiang,Dadong Wang,Yang Song,Perminder S. Sachdev,Wei Wen
title: Computer-Aided Extraction of Select MRI Markers of Cerebral Small Vessel Disease: A Systematic Review
title_zh: 计算机辅助提取脑小血管疾病的精选 MRI 标记：系统评价
abstract: Cerebral small vessel disease (CSVD) is a major vascular contributor to cognitive impairment in ageing, including dementias. Imaging remains the most promising method for in vivo studies of CSVD. To replace the subjective and laborious visual rating approaches, emerging studies have applied state-of-the-art artificial intelligence to extract imaging biomarkers of CSVD from MRI scans. We aimed to summarise published computer-aided methods to examine three imaging biomarkers of CSVD, namely cerebral microbleeds (CMB), dilated perivascular spaces (PVS), and lacunes of presumed vascular origin. Seventy-one classical image processing, classical machine learning, and deep learning studies were identified. CMB and PVS have been better studied, compared to lacunes. While good performance metrics have been achieved in local test datasets, there have not been generalisable pipelines validated in different research or clinical cohorts. Transfer learning and weak supervision techniques have been applied to accommodate the limitations in training data. Future studies could consider pooling data from multiple sources to increase diversity, and validating the performance of the methods using both image processing metrics and associations with clinical measures.
summary: Cerebral small vessel disease (CSVD) is a major vascular contributor to cognitive impairment in ageing, including dementias. Imaging remains the most promising method for in vivo studies of CSVD. To replace the subjective and laborious visual rating approaches, emerging studies have applied state-of-the-art artificial intelligence to extract imaging biomarkers of CSVD from MRI scans. We aimed to summarise published computer-aided methods to examine three imaging biomarkers of CSVD, namely cerebral microbleeds (CMB), dilated perivascular spaces (PVS), and lacunes of presumed vascular origin. Seventy-one classical image processing, classical machine learning, and deep learning studies were identified. CMB and PVS have been better studied, compared to lacunes. While good performance metrics have been achieved in local test datasets, there have not been generalisable pipelines validated in different research or clinical cohorts. Transfer learning and weak supervision techniques have been applied to accommodate the limitations in training data. Future studies could consider pooling data from multiple sources to increase diversity, and validating the performance of the methods using both image processing metrics and associations with clinical measures.
abstract_zh: 脑小血管疾病（CSVD）是导致衰老认知障碍（包括痴呆）的主要血管因素。成像仍然是脑小血管病体内研究最有前途的方法。为了取代主观且费力的视觉评级方法，新兴研究应用最先进的人工智能从 MRI 扫描中提取 CSVD 的成像生物标志物。我们的目的是总结已发表的计算机辅助方法，用于检查 CSVD 的三种成像生物标志物，即脑微出血 (CMB)、血管周围间隙扩张 (PVS) 和推测血管起源的腔隙。确定了 71 项经典图像处理、经典机器学习和深度学习研究。与腔隙相比，CMB 和 PVS 得到了更好的研究。虽然在本地测试数据集中已经实现了良好的性能指标，但尚未在不同的研究或临床队列中验证通用的管道。迁移学习和弱监督技术已被应用来适应训练数据的限制。未来的研究可以考虑汇集多个来源的数据以增加多样性，并使用图像处理指标和与临床测量的关联来验证方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 这篇论文系统综述了计算机辅助提取脑小血管病MRI标志物的方法。
AI.motivation: 脑小血管病是老年认知障碍的重要血管因素，影像学方法是研究其最有前景的方式。传统的视觉评分方法存在主观性和劳动密集型的问题，因此需要使用人工智能技术来提取MRI标志物。
AI.method: 论文通过系统综述的方法，总结了71项经典图像处理、经典机器学习和深度学习研究，分析了三种CSVD的影像标志物（微出血、扩张的血管周围空间和血管源性空洞）。
AI.result: 发现CMB和PVS的研究较多，而空洞的研究较少。尽管在局部测试数据集中取得了良好的性能指标，但尚未在不同研究或临床队列中验证通用的流程。

search_text: Computer-Aided Extraction of Select MRI Markers of Cerebral Small Vessel Disease: A Systematic Review 计算机辅助提取脑小血管疾病的精选 MRI 标记：系统评价 Cerebral small vessel disease (CSVD) is a major vascular contributor to cognitive impairment in ageing, including dementias. Imaging remains the most promising method for in vivo studies of CSVD. To replace the subjective and laborious visual rating approaches, emerging studies have applied state-of-the-art artificial intelligence to extract imaging biomarkers of CSVD from MRI scans. We aimed to summarise published computer-aided methods to examine three imaging biomarkers of CSVD, namely cerebral microbleeds (CMB), dilated perivascular spaces (PVS), and lacunes of presumed vascular origin. Seventy-one classical image processing, classical machine learning, and deep learning studies were identified. CMB and PVS have been better studied, compared to lacunes. While good performance metrics have been achieved in local test datasets, there have not been generalisable pipelines validated in different research or clinical cohorts. Transfer learning and weak supervision techniques have been applied to accommodate the limitations in training data. Future studies could consider pooling data from multiple sources to increase diversity, and validating the performance of the methods using both image processing metrics and associations with clinical measures. 脑小血管疾病（CSVD）是导致衰老认知障碍（包括痴呆）的主要血管因素。成像仍然是脑小血管病体内研究最有前途的方法。为了取代主观且费力的视觉评级方法，新兴研究应用最先进的人工智能从 MRI 扫描中提取 CSVD 的成像生物标志物。我们的目的是总结已发表的计算机辅助方法，用于检查 CSVD 的三种成像生物标志物，即脑微出血 (CMB)、血管周围间隙扩张 (PVS) 和推测血管起源的腔隙。确定了 71 项经典图像处理、经典机器学习和深度学习研究。与腔隙相比，CMB 和 PVS 得到了更好的研究。虽然在本地测试数据集中已经实现了良好的性能指标，但尚未在不同的研究或临床队列中验证通用的管道。迁移学习和弱监督技术已被应用来适应训练数据的限制。未来的研究可以考虑汇集多个来源的数据以增加多样性，并使用图像处理指标和与临床测量的关联来验证方法的性能。 这篇论文系统综述了计算机辅助提取脑小血管病MRI标志物的方法。 Jiyang Jiang,Dadong Wang,Yang Song,Perminder S. Sachdev,Wei Wen eess.IV,cs.CV,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Eli Verwimp,Kuo Yang,Sarah Parisot,Hong Lanqing,Steven McDonagh,Eduardo Pérez-Pellitero,Matthias De Lange,Tinne Tuytelaars
title: Re-examining Distillation For Continual Object Detection
title_zh: 重新检查蒸馏以进行持续目标检测
abstract: Training models continually to detect and classify objects, from new classes and new domains, remains an open problem. In this work, we conduct a thorough analysis of why and how object detection models forget catastrophically. We focus on distillation-based approaches in two-stage networks; the most-common strategy employed in contemporary continual object detection work.Distillation aims to transfer the knowledge of a model trained on previous tasks -- the teacher -- to a new model -- the student -- while it learns the new task. We show that this works well for the region proposal network, but that wrong, yet overly confident teacher predictions prevent student models from effective learning of the classification head. Our analysis provides a foundation that allows us to propose improvements for existing techniques by detecting incorrect teacher predictions, based on current ground-truth labels, and by employing an adaptive Huber loss as opposed to the mean squared error for the distillation loss in the classification heads. We evidence that our strategy works not only in a class incremental setting, but also in domain incremental settings, which constitute a realistic context, likely to be the setting of representative real-world problems.
summary: Training models continually to detect and classify objects, from new classes and new domains, remains an open problem. In this work, we conduct a thorough analysis of why and how object detection models forget catastrophically. We focus on distillation-based approaches in two-stage networks; the most-common strategy employed in contemporary continual object detection work.Distillation aims to transfer the knowledge of a model trained on previous tasks -- the teacher -- to a new model -- the student -- while it learns the new task. We show that this works well for the region proposal network, but that wrong, yet overly confident teacher predictions prevent student models from effective learning of the classification head. Our analysis provides a foundation that allows us to propose improvements for existing techniques by detecting incorrect teacher predictions, based on current ground-truth labels, and by employing an adaptive Huber loss as opposed to the mean squared error for the distillation loss in the classification heads. We evidence that our strategy works not only in a class incremental setting, but also in domain incremental settings, which constitute a realistic context, likely to be the setting of representative real-world problems.
abstract_zh: 不断训练模型来检测和分类来自新类别和新领域的对象，仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们对对象检测模型灾难性遗忘的原因和方式进行了彻底分析。我们专注于两级网络中基于蒸馏的方法；当代连续目标检测工作中最常见的策略。蒸馏旨在将在先前任务（教师）上训练的模型的知识转移到新模型（学生），同时学习新任务。我们表明，这对于区域提议网络来说效果很好，但是错误但过于自信的教师预测阻止了学生模型有效学习分类头。我们的分析提供了一个基础，使我们能够根据当前的真实标签检测不正确的教师预测，并采用自适应 Huber 损失（而不是分类头中蒸馏损失的均方误差）来对现有技术提出改进。我们证明，我们的策略不仅在类增量设置中有效，而且在域增量设置中也有效，这构成了现实背景，可能是代表性现实世界问题的设置。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了基于知识蒸馏的持续目标检测方法，分析了模型在连续学习中灾难性遗忘的原因，并提出了改进策略。
AI.motivation: 持续目标检测中，模型在学习新任务时容易遗忘旧知识，而基于蒸馏的方法在分类头部分因教师模型预测错误导致学习效果不佳，需改进现有技术。
AI.method: 通过检测教师模型的错误预测并结合自适应Huber损失函数替代均方误差，优化分类头的蒸馏过程，适用于类别增量和领域增量场景。
AI.result: 改进方法在类别增量和领域增量设置中均有效，提升了持续目标检测的性能，验证了策略的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文分析了蒸馏方法在持续检测中的局限性，提出基于错误检测和损失函数优化的改进方案，为解决灾难性遗忘提供了新思路。

authors_text: Andrea Agostinelli,Michal Pándy,Jasper Uijlings,Thomas Mensink,Vittorio Ferrari
title: How stable are Transferability Metrics evaluations?
title_zh: 可转移性指标评估的稳定性如何？
abstract: Transferability metrics is a maturing field with increasing interest, which aims at providing heuristics for selecting the most suitable source models to transfer to a given target dataset, without fine-tuning them all. However, existing works rely on custom experimental setups which differ across papers, leading to inconsistent conclusions about which transferability metrics work best. In this paper we conduct a large-scale study by systematically constructing a broad range of 715k experimental setup variations. We discover that even small variations to an experimental setup lead to different conclusions about the superiority of a transferability metric over another. Then we propose better evaluations by aggregating across many experiments, enabling to reach more stable conclusions. As a result, we reveal the superiority of LogME at selecting good source datasets to transfer from in a semantic segmentation scenario, NLEEP at selecting good source architectures in an image classification scenario, and GBC at determining which target task benefits most from a given source model. Yet, no single transferability metric works best in all scenarios.
summary: Transferability metrics is a maturing field with increasing interest, which aims at providing heuristics for selecting the most suitable source models to transfer to a given target dataset, without fine-tuning them all. However, existing works rely on custom experimental setups which differ across papers, leading to inconsistent conclusions about which transferability metrics work best. In this paper we conduct a large-scale study by systematically constructing a broad range of 715k experimental setup variations. We discover that even small variations to an experimental setup lead to different conclusions about the superiority of a transferability metric over another. Then we propose better evaluations by aggregating across many experiments, enabling to reach more stable conclusions. As a result, we reveal the superiority of LogME at selecting good source datasets to transfer from in a semantic segmentation scenario, NLEEP at selecting good source architectures in an image classification scenario, and GBC at determining which target task benefits most from a given source model. Yet, no single transferability metric works best in all scenarios.
abstract_zh: 可转移性指标是一个日益成熟的领域，人们的兴趣日益浓厚，其目的是提供启发式方法来选择最合适的源模型以转移到给定的目标数据集，而无需对它们进行全部微调。然而，现有的工作依赖于不同论文之间不同的定制实验设置，导致关于哪种可转移性指标效果最好的结论不一致。在本文中，我们通过系统地构建广泛的 715k 实验设置变化来进行大规模研究。我们发现，即使实验设置发生很小的变化，也会导致关于可转移性指标相对于其他指标的优越性的不同结论。然后，我们通过汇总许多实验来提出更好的评估，从而得出更稳定的结论。因此，我们揭示了 LogME 在语义分割场景中选择良好的源数据集进行传输的优越性，NLEEP 在图像分类场景中选择良好的源架构的优越性，以及 GBC 在确定哪个目标任务从给定源模型中获益最多的优越性。然而，没有一个单一的可转移性指标在所有情况下都能发挥最佳作用。

AI.tldr: 评估迁移度量评估的稳定性，并提出更可靠的评估方法
AI.motivation: 现有研究依赖定制实验设置导致结论不一致，需系统性研究以确定迁移度量的稳定性
AI.method: 构建715k种实验设置变体，通过跨实验聚合评估迁移度量的稳定性
AI.result: 发现LogME、NLEEP和GBC在不同任务中的优越性，但无单一指标适用于所有场景
AI.conclusion: 无单一最佳迁移度量，需根据具体任务场景选择

Then we propose better evaluations by aggregating across many experiments, enabling to reach more stable conclusions. As a result, we reveal the superiority of LogME at selecting good source datasets to transfer from in a semantic segmentation scenario, NLEEP at selecting good source architectures in an image classification scenario, and GBC at determining which target task benefits most from a given source model. Yet, no single transferability metric works best in all scenarios. 可转移性指标是一个日益成熟的领域，人们的兴趣日益浓厚，其目的是提供启发式方法来选择最合适的源模型以转移到给定的目标数据集，而无需对它们进行全部微调。然而，现有的工作依赖于不同论文之间不同的定制实验设置，导致关于哪种可转移性指标效果最好的结论不一致。在本文中，我们通过系统地构建广泛的 715k 实验设置变化来进行大规模研究。我们发现，即使实验设置发生很小的变化，也会导致关于可转移性指标相对于其他指标的优越性的不同结论。然后，我们通过汇总许多实验来提出更好的评估，从而得出更稳定的结论。因此，我们揭示了 LogME 在语义分割场景中选择良好的源数据集进行传输的优越性，NLEEP 在图像分类场景中选择良好的源架构的优越性，以及 GBC 在确定哪个目标任务从给定源模型中获益最多的优越性。然而，没有一个单一的可转移性指标在所有情况下都能发挥最佳作用。 评估迁移度量评估的稳定性，并提出更可靠的评估方法 Andrea Agostinelli,Michal Pándy,Jasper Uijlings,Thomas Mensink,Vittorio Ferrari cs.CV

authors_text: Marcely Zanon Boito,Laurent Besacier,Natalia Tomashenko,Yannick Estève
title: A Study of Gender Impact in Self-supervised Models for Speech-to-Text Systems
title_zh: 语音转文本系统自监督模型中的性别影响研究
comment: Accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022 (Special session Inclusive and Fair Speech Technologies)
comments: Accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022 (Special session Inclusive and Fair Speech Technologies)
abstract: Self-supervised models for speech processing emerged recently as popular foundation blocks in speech processing pipelines. These models are pre-trained on unlabeled audio data and then used in speech processing downstream tasks such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) or speech translation (ST). Since these models are now used in research and industrial systems alike, it becomes necessary to understand the impact caused by some features such as gender distribution within pre-training data. Using French as our investigation language, we train and compare gender-specific wav2vec 2.0 models against models containing different degrees of gender balance in their pre-training data. The comparison is performed by applying these models to two speech-to-text downstream tasks: ASR and ST. Results show the type of downstream integration matters. We observe lower overall performance using gender-specific pre-training before fine-tuning an end-to-end ASR system. However, when self-supervised models are used as feature extractors, the overall ASR and ST results follow more complex patterns in which the balanced pre-trained model does not necessarily lead to the best results. Lastly, our crude 'fairness' metric, the relative performance difference measured between female and male test sets, does not display a strong variation from balanced to gender-specific pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 models.
summary: Self-supervised models for speech processing emerged recently as popular foundation blocks in speech processing pipelines. These models are pre-trained on unlabeled audio data and then used in speech processing downstream tasks such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) or speech translation (ST). Since these models are now used in research and industrial systems alike, it becomes necessary to understand the impact caused by some features such as gender distribution within pre-training data. Using French as our investigation language, we train and compare gender-specific wav2vec 2.0 models against models containing different degrees of gender balance in their pre-training data. The comparison is performed by applying these models to two speech-to-text downstream tasks: ASR and ST. Results show the type of downstream integration matters. We observe lower overall performance using gender-specific pre-training before fine-tuning an end-to-end ASR system. However, when self-supervised models are used as feature extractors, the overall ASR and ST results follow more complex patterns in which the balanced pre-trained model does not necessarily lead to the best results. Lastly, our crude 'fairness' metric, the relative performance difference measured between female and male test sets, does not display a strong variation from balanced to gender-specific pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 models.
abstract_zh: 最近出现的语音处理自监督模型成为语音处理管道中流行的基础模块。这些模型在未标记的音频数据上进行预训练，然后用于语音处理下游任务，例如自动语音识别 (ASR) 或语音翻译 (ST)。由于这些模型现在用于研究和工业系统，因此有必要了解预训练数据中的性别分布等某些特征所造成的影响。使用法语作为我们的调查语言，我们训练特定性别的 wav2vec 2.0 模型，并将其与预训练数据中包含不同程度性别平衡的模型进行比较。通过将这些模型应用于两个语音到文本下游任务（ASR 和 ST）来进行比较。结果表明下游整合的类型很重要。我们观察到，在微调端到端 ASR 系统之前，使用针对特定性别的预训练的整体性能较低。然而，当使用自监督模型作为特征提取器时，整体 ASR 和 ST 结果遵循更复杂的模式，其中平衡的预训练模型不一定会产生最佳结果。最后，我们粗略的“公平”指标，即女性和男性测试集之间测量的相对性能差异，并没有显示出从平衡到特定性别的预训练 wav2vec 2.0 模型的强烈变化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了性别分布对自监督语音模型在语音到文本系统中的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着自监督模型在语音处理中的广泛应用，理解预训练数据中的性别分布对下游任务的影响变得尤为重要。
AI.method: 使用法语作为研究语言，训练并比较了性别特定的wav2vec 2.0模型与不同性别平衡程度的预训练模型，并将其应用于语音识别和语音翻译任务。
AI.result: 性别特定的预训练模型在端到端ASR系统中表现较差，但作为特征提取器时，结果呈现更复杂的模式，平衡预训练模型不一定表现最佳。性别公平性指标在不同预训练模型间变化不大。
AI.conclusion: 预训练数据的性别分布对下游任务的影响取决于模型的使用方式，性别平衡并不总是带来最佳性能。

authors_text: Bo Chen,Xiangyu Zhao,Yejing Wang,Wenqi Fan,Huifeng Guo,Ruiming Tang
title: A Comprehensive Survey on Automated Machine Learning for Recommendations
title_zh: 自动机器学习推荐的综合调查
abstract: Deep recommender systems (DRS) are critical for current commercial online service providers, which address the issue of information overload by recommending items that are tailored to the user's interests and preferences. They have unprecedented feature representations effectiveness and the capacity of modeling the non-linear relationships between users and items. Despite their advancements, DRS models, like other deep learning models, employ sophisticated neural network architectures and other vital components that are typically designed and tuned by human experts. This article will give a comprehensive summary of automated machine learning (AutoML) for developing DRS models. We first provide an overview of AutoML for DRS models and the related techniques. Then we discuss the state-of-the-art AutoML approaches that automate the feature selection, feature embeddings, feature interactions, and model training in DRS. We point out that the existing AutoML-based recommender systems are developing to a multi-component joint search with abstract search space and efficient search algorithm. Finally, we discuss appealing research directions and summarize the survey.
summary: Deep recommender systems (DRS) are critical for current commercial online service providers, which address the issue of information overload by recommending items that are tailored to the user's interests and preferences. They have unprecedented feature representations effectiveness and the capacity of modeling the non-linear relationships between users and items. Despite their advancements, DRS models, like other deep learning models, employ sophisticated neural network architectures and other vital components that are typically designed and tuned by human experts. This article will give a comprehensive summary of automated machine learning (AutoML) for developing DRS models. We first provide an overview of AutoML for DRS models and the related techniques. Then we discuss the state-of-the-art AutoML approaches that automate the feature selection, feature embeddings, feature interactions, and model training in DRS. We point out that the existing AutoML-based recommender systems are developing to a multi-component joint search with abstract search space and efficient search algorithm. Finally, we discuss appealing research directions and summarize the survey.
abstract_zh: 深度推荐系统（DRS）对于当前的商业在线服务提供商至关重要，它通过推荐适合用户兴趣和偏好的项目来解决信息过载的问题。它们具有前所未有的特征表示有效性以及对用户和项目之间的非线性关系进行建模的能力。尽管取得了进步，DRS 模型与其他深度学习模型一样，采用了复杂的神经网络架构和其他重要组件，这些组件通常由人类专家设计和调整。本文将对用于开发 DRS 模型的自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 进行全面总结。我们首先概述 DRS 模型的 AutoML 及相关技术。然后我们讨论最先进的 AutoML 方法，这些方法可自动执行 DRS 中的特征选择、特征嵌入、特征交互和模型训练。我们指出，现有的基于 AutoML 的推荐系统正在发展为具有抽象搜索空间和高效搜索算法的多组件联合搜索。最后，我们讨论了有吸引力的研究方向并总结了调查。

AI.tldr: 本文全面综述了自动化机器学习（AutoML）在深度推荐系统（DRS）中的应用，总结了现有技术并探讨了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 深度推荐系统虽有效，但依赖人工设计复杂模型，亟需AutoML实现自动化以提升效率与效果。
AI.method: 通过概述AutoML技术，分析其在特征选择、嵌入、交互及模型训练中的应用，提出多组件联合搜索是当前发展趋势。
AI.result: 总结了现有AutoML推荐系统的发展现状，指出其正向多组件联合搜索方向演进。
AI.conclusion: AutoML在推荐系统中具有重要意义，未来研究需关注抽象搜索空间与高效算法的结合。

authors_text: Youngsik Eom,Yeonghyeon Lee,Ji Sub Um,Hoirin Kim
title: Anti-Spoofing Using Transfer Learning with Variational Information Bottleneck
title_zh: 使用具有变分信息瓶颈的迁移学习进行反欺骗
abstract: Recent advances in sophisticated synthetic speech generated from text-to-speech (TTS) or voice conversion (VC) systems cause threats to the existing automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems. Since such synthetic speech is generated from diverse algorithms, generalization ability with using limited training data is indispensable for a robust anti-spoofing system. In this work, we propose a transfer learning scheme based on the wav2vec 2.0 pretrained model with variational information bottleneck (VIB) for speech anti-spoofing task. Evaluation on the ASVspoof 2019 logical access (LA) database shows that our method improves the performance of distinguishing unseen spoofed and genuine speech, outperforming current state-of-the-art anti-spoofing systems. Furthermore, we show that the proposed system improves performance in low-resource and cross-dataset settings of anti-spoofing task significantly, demonstrating that our system is also robust in terms of data size and data distribution.
summary: Recent advances in sophisticated synthetic speech generated from text-to-speech (TTS) or voice conversion (VC) systems cause threats to the existing automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems. Since such synthetic speech is generated from diverse algorithms, generalization ability with using limited training data is indispensable for a robust anti-spoofing system. In this work, we propose a transfer learning scheme based on the wav2vec 2.0 pretrained model with variational information bottleneck (VIB) for speech anti-spoofing task. Evaluation on the ASVspoof 2019 logical access (LA) database shows that our method improves the performance of distinguishing unseen spoofed and genuine speech, outperforming current state-of-the-art anti-spoofing systems. Furthermore, we show that the proposed system improves performance in low-resource and cross-dataset settings of anti-spoofing task significantly, demonstrating that our system is also robust in terms of data size and data distribution.
abstract_zh: 从文本到语音 (TTS) 或语音转换 (VC) 系统生成的复杂合成语音的最新进展对现有的自动说话人验证 (ASV) 系统造成了威胁。由于这种合成语音是由不同的算法生成的，因此使用有限训练数据的泛化能力对于强大的反欺骗系统是必不可少的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于具有变分信息瓶颈（VIB）的 wav2vec 2.0 预训练模型的迁移学习方案，用于语音反欺骗任务。对 ASVspoof 2019 逻辑访问（LA）数据库的评估表明，我们的方法提高了区分看不见的欺骗和真实语音的性能，优于当前最先进的反欺骗系统。此外，我们还表明，所提出的系统显着提高了反欺骗任务的低资源和跨数据集设置中的性能，这表明我们的系统在数据大小和数据分布方面也具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移学习和变分信息瓶颈（VIB）的语音防欺骗方法，以提升自动说话人验证系统对合成语音的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 文本到语音（TTS）和语音转换（VC）系统生成的合成语音对现有自动说话人验证（ASV）系统构成威胁，需在有限训练数据下实现鲁棒的防欺骗性能。
AI.method: 结合预训练的wav2vec 2.0模型与变分信息瓶颈（VIB）框架，设计迁移学习方案以提取语音特征并区分合成与真实语音。
AI.result: 在ASVspoof 2019 LA数据集上，该方法在区分未见过的欺骗语音和真实语音方面优于现有最先进系统，且在低资源和跨数据集场景下表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提系统通过迁移学习与VIB有效增强了防欺骗性能，证明其在数据规模和分布变化下的鲁棒性。

search_text: Anti-Spoofing Using Transfer Learning with Variational Information Bottleneck 使用具有变分信息瓶颈的迁移学习进行反欺骗 Recent advances in sophisticated synthetic speech generated from text-to-speech (TTS) or voice conversion (VC) systems cause threats to the existing automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems. Since such synthetic speech is generated from diverse algorithms, generalization ability with using limited training data is indispensable for a robust anti-spoofing system. In this work, we propose a transfer learning scheme based on the wav2vec 2.0 pretrained model with variational information bottleneck (VIB) for speech anti-spoofing task. Evaluation on the ASVspoof 2019 logical access (LA) database shows that our method improves the performance of distinguishing unseen spoofed and genuine speech, outperforming current state-of-the-art anti-spoofing systems. Furthermore, we show that the proposed system improves performance in low-resource and cross-dataset settings of anti-spoofing task significantly, demonstrating that our system is also robust in terms of data size and data distribution. 从文本到语音 (TTS) 或语音转换 (VC) 系统生成的复杂合成语音的最新进展对现有的自动说话人验证 (ASV) 系统造成了威胁。由于这种合成语音是由不同的算法生成的，因此使用有限训练数据的泛化能力对于强大的反欺骗系统是必不可少的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于具有变分信息瓶颈（VIB）的 wav2vec 2.0 预训练模型的迁移学习方案，用于语音反欺骗任务。对 ASVspoof 2019 逻辑访问（LA）数据库的评估表明，我们的方法提高了区分看不见的欺骗和真实语音的性能，优于当前最先进的反欺骗系统。此外，我们还表明，所提出的系统显着提高了反欺骗任务的低资源和跨数据集设置中的性能，这表明我们的系统在数据大小和数据分布方面也具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于迁移学习和变分信息瓶颈（VIB）的语音防欺骗方法，以提升自动说话人验证系统对合成语音的识别能力。 Youngsik Eom,Yeonghyeon Lee,Ji Sub Um,Hoirin Kim eess.AS,cs.CR,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Yusuke Takimoto,Hiroyuki Sato,Hikari Takehara,Keishiro Uragaki,Takehiro Tawara,Xiao Liang,Kentaro Oku,Wataru Kishimoto,Bo Zheng
title: Dressi: A Hardware-Agnostic Differentiable Renderer with Reactive Shader Packing and Soft Rasterization
title_zh: Dressi：一种与硬件无关的可微分渲染器，具有反应性着色器打包和软光栅化
abstract: Differentiable rendering (DR) enables various computer graphics and computer vision applications through gradient-based optimization with derivatives of the rendering equation. Most rasterization-based approaches are built on general-purpose automatic differentiation (AD) libraries and DR-specific modules handcrafted using CUDA. Such a system design mixes DR algorithm implementation and algorithm building blocks, resulting in hardware dependency and limited performance. In this paper, we present a practical hardware-agnostic differentiable renderer called Dressi, which is based on a new full AD design. The DR algorithms of Dressi are fully written in our Vulkan-based AD for DR, Dressi-AD, which supports all primitive operations for DR. Dressi-AD and our inverse UV technique inside it bring hardware independence and acceleration by graphics hardware. Stage packing, our runtime optimization technique, can adapt hardware constraints and efficiently execute complex computational graphs of DR with reactive cache considering the render pass hierarchy of Vulkan. HardSoftRas, our novel rendering process, is designed for inverse rendering with a graphics pipeline. Under the limited functionalities of the graphics pipeline, HardSoftRas can propagate the gradients of pixels from the screen space to far-range triangle attributes. Our experiments and applications demonstrate that Dressi establishes hardware independence, high-quality and robust optimization with fast speed, and photorealistic rendering.
summary: Differentiable rendering (DR) enables various computer graphics and computer vision applications through gradient-based optimization with derivatives of the rendering equation. Most rasterization-based approaches are built on general-purpose automatic differentiation (AD) libraries and DR-specific modules handcrafted using CUDA. Such a system design mixes DR algorithm implementation and algorithm building blocks, resulting in hardware dependency and limited performance. In this paper, we present a practical hardware-agnostic differentiable renderer called Dressi, which is based on a new full AD design. The DR algorithms of Dressi are fully written in our Vulkan-based AD for DR, Dressi-AD, which supports all primitive operations for DR. Dressi-AD and our inverse UV technique inside it bring hardware independence and acceleration by graphics hardware. Stage packing, our runtime optimization technique, can adapt hardware constraints and efficiently execute complex computational graphs of DR with reactive cache considering the render pass hierarchy of Vulkan. HardSoftRas, our novel rendering process, is designed for inverse rendering with a graphics pipeline. Under the limited functionalities of the graphics pipeline, HardSoftRas can propagate the gradients of pixels from the screen space to far-range triangle attributes. Our experiments and applications demonstrate that Dressi establishes hardware independence, high-quality and robust optimization with fast speed, and photorealistic rendering.
abstract_zh: 可微渲染（DR）通过基于梯度的优化和渲染方程的导数来实现各种计算机图形和计算机视觉应用。大多数基于光栅化的方法都是基于通用自动微分 (AD) 库和使用 CUDA 手工制作的 DR 特定模块构建的。这种系统设计混合了灾难恢复算法实现和算法构建块，导致硬件依赖性和性能有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种实用的与硬件无关的可微分渲染器，称为 Dressi，它基于新的完整 AD 设计。 Dressi的容灾算法完全由我们基于Vulkan的容灾AD——Dressi-AD编写，支持容灾的所有原语操作。 Dressi-AD 及其内部的逆 UV 技术带来了硬件独立性和图形硬件加速。阶段打包是我们的运行时优化技术，可以适应硬件限制，并考虑到 Vulkan 的渲染通道层次结构，利用反应式缓存高效执行 DR 的复杂计算图。 HardSoftRas 是我们新颖的渲染过程，专为使用图形管道进行逆渲染而设计。在图形管道的有限功能下，HardSoftRas 可以将像素的梯度从屏幕空间传播到远范围的三角形属性。我们的实验和应用表明，Dressi 建立了硬件独立性、高质量和稳健的优化，速度快，以及逼真的渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dressi的硬件无关可微渲染器，通过全自动微分设计和新型渲染技术实现高效优化与逼真渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有基于光栅化的可微渲染方法依赖特定硬件（如CUDA）和手动实现的模块，导致硬件依赖性强且性能受限。
AI.method: 基于Vulkan构建全自动微分框架Dressi-AD，结合逆UV技术、动态着色器打包（Stage Packing）和HardSoftRas渲染流程，实现跨硬件的梯度传播与高效计算。
AI.result: Dressi实现了硬件无关性、高质量优化与快速渲染，在逆向渲染任务中展现出优越的性能和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Dressi通过创新的自动微分架构和渲染技术，解决了传统可微渲染的硬件依赖与性能瓶颈问题，为跨平台图形优化提供了新方案。

authors_text: Daniel Bertschinger,Christoph Hertrich,Paul Jungeblut,Tillmann Miltzow,Simon Weber
title: Training Fully Connected Neural Networks is $\exists\mathbb{R}$-Complete
title_zh: 训练全连接神经网络 $\exists\mathbb{R}$-Complete
comment: 39 pages, 17 figures. Changes in version 2: Added algebraic universality result, improved interpretation of results Changes in version 3: Improved exposition by formalizing properties of gadgets
comments: 39 pages, 17 figures. Changes in version 2: Added algebraic universality result, improved interpretation of results Changes in version 3: Improved exposition by formalizing properties of gadgets
abstract: We consider the problem of finding weights and biases for a two-layer fully connected neural network to fit a given set of data points as well as possible, also known as EmpiricalRiskMinimization. Our main result is that the associated decision problem is $\exists\mathbb{R}$-complete, that is, polynomial-time equivalent to determining whether a multivariate polynomial with integer coefficients has any real roots. Furthermore, we prove that algebraic numbers of arbitrarily large degree are required as weights to be able to train some instances to optimality, even if all data points are rational. Our result already applies to fully connected instances with two inputs, two outputs, and one hidden layer of ReLU neurons. Thereby, we strengthen a result by Abrahamsen, Kleist and Miltzow [NeurIPS 2021]. A consequence of this is that a combinatorial search algorithm like the one by Arora, Basu, Mianjy and Mukherjee [ICLR 2018] is impossible for networks with more than one output dimension, unless $\mathsf{NP}=\exists\mathbb{R}$.
summary: We consider the problem of finding weights and biases for a two-layer fully connected neural network to fit a given set of data points as well as possible, also known as EmpiricalRiskMinimization. Our main result is that the associated decision problem is $\exists\mathbb{R}$-complete, that is, polynomial-time equivalent to determining whether a multivariate polynomial with integer coefficients has any real roots. Furthermore, we prove that algebraic numbers of arbitrarily large degree are required as weights to be able to train some instances to optimality, even if all data points are rational. Our result already applies to fully connected instances with two inputs, two outputs, and one hidden layer of ReLU neurons. Thereby, we strengthen a result by Abrahamsen, Kleist and Miltzow [NeurIPS 2021]. A consequence of this is that a combinatorial search algorithm like the one by Arora, Basu, Mianjy and Mukherjee [ICLR 2018] is impossible for networks with more than one output dimension, unless $\mathsf{NP}=\exists\mathbb{R}$.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑寻找两层全连接神经网络的权重和偏差以尽可能拟合给定数据点集的问题，也称为经验风险最小化。我们的主要结果是相关的决策问题是 $\exists\mathbb{R}$-complete 的，即多项式时间相当于确定具有整数系数的多元多项式是否有实数根。此外，我们证明，即使所有数据点都是有理数，也需要任意大阶的代数数作为权重才能训练某些实例达到最优。我们的结果已经适用于具有两个输入、两个输出和一个 ReLU 神经元隐藏层的完全连接实例。因此，我们强化了 Abrahamsen、Kleist 和 Miltzow 的结果 [NeurIPS 2021]。其结果是，像 Arora、Basu、Mianjy 和 Mukherjee [ICLR 2018] 这样的组合搜索算法对于具有多个输出维度的网络来说是不可能的，除非 $\mathsf{NP}=\exists\mathbb{R}$。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了训练两层全连接神经网络的决策问题是∃ℝ-完全的，表明其计算复杂性与多项式实根判定等价。
AI.motivation: 研究神经网络训练的计算复杂性，揭示其与经典数学问题的关联性，并分析现有训练算法的理论局限。
AI.method: 通过计算复杂性理论，将神经网络训练问题归约到∃ℝ问题，并构造特定实例证明代数数的必要性。
AI.result: 证明两层全连接网络的训练问题为∃ℝ-完全，且需要任意高次代数数权重；推翻多输出网络使用组合搜索算法的可能性（除非NP=∃ℝ）。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络训练具有本质的计算复杂性，现有高效算法在多输出场景下可能不存在，需重新审视训练方法的理论边界。

search_text: Training Fully Connected Neural Networks is $\exists\mathbb{R}$-Complete 训练全连接神经网络 $\exists\mathbb{R}$-Complete We consider the problem of finding weights and biases for a two-layer fully connected neural network to fit a given set of data points as well as possible, also known as EmpiricalRiskMinimization. Our main result is that the associated decision problem is $\exists\mathbb{R}$-complete, that is, polynomial-time equivalent to determining whether a multivariate polynomial with integer coefficients has any real roots. Furthermore, we prove that algebraic numbers of arbitrarily large degree are required as weights to be able to train some instances to optimality, even if all data points are rational. Our result already applies to fully connected instances with two inputs, two outputs, and one hidden layer of ReLU neurons. Thereby, we strengthen a result by Abrahamsen, Kleist and Miltzow [NeurIPS 2021]. A consequence of this is that a combinatorial search algorithm like the one by Arora, Basu, Mianjy and Mukherjee [ICLR 2018] is impossible for networks with more than one output dimension, unless $\mathsf{NP}=\exists\mathbb{R}$. 我们考虑寻找两层全连接神经网络的权重和偏差以尽可能拟合给定数据点集的问题，也称为经验风险最小化。我们的主要结果是相关的决策问题是 $\exists\mathbb{R}$-complete 的，即多项式时间相当于确定具有整数系数的多元多项式是否有实数根。此外，我们证明，即使所有数据点都是有理数，也需要任意大阶的代数数作为权重才能训练某些实例达到最优。我们的结果已经适用于具有两个输入、两个输出和一个 ReLU 神经元隐藏层的完全连接实例。因此，我们强化了 Abrahamsen、Kleist 和 Miltzow 的结果 [NeurIPS 2021]。其结果是，像 Arora、Basu、Mianjy 和 Mukherjee [ICLR 2018] 这样的组合搜索算法对于具有多个输出维度的网络来说是不可能的，除非 $\mathsf{NP}=\exists\mathbb{R}$。 本文证明了训练两层全连接神经网络的决策问题是∃ℝ-完全的，表明其计算复杂性与多项式实根判定等价。 Daniel Bertschinger,Christoph Hertrich,Paul Jungeblut,Tillmann Miltzow,Simon Weber cs.CC,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Steffen Jung,Margret Keuper
title: Learning to solve Minimum Cost Multicuts efficiently using Edge-Weighted Graph Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 学习使用边缘加权图卷积神经网络有效解决最小成本多重切割
abstract: The minimum cost multicut problem is the NP-hard/APX-hard combinatorial optimization problem of partitioning a real-valued edge-weighted graph such as to minimize the total cost of the partition. While graph convolutional neural networks (GNN) have proven to be promising in the context of combinatorial optimization, most of them are only tailored to or tested on positive-valued edge weights, i.e. they do not comply to the nature of the multicut problem. We therefore adapt various GNN architectures including Graph Convolutional Networks, Signed Graph Convolutional Networks and Graph Isomorphic Networks to facilitate the efficient encoding of real-valued edge costs. Moreover, we employ a reformulation of the multicut ILP constraints to a polynomial program as loss function that allows to learn feasible multicut solutions in a scalable way. Thus, we provide the first approach towards end-to-end trainable multicuts. Our findings support that GNN approaches can produce good solutions in practice while providing lower computation times and largely improved scalability compared to LP solvers and optimized heuristics, especially when considering large instances.
summary: The minimum cost multicut problem is the NP-hard/APX-hard combinatorial optimization problem of partitioning a real-valued edge-weighted graph such as to minimize the total cost of the partition. While graph convolutional neural networks (GNN) have proven to be promising in the context of combinatorial optimization, most of them are only tailored to or tested on positive-valued edge weights, i.e. they do not comply to the nature of the multicut problem. We therefore adapt various GNN architectures including Graph Convolutional Networks, Signed Graph Convolutional Networks and Graph Isomorphic Networks to facilitate the efficient encoding of real-valued edge costs. Moreover, we employ a reformulation of the multicut ILP constraints to a polynomial program as loss function that allows to learn feasible multicut solutions in a scalable way. Thus, we provide the first approach towards end-to-end trainable multicuts. Our findings support that GNN approaches can produce good solutions in practice while providing lower computation times and largely improved scalability compared to LP solvers and optimized heuristics, especially when considering large instances.
abstract_zh: 最小成本多割问题是对实值边加权图进行分区的 NP 难/APX 难组合优化问题，例如最小化分区的总成本。虽然图卷积神经网络（GNN）已被证明在组合优化方面很有前景，但它们中的大多数仅针对正值边权重进行定制或测试，即它们不符合多切割问题的本质。因此，我们采用了各种 GNN 架构，包括图卷积网络、有符号图卷积网络和图同构网络，以促进实值边缘成本的有效编码。此外，我们将多切割 ILP 约束重新表述为多项式程序作为损失函数，允许以可扩展的方式学习可行的多切割解决方案。因此，我们提供了第一种实现端到端可训练多重切割的方法。我们的研究结果表明，与 LP 求解器和优化启发式方法相比，GNN 方法可以在实践中产生良好的解决方案，同时提供更短的计算时间并大大提高可扩展性，特别是在考虑大型实例时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用边权重图卷积神经网络（GNN）高效解决最小费用多割问题，通过适应不同GNN架构和重构整数线性规划约束为多项式损失函数，实现端到端训练。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN方法多针对正权重边设计，无法有效处理多割问题中的实数边权重，且传统求解器在大规模实例上效率低下。
AI.method: 改编多种GNN架构（如图卷积网络、带符号GNN、图同构网络）以编码实数边权重，并将多割整数规划约束转化为多项式损失函数，实现可扩展的端到端训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，GNN方法在保持解质量的同时，计算时间显著低于线性规划求解器和优化启发式算法，尤其在大规模实例中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: GNN为多割问题提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案，证明了其在组合优化任务中的实用性和优势。
