authors_text: Mohammed A. M. Elhassan,Chenhui Yang,Chenxi Huang,Tewodros Legesse Munea
title: Technical Report on Subspace Pyramid Fusion Network for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的子空间金字塔融合网络技术报告
abstract: The following is a technical report to test the validity of the proposed Subspace Pyramid Fusion Module (SPFM) to capture multi-scale feature representations, which is more useful for semantic segmentation. In this investigation, we have proposed the Efficient Shuffle Attention Module(ESAM) to reconstruct the skip-connections paths by fusing multi-level global context features. Experimental results on two well-known semantic segmentation datasets, including Camvid and Cityscapes, show the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: The following is a technical report to test the validity of the proposed Subspace Pyramid Fusion Module (SPFM) to capture multi-scale feature representations, which is more useful for semantic segmentation. In this investigation, we have proposed the Efficient Shuffle Attention Module(ESAM) to reconstruct the skip-connections paths by fusing multi-level global context features. Experimental results on two well-known semantic segmentation datasets, including Camvid and Cityscapes, show the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 以下是一份技术报告，用于测试所提出的子空间金字塔融合模块（SPFM）捕获多尺度特征表示的有效性，这对于语义分割更有用。在本研究中，我们提出了高效洗牌注意力模块（ESAM），通过融合多级全局上下文特征来重建跳过连接路径。在两个著名的语义分割数据集（包括 Camvid 和 Cityscapes）上的实验结果表明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出子空间金字塔融合网络（SPFM）和高效混洗注意力模块（ESAM），用于改进语义分割中的多尺度特征融合与跳跃连接重建。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割方法在多尺度特征表示和跳跃连接路径重建方面存在局限，需更有效的模块来提升分割精度。
AI.method: 设计SPFM模块捕捉多尺度特征，结合ESAM模块通过融合多级全局上下文特征重建跳跃连接路径。
AI.result: 在Camvid和Cityscapes数据集上的实验验证了所提方法的有效性，显著提升了语义分割性能。
AI.conclusion: SPFM与ESAM的结合有效增强了多尺度特征建模能力，为语义分割任务提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Mugalodi Rakesh,Jogendra Nath Kundu,Varun Jampani,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Aligning Silhouette Topology for Self-Adaptive 3D Human Pose Recovery
title_zh: 对齐轮廓拓扑以实现自适应 3D 人体姿势恢复
abstract: Articulation-centric 2D/3D pose supervision forms the core training objective in most existing 3D human pose estimation techniques. Except for synthetic source environments, acquiring such rich supervision for each real target domain at deployment is highly inconvenient. However, we realize that standard foreground silhouette estimation techniques (on static camera feeds) remain unaffected by domain-shifts. Motivated by this, we propose a novel target adaptation framework that relies only on silhouette supervision to adapt a source-trained model-based regressor. However, in the absence of any auxiliary cue (multi-view, depth, or 2D pose), an isolated silhouette loss fails to provide a reliable pose-specific gradient and requires to be employed in tandem with a topology-centric loss. To this end, we develop a series of convolution-friendly spatial transformations in order to disentangle a topological-skeleton representation from the raw silhouette. Such a design paves the way to devise a Chamfer-inspired spatial topological-alignment loss via distance field computation, while effectively avoiding any gradient hindering spatial-to-pointset mapping. Experimental results demonstrate our superiority against prior-arts in self-adapting a source trained model to diverse unlabeled target domains, such as a) in-the-wild datasets, b) low-resolution image domains, and c) adversarially perturbed image domains (via UAP).
summary: Articulation-centric 2D/3D pose supervision forms the core training objective in most existing 3D human pose estimation techniques. Except for synthetic source environments, acquiring such rich supervision for each real target domain at deployment is highly inconvenient. However, we realize that standard foreground silhouette estimation techniques (on static camera feeds) remain unaffected by domain-shifts. Motivated by this, we propose a novel target adaptation framework that relies only on silhouette supervision to adapt a source-trained model-based regressor. However, in the absence of any auxiliary cue (multi-view, depth, or 2D pose), an isolated silhouette loss fails to provide a reliable pose-specific gradient and requires to be employed in tandem with a topology-centric loss. To this end, we develop a series of convolution-friendly spatial transformations in order to disentangle a topological-skeleton representation from the raw silhouette. Such a design paves the way to devise a Chamfer-inspired spatial topological-alignment loss via distance field computation, while effectively avoiding any gradient hindering spatial-to-pointset mapping. Experimental results demonstrate our superiority against prior-arts in self-adapting a source trained model to diverse unlabeled target domains, such as a) in-the-wild datasets, b) low-resolution image domains, and c) adversarially perturbed image domains (via UAP).
abstract_zh: 以关节为中心的 2D/3D 姿势监督构成了大多数现有 3D 人体姿势估计技术的核心训练目标。除了合成源环境之外，在部署时为每个真实目标域获取如此丰富的监督非常不方便。然而，我们意识到标准前景轮廓估计技术（在静态相机馈送上）仍然不受域移位的影响。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的目标适应框架，该框架仅依赖于轮廓监督来适应基于源训练的模型的回归器。然而，在没有任何辅助线索（多视图、深度或 2D 姿势）的情况下，孤立的轮廓损失无法提供可靠的特定姿势梯度，需要与以拓扑为中心的损失一起使用。为此，我们开发了一系列适合卷积的空间变换，以便从原始轮廓中分离出拓扑骨架表示。这种设计为通过距离场计算设计倒角启发的空间拓扑对齐损失铺平了道路，同时有效地避免了任何阻碍空间到点集映射的梯度。实验结果证明，我们在将源训练模型自适应到各种未标记的目标域方面相对于现有技术的优越性，例如a）野外数据集，b）低分辨率图像域，以及c）对抗性扰动图像域（通过UAP）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于轮廓拓扑对齐的自适应3D人体姿态恢复方法，仅利用轮廓监督实现跨域模型适配。
AI.motivation: 现有3D姿态估计方法依赖2D/3D姿态标注，难以适应真实场景。而轮廓估计技术具有领域不变性，可作为替代监督信号。
AI.method: 设计卷积友好型空间变换分离拓扑骨架表示，结合距离场计算的Chamfer式拓扑对齐损失，实现无辅助信号的轮廓驱动姿态恢复。
AI.result: 在野外数据集、低分辨率域和对抗扰动域中，优于现有方法的跨域自适应性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过轮廓拓扑对齐机制，实现了无需额外标注的领域自适应3D姿态估计，拓展了模型部署场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于轮廓拓扑对齐的自适应3D人体姿态恢复方法，仅利用轮廓监督实现跨域模型适配。
ai_content.motivation: 现有3D姿态估计方法依赖2D/3D姿态标注，难以适应真实场景。而轮廓估计技术具有领域不变性，可作为替代监督信号。

ai_content.result: 在野外数据集、低分辨率域和对抗扰动域中，优于现有方法的跨域自适应性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过轮廓拓扑对齐机制，实现了无需额外标注的领域自适应3D姿态估计，拓展了模型部署场景。

motivation: 现有3D姿态估计方法依赖2D/3D姿态标注，难以适应真实场景。而轮廓估计技术具有领域不变性，可作为替代监督信号。
method: 设计卷积友好型空间变换分离拓扑骨架表示，结合距离场计算的Chamfer式拓扑对齐损失，实现无辅助信号的轮廓驱动姿态恢复。
result: 在野外数据集、低分辨率域和对抗扰动域中，优于现有方法的跨域自适应性能。
conclusion: 通过轮廓拓扑对齐机制，实现了无需额外标注的领域自适应3D姿态估计，拓展了模型部署场景。
search_text: Aligning Silhouette Topology for Self-Adaptive 3D Human Pose Recovery 对齐轮廓拓扑以实现自适应 3D 人体姿势恢复 Articulation-centric 2D/3D pose supervision forms the core training objective in most existing 3D human pose estimation techniques. Except for synthetic source environments, acquiring such rich supervision for each real target domain at deployment is highly inconvenient. However, we realize that standard foreground silhouette estimation techniques (on static camera feeds) remain unaffected by domain-shifts. Motivated by this, we propose a novel target adaptation framework that relies only on silhouette supervision to adapt a source-trained model-based regressor. However, in the absence of any auxiliary cue (multi-view, depth, or 2D pose), an isolated silhouette loss fails to provide a reliable pose-specific gradient and requires to be employed in tandem with a topology-centric loss. To this end, we develop a series of convolution-friendly spatial transformations in order to disentangle a topological-skeleton representation from the raw silhouette. Such a design paves the way to devise a Chamfer-inspired spatial topological-alignment loss via distance field computation, while effectively avoiding any gradient hindering spatial-to-pointset mapping. Experimental results demonstrate our superiority against prior-arts in self-adapting a source trained model to diverse unlabeled target domains, such as a) in-the-wild datasets, b) low-resolution image domains, and c) adversarially perturbed image domains (via UAP). 以关节为中心的 2D/3D 姿势监督构成了大多数现有 3D 人体姿势估计技术的核心训练目标。除了合成源环境之外，在部署时为每个真实目标域获取如此丰富的监督非常不方便。然而，我们意识到标准前景轮廓估计技术（在静态相机馈送上）仍然不受域移位的影响。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的目标适应框架，该框架仅依赖于轮廓监督来适应基于源训练的模型的回归器。然而，在没有任何辅助线索（多视图、深度或 2D 姿势）的情况下，孤立的轮廓损失无法提供可靠的特定姿势梯度，需要与以拓扑为中心的损失一起使用。为此，我们开发了一系列适合卷积的空间变换，以便从原始轮廓中分离出拓扑骨架表示。这种设计为通过距离场计算设计倒角启发的空间拓扑对齐损失铺平了道路，同时有效地避免了任何阻碍空间到点集映射的梯度。实验结果证明，我们在将源训练模型自适应到各种未标记的目标域方面相对于现有技术的优越性，例如a）野外数据集，b）低分辨率图像域，以及c）对抗性扰动图像域（通过UAP）。 本文提出一种基于轮廓拓扑对齐的自适应3D人体姿态恢复方法，仅利用轮廓监督实现跨域模型适配。 Mugalodi Rakesh,Jogendra Nath Kundu,Varun Jampani,R. Venkatesh Babu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jihwan Lee,Joun Yeop Lee,Heejin Choi,Seongkyu Mun,Sangjun Park,Jae-Sung Bae,Chanwoo Kim
title: Into-TTS : Intonation Template Based Prosody Control System
title_zh: Into-TTS：基于语调模板的韵律控制系统
abstract: Intonations play an important role in delivering the intention of a speaker. However, current end-to-end TTS systems often fail to model proper intonations. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel, intuitive method to synthesize speech in different intonations using predefined intonation templates. Prior to TTS model training, speech data are grouped into intonation templates in an unsupervised manner. Two proposed modules are added to the end-to-end TTS framework: an intonation predictor and an intonation encoder. The intonation predictor recommends a suitable intonation template to the given text. The intonation encoder, attached to the text encoder output, synthesizes speech abiding the requested intonation template. Main contributions of our paper are: (a) an easy-to-use intonation control system covering a wide range of users; (b) better performance in wrapping speech in a requested intonation with improved objective and subjective evaluation; and (c) incorporating a pre-trained language model for intonation modelling. Audio samples are available at https://srtts.github.io/IntoTTS.
summary: Intonations play an important role in delivering the intention of a speaker. However, current end-to-end TTS systems often fail to model proper intonations. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel, intuitive method to synthesize speech in different intonations using predefined intonation templates. Prior to TTS model training, speech data are grouped into intonation templates in an unsupervised manner. Two proposed modules are added to the end-to-end TTS framework: an intonation predictor and an intonation encoder. The intonation predictor recommends a suitable intonation template to the given text. The intonation encoder, attached to the text encoder output, synthesizes speech abiding the requested intonation template. Main contributions of our paper are: (a) an easy-to-use intonation control system covering a wide range of users; (b) better performance in wrapping speech in a requested intonation with improved objective and subjective evaluation; and (c) incorporating a pre-trained language model for intonation modelling. Audio samples are available at https://srtts.github.io/IntoTTS.
abstract_zh: 语调对于表达说话者的意图起着重要作用。然而，当前的端到端 TTS 系统通常无法对正确的语调进行建模。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖、直观的方法，使用预定义的语调模板合成不同语调的语音。在 TTS 模型训练之前，语音数据以无监督的方式分组为语调模板。端到端 TTS 框架中添加了两个提议的模块：语调预测器和语调编码器。语调预测器为给定文本推荐合适的语调模板。连接到文本编码器输出的语调编码器根据所请求的语调模板合成语音。我们论文的主要贡献是：（a）一个易于使用的语调控制系统，覆盖广泛的用户； (b) 更好地按照要求的语调表达语音，并改进客观和主观评价； (c) 结合用于语调建模的预训练语言模型。音频样本可在 https://srtts.github.io/IntoTTS 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语调模板的端到端TTS系统，通过预定义语调模板实现对语音语调的控制。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端TTS系统难以准确建模语调，导致合成语音的意图表达不清晰，需改进语调控制方法。
AI.method: 通过无监督方式将语音数据分组为语调模板，引入语调预测模块和语调编码模块，结合预训练语言模型实现语调控制。
AI.result: 在目标语调匹配任务中表现优于现有方法，客观指标和主观评价均得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种用户友好的语调控制系统，通过模板化方法和预训练模型有效提升了语调合成质量。

authors_text: Libo Sun,Wei Yin,Enze Xie,Zhengrong Li,Changming Sun,Chunhua Shen
title: Improving Monocular Visual Odometry Using Learned Depth
title_zh: 使用学习深度改进单目视觉里程计
abstract: Monocular visual odometry (VO) is an important task in robotics and computer vision. Thus far, how to build accurate and robust monocular VO systems that can work well in diverse scenarios remains largely unsolved. In this paper, we propose a framework to exploit monocular depth estimation for improving VO. The core of our framework is a monocular depth estimation module with a strong generalization capability for diverse scenes. It consists of two separate working modes to assist the localization and mapping. With a single monocular image input, the depth estimation module predicts a relative depth to help the localization module on improving the accuracy. With a sparse depth map and an RGB image input, the depth estimation module can generate accurate scale-consistent depth for dense mapping. Compared with current learning-based VO methods, our method demonstrates a stronger generalization ability to diverse scenes. More significantly, our framework is able to boost the performances of existing geometry-based VO methods by a large margin.
summary: Monocular visual odometry (VO) is an important task in robotics and computer vision. Thus far, how to build accurate and robust monocular VO systems that can work well in diverse scenarios remains largely unsolved. In this paper, we propose a framework to exploit monocular depth estimation for improving VO. The core of our framework is a monocular depth estimation module with a strong generalization capability for diverse scenes. It consists of two separate working modes to assist the localization and mapping. With a single monocular image input, the depth estimation module predicts a relative depth to help the localization module on improving the accuracy. With a sparse depth map and an RGB image input, the depth estimation module can generate accurate scale-consistent depth for dense mapping. Compared with current learning-based VO methods, our method demonstrates a stronger generalization ability to diverse scenes. More significantly, our framework is able to boost the performances of existing geometry-based VO methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 单目视觉里程计（VO）是机器人和计算机视觉领域的一项重要任务。到目前为止，如何构建能够在不同场景下良好工作的准确、鲁棒的单目 VO 系统在很大程度上仍未得到解决。在本文中，我们提出了一个利用单目深度估计来改进 VO 的框架。我们框架的核心是单目深度估计模块，对不同场景具有很强的泛化能力。它由两种独立的工作模式组成，以协助定位和建图。通过单目图像输入，深度估计模块预测相对深度，以帮助定位模块提高精度。通过稀疏深度图和 RGB 图像输入，深度估计模块可以为密集映射生成精确的比例一致深度。与当前基于学习的 VO 方法相比，我们的方法对不同场景表现出更强的泛化能力。更重要的是，我们的框架能够大幅提升现有基于几何的 VO 方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用学习到的深度信息改进单目视觉里程计（VO）的框架，通过增强定位与建图的鲁棒性以应对多样场景。
AI.motivation: 现有单目VO方法在复杂场景下存在精度不足和泛化能力弱的问题，需探索更稳健的深度估计与融合策略。
AI.method: 设计包含两种工作模式的深度估计模块：单图像输入时预测相对深度辅助定位，结合稀疏深度图与RGB图像生成尺度一致的深度用于密集建图。
AI.result: 相较现有基于学习的VO方法，本方法在多场景下展现更强泛化能力，并显著提升传统几何法VO性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度学习与几何方法的结合，有效解决了单目VO在复杂环境中的鲁棒性与精度问题，为相关领域提供新思路。

Thus far, how to build accurate and robust monocular VO systems that can work well in diverse scenarios remains largely unsolved. In this paper, we propose a framework to exploit monocular depth estimation for improving VO. authors_text: Liqian Ma,Stamatios Georgoulis,Xu Jia,Luc Van Gool
title: FoV-Net: Field-of-View Extrapolation Using Self-Attention and Uncertainty
title_zh: FoV-Net：使用自注意力和不确定性进行视场外推
comment: Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters and ICRA2021. Project page http://charliememory.github.io/RAL21_FoV
comments: Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters and ICRA2021. Project page http://charliememory.github.io/RAL21_FoV
abstract: The ability to make educated predictions about their surroundings, and associate them with certain confidence, is important for intelligent systems, like autonomous vehicles and robots. It allows them to plan early and decide accordingly. Motivated by this observation, in this paper we utilize information from a video sequence with a narrow field-of-view to infer the scene at a wider field-of-view. To this end, we propose a temporally consistent field-of-view extrapolation framework, namely FoV-Net, that: (1) leverages 3D information to propagate the observed scene parts from past frames; (2) aggregates the propagated multi-frame information using an attention-based feature aggregation module and a gated self-attention module, simultaneously hallucinating any unobserved scene parts; and (3) assigns an interpretable uncertainty value at each pixel. Extensive experiments show that FoV-Net does not only extrapolate the temporally consistent wide field-of-view scene better than existing alternatives, but also provides the associated uncertainty which may benefit critical decision-making downstream applications. Project page is at http://charliememory.github.io/RAL21_FoV.
summary: The ability to make educated predictions about their surroundings, and associate them with certain confidence, is important for intelligent systems, like autonomous vehicles and robots. It allows them to plan early and decide accordingly. Motivated by this observation, in this paper we utilize information from a video sequence with a narrow field-of-view to infer the scene at a wider field-of-view. To this end, we propose a temporally consistent field-of-view extrapolation framework, namely FoV-Net, that: (1) leverages 3D information to propagate the observed scene parts from past frames; (2) aggregates the propagated multi-frame information using an attention-based feature aggregation module and a gated self-attention module, simultaneously hallucinating any unobserved scene parts; and (3) assigns an interpretable uncertainty value at each pixel. Extensive experiments show that FoV-Net does not only extrapolate the temporally consistent wide field-of-view scene better than existing alternatives, but also provides the associated uncertainty which may benefit critical decision-making downstream applications. Project page is at http://charliememory.github.io/RAL21_FoV.
abstract_zh: 对周围环境做出有根据的预测并将其与一定的置信度联系起来的能力对于自动驾驶汽车和机器人等智能系统非常重要。它使他们能够尽早计划并做出相应的决定。受这一观察的启发，在本文中，我们利用窄视场视频序列中的信息来推断更宽视场的场景。为此，我们提出了一个时间一致的视场外推框架，即 FoV-Net，它：（1）利用 3D 信息来传播过去帧中观察到的场景部分； （2）使用基于注意力的特征聚合模块和门控自注意力模块聚合传播的多帧信息，同时幻觉任何未观察到的场景部分； (3) 为每个像素分配一个可解释的不确定性值。大量实验表明，FoV-Net 不仅比现有替代方案更好地推断出时间一致的宽视场场景，而且还提供了相关的不确定性，这可能有利于关键决策下游应用。项目页面位于 http://charliememory.github.io/RAL21_FoV。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FoV-Net框架，通过自注意力机制和不确定性估计，利用窄视野视频序列预测更宽视野的场景。
AI.motivation: 智能系统（如自动驾驶和机器人）需要预测环境并赋予置信度以支持早期规划和决策，现有方法难以从窄视野推断宽视野场景。
AI.method: 提出FoV-Net框架：1）利用3D信息传播历史帧的场景部分；2）通过注意力模块和门控自注意力模块聚合多帧信息并生成未观测区域；3）为每个像素分配可解释的不确定性值。
AI.result: 实验表明FoV-Net在时序一致性宽视野预测任务中优于现有方法，并能提供有助于下游决策的不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: FoV-Net通过结合自注意力与不确定性估计，有效实现了窄视野到宽视野的时序一致场景推断，为自动驾驶等应用提供可靠决策依据。

authors_text: Minsu Kim,Joanna Hong,Se Jin Park,Yong Man Ro
title: Multi-modality Associative Bridging through Memory: Speech Sound Recollected from Face Video
title_zh: 通过记忆进行多模态联想桥接：从面部视频中回忆语音
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel audio-visual multi-modal bridging framework that can utilize both audio and visual information, even with uni-modal inputs. We exploit a memory network that stores source (i.e., visual) and target (i.e., audio) modal representations, where source modal representation is what we are given, and target modal representations are what we want to obtain from the memory network. We then construct an associative bridge between source and target memories that considers the interrelationship between the two memories. By learning the interrelationship through the associative bridge, the proposed bridging framework is able to obtain the target modal representations inside the memory network, even with the source modal input only, and it provides rich information for its downstream tasks. We apply the proposed framework to two tasks: lip reading and speech reconstruction from silent video. Through the proposed associative bridge and modality-specific memories, each task knowledge is enriched with the recalled audio context, achieving state-of-the-art performance. We also verify that the associative bridge properly relates the source and target memories.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel audio-visual multi-modal bridging framework that can utilize both audio and visual information, even with uni-modal inputs. We exploit a memory network that stores source (i.e., visual) and target (i.e., audio) modal representations, where source modal representation is what we are given, and target modal representations are what we want to obtain from the memory network. We then construct an associative bridge between source and target memories that considers the interrelationship between the two memories. By learning the interrelationship through the associative bridge, the proposed bridging framework is able to obtain the target modal representations inside the memory network, even with the source modal input only, and it provides rich information for its downstream tasks. We apply the proposed framework to two tasks: lip reading and speech reconstruction from silent video. Through the proposed associative bridge and modality-specific memories, each task knowledge is enriched with the recalled audio context, achieving state-of-the-art performance. We also verify that the associative bridge properly relates the source and target memories.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的视听多模态桥接框架，即使使用单模态输入，也可以利用音频和视觉信息。我们利用存储源（即视觉）和目标（即音频）模态表示的记忆网络，其中源模态表示是我们给定的，目标模态表示是我们想要从记忆网络获得的。然后，我们在源记忆和目标记忆之间构建一座联想桥梁，考虑两个记忆之间的相互关系。通过通过关联桥学习相互关系，所提出的桥接框架能够获得记忆网络内的目标模态表示，即使仅具有源模态输入，并且它为其下游任务提供丰富的信息。我们将所提出的框架应用于两项任务：唇读和无声视频中的语音重建。通过所提出的联想桥和特定模态记忆，每个任务知识都通过回忆的音频上下文得到丰富，从而实现了最先进的性能。我们还验证了联想桥是否正确关联源记忆和目标记忆。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态关联桥接框架，通过记忆网络实现从视觉信息中重建语音信号，应用于唇读和静音视频语音重建任务。
AI.motivation: 传统单模态方法在处理跨模态任务时存在信息缺失问题，需探索如何通过记忆网络建立视觉与听觉模态的关联性以提升任务性能。
AI.method: 构建包含源模态（视觉）和目标模态（音频）表示的记忆网络，通过关联桥接结构学习模态间关系，实现单模态输入下的跨模态信息检索与重建。
AI.result: 在唇读和静音视频语音重建任务中达到SOTA性能，验证了关联桥接结构有效关联源目标记忆并提升任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过记忆网络与关联桥接机制实现了高效的跨模态信息交互，为多模态学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dongsu Zhang,Changwoon Choi,Inbum Park,Young Min Kim
title: Probabilistic Implicit Scene Completion
title_zh: 概率隐式场景完成
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2022 as spotlight, code available at https://github.com/96lives/gca
comments: Accepted to ICLR 2022 as spotlight, code available at https://github.com/96lives/gca
abstract: We propose a probabilistic shape completion method extended to the continuous geometry of large-scale 3D scenes. Real-world scans of 3D scenes suffer from a considerable amount of missing data cluttered with unsegmented objects. The problem of shape completion is inherently ill-posed, and high-quality result requires scalable solutions that consider multiple possible outcomes. We employ the Generative Cellular Automata that learns the multi-modal distribution and transform the formulation to process large-scale continuous geometry. The local continuous shape is incrementally generated as a sparse voxel embedding, which contains the latent code for each occupied cell. We formally derive that our training objective for the sparse voxel embedding maximizes the variational lower bound of the complete shape distribution and therefore our progressive generation constitutes a valid generative model. Experiments show that our model successfully generates diverse plausible scenes faithful to the input, especially when the input suffers from a significant amount of missing data. We also demonstrate that our approach outperforms deterministic models even in less ambiguous cases with a small amount of missing data, which infers that probabilistic formulation is crucial for high-quality geometry completion on input scans exhibiting any levels of completeness.
summary: We propose a probabilistic shape completion method extended to the continuous geometry of large-scale 3D scenes. Real-world scans of 3D scenes suffer from a considerable amount of missing data cluttered with unsegmented objects. The problem of shape completion is inherently ill-posed, and high-quality result requires scalable solutions that consider multiple possible outcomes. We employ the Generative Cellular Automata that learns the multi-modal distribution and transform the formulation to process large-scale continuous geometry. The local continuous shape is incrementally generated as a sparse voxel embedding, which contains the latent code for each occupied cell. We formally derive that our training objective for the sparse voxel embedding maximizes the variational lower bound of the complete shape distribution and therefore our progressive generation constitutes a valid generative model. Experiments show that our model successfully generates diverse plausible scenes faithful to the input, especially when the input suffers from a significant amount of missing data. We also demonstrate that our approach outperforms deterministic models even in less ambiguous cases with a small amount of missing data, which infers that probabilistic formulation is crucial for high-quality geometry completion on input scans exhibiting any levels of completeness.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种扩展到大规模 3D 场景的连续几何形状的概率形状补全方法。真实世界的 3D 场景扫描存在大量丢失数据和未分段对象的问题。形状完成的问题本质上是不适定的，高质量的结果需要考虑多种可能结果的可扩展解决方案。我们采用生成元胞自动机来学习多模态分布并转换公式以处理大规模连续几何。局部连续形状作为稀疏体素嵌入增量生成，其中包含每个占用单元的潜在代码。我们正式推导出稀疏体素嵌入的训练目标最大化了完整形状分布的变分下界，因此我们的渐进式生成构成了有效的生成模型。实验表明，我们的模型成功地生成了忠实于输入的各种可信场景，尤其是当输入存在大量丢失数据时。我们还证明，即使在具有少量缺失数据的不太模糊的情况下，我们的方法也优于确定性模型，这表明概率公式对于表现出任何完整性级别的输入扫描的高质量几何完成至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率的隐式场景补全方法，用于处理大规模3D场景中存在大量缺失数据的几何重建问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的3D场景扫描数据常存在严重缺失且混杂未分割物体，传统形状补全方法难以处理多模态不确定性，需开发能生成多种合理结果的可扩展解决方案。
AI.method: 采用生成细胞自动机学习多模态分布，通过稀疏体素嵌入逐步生成局部连续形状，并推导训练目标以最大化完整形状分布的变分下界。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在严重缺失数据下能生成多样且符合输入的场景，且在少量缺失情况下优于确定性模型，验证了概率框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 概率建模对于处理不同缺失程度的3D场景补全至关重要，该方法为大规模几何重建提供了有效生成模型。

search_text: Probabilistic Implicit Scene Completion 概率隐式场景完成 We propose a probabilistic shape completion method extended to the continuous geometry of large-scale 3D scenes. Real-world scans of 3D scenes suffer from a considerable amount of missing data cluttered with unsegmented objects. The problem of shape completion is inherently ill-posed, and high-quality result requires scalable solutions that consider multiple possible outcomes. We employ the Generative Cellular Automata that learns the multi-modal distribution and transform the formulation to process large-scale continuous geometry. The local continuous shape is incrementally generated as a sparse voxel embedding, which contains the latent code for each occupied cell. We formally derive that our training objective for the sparse voxel embedding maximizes the variational lower bound of the complete shape distribution and therefore our progressive generation constitutes a valid generative model. Experiments show that our model successfully generates diverse plausible scenes faithful to the input, especially when the input suffers from a significant amount of missing data. We also demonstrate that our approach outperforms deterministic models even in less ambiguous cases with a small amount of missing data, which infers that probabilistic formulation is crucial for high-quality geometry completion on input scans exhibiting any levels of completeness. 我们提出了一种扩展到大规模 3D 场景的连续几何形状的概率形状补全方法。真实世界的 3D 场景扫描存在大量丢失数据和未分段对象的问题。形状完成的问题本质上是不适定的，高质量的结果需要考虑多种可能结果的可扩展解决方案。我们采用生成元胞自动机来学习多模态分布并转换公式以处理大规模连续几何。局部连续形状作为稀疏体素嵌入增量生成，其中包含每个占用单元的潜在代码。我们正式推导出稀疏体素嵌入的训练目标最大化了完整形状分布的变分下界，因此我们的渐进式生成构成了有效的生成模型。实验表明，我们的模型成功地生成了忠实于输入的各种可信场景，尤其是当输入存在大量丢失数据时。我们还证明，即使在具有少量缺失数据的不太模糊的情况下，我们的方法也优于确定性模型，这表明概率公式对于表现出任何完整性级别的输入扫描的高质量几何完成至关重要。 本文提出一种基于概率的隐式场景补全方法，用于处理大规模3D场景中存在大量缺失数据的几何重建问题。 Dongsu Zhang,Changwoon Choi,Inbum Park,Young Min Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Liqian Ma,Lingjie Liu,Christian Theobalt,Luc Van Gool
title: Direct Dense Pose Estimation
title_zh: 直接密集姿态估计
abstract: Dense human pose estimation is the problem of learning dense correspondences between RGB images and the surfaces of human bodies, which finds various applications, such as human body reconstruction, human pose transfer, and human action recognition. Prior dense pose estimation methods are all based on Mask R-CNN framework and operate in a top-down manner of first attempting to identify a bounding box for each person and matching dense correspondences in each bounding box. Consequently, these methods lack robustness due to their critical dependence on the Mask R-CNN detection, and the runtime increases drastically as the number of persons in the image increases. We therefore propose a novel alternative method for solving the dense pose estimation problem, called Direct Dense Pose (DDP). DDP first predicts the instance mask and global IUV representation separately and then combines them together. We also propose a simple yet effective 2D temporal-smoothing scheme to alleviate the temporal jitters when dealing with video data. Experiments demonstrate that DDP overcomes the limitations of previous top-down baseline methods and achieves competitive accuracy. In addition, DDP is computationally more efficient than previous dense pose estimation methods, and it reduces jitters when applied to a video sequence, which is a problem plaguing the previous methods.
summary: Dense human pose estimation is the problem of learning dense correspondences between RGB images and the surfaces of human bodies, which finds various applications, such as human body reconstruction, human pose transfer, and human action recognition. Prior dense pose estimation methods are all based on Mask R-CNN framework and operate in a top-down manner of first attempting to identify a bounding box for each person and matching dense correspondences in each bounding box. Consequently, these methods lack robustness due to their critical dependence on the Mask R-CNN detection, and the runtime increases drastically as the number of persons in the image increases. We therefore propose a novel alternative method for solving the dense pose estimation problem, called Direct Dense Pose (DDP). DDP first predicts the instance mask and global IUV representation separately and then combines them together. We also propose a simple yet effective 2D temporal-smoothing scheme to alleviate the temporal jitters when dealing with video data. Experiments demonstrate that DDP overcomes the limitations of previous top-down baseline methods and achieves competitive accuracy. In addition, DDP is computationally more efficient than previous dense pose estimation methods, and it reduces jitters when applied to a video sequence, which is a problem plaguing the previous methods.
abstract_zh: 密集人体姿势估计是学习 RGB 图像和人体表面之间的密集对应关系的问题，它有多种应用，例如人体重建、人体姿势迁移和人体动作识别。现有的密集姿态估计方法均基于 Mask R-CNN 框架，并以自上而下的方式操作，首先尝试识别每个人的边界框并匹配每个边界框中的密集对应关系。因此，这些方法由于严重依赖 Mask R-CNN 检测而缺乏鲁棒性，并且随着图像中人数的增加，运行时间急剧增加。因此，我们提出了一种新的替代方法来解决密集姿态估计问题，称为直接密集姿态（DDP）。 DDP首先分别预测实例掩码和全局IUV表示，然后将它们组合在一起。我们还提出了一种简单而有效的 2D 时间平滑方案，以减轻处理视频数据时的时间抖动。实验表明，DDP 克服了以前自上而下基线方法的局限性，并实现了有竞争力的准确性。此外，DDP 在计算上比以前的密集姿态估计方法更高效，并且它减少了应用于视频序列时的抖动，这是困扰以前方法的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Direct Dense Pose (DDP)的新方法，用于解决密集人体姿态估计问题，通过预测实例掩码和全局IUV表示并结合，同时引入时间平滑方案处理视频数据。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Mask R-CNN的自上而下方法依赖实例检测，导致鲁棒性差且多人场景下运行效率低下，无法有效处理视频中的时间抖动问题。
AI.method: DDP方法分为两阶段：首先独立预测实例掩码和全局IUV表示，再将其融合；并提出简单有效的2D时间平滑方案以减少视频序列中的抖动。
AI.result: 实验表明DDP克服了传统方法的局限性，在准确率上具有竞争力，计算效率更高，且显著减少了视频处理中的时间抖动。
AI.conclusion: DDP为密集姿态估计提供了更高效、鲁棒的解决方案，尤其在视频场景中表现优于现有方法。

authors_text: Oskar Elek,Joseph N. Burchett,J. Xavier Prochaska,Angus G. Forbes
title: Monte Carlo Physarum Machine: Characteristics of Pattern Formation in Continuous Stochastic Transport Networks
title_zh: 蒙特卡洛绒泡机：连续随机传输网络中模式形成的特征
abstract: We present Monte Carlo Physarum Machine: a computational model suitable for reconstructing continuous transport networks from sparse 2D and 3D data. MCPM is a probabilistic generalization of Jones's 2010 agent-based model for simulating the growth of Physarum polycephalum slime mold. We compare MCPM to Jones's work on theoretical grounds, and describe a task-specific variant designed for reconstructing the large-scale distribution of gas and dark matter in the Universe known as the Cosmic web. To analyze the new model, we first explore MCPM's self-patterning behavior, showing a wide range of continuous network-like morphologies -- called "polyphorms" -- that the model produces from geometrically intuitive parameters. Applying MCPM to both simulated and observational cosmological datasets, we then evaluate its ability to produce consistent 3D density maps of the Cosmic web. Finally, we examine other possible tasks where MCPM could be useful, along with several examples of fitting to domain-specific data as proofs of concept.
summary: We present Monte Carlo Physarum Machine: a computational model suitable for reconstructing continuous transport networks from sparse 2D and 3D data. MCPM is a probabilistic generalization of Jones's 2010 agent-based model for simulating the growth of Physarum polycephalum slime mold. We compare MCPM to Jones's work on theoretical grounds, and describe a task-specific variant designed for reconstructing the large-scale distribution of gas and dark matter in the Universe known as the Cosmic web. To analyze the new model, we first explore MCPM's self-patterning behavior, showing a wide range of continuous network-like morphologies -- called "polyphorms" -- that the model produces from geometrically intuitive parameters. Applying MCPM to both simulated and observational cosmological datasets, we then evaluate its ability to produce consistent 3D density maps of the Cosmic web. Finally, we examine other possible tasks where MCPM could be useful, along with several examples of fitting to domain-specific data as proofs of concept.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Monte Carlo Physarum Machine：一种适合从稀疏 2D 和 3D 数据重建连续传输网络的计算模型。 MCPM 是 Jones 2010 年基于主体的模型的概率推广，用于模拟多头绒泡菌粘菌的生长。我们在理论基础上将 MCPM 与 Jones 的工作进行了比较，并描述了一种特定于任务的变体，该变体旨在重建宇宙中气体和暗物质的大规模分布，称为宇宙网。为了分析新模型，我们首先探索 MCPM 的自模式行为，显示了模型从几何直观参数产生的各种连续网络状形态（称为“多态性”）。将 MCPM 应用于模拟和观测宇宙学数据集，然后我们评估其生成一致的宇宙网 3D 密度图的能力。最后，我们研究了 MCPM 可能有用的其他可能任务，以及几个适合特定领域数据作为概念证明的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出蒙特卡洛黏菌机（MCPM）模型，用于从稀疏的2D/3D数据重建连续运输网络，并验证其在宇宙网大尺度结构重建中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以处理高维稀疏数据中的连续网络重构问题，需发展概率化方法模拟复杂系统（如宇宙大尺度结构）的自组织特性。
AI.method: 基于Jones 2010年黏菌生长模型，构建概率化蒙特卡洛模拟框架，通过几何参数控制网络形态生成，并应用于宇宙学观测数据与模拟数据的密度图重建。
AI.result: 模型可生成多样化的连续网络形态（polyphorms），在宇宙网重建任务中成功生成与观测数据吻合的3D密度分布图，验证了其跨领域适用性。
AI.conclusion: MCPM为复杂网络重构提供了通用框架，不仅适用于宇宙学，还可拓展至交通网络、生物系统等领域的模式识别与数据建模。

ai_content_json.method: 基于Jones 2010年黏菌生长模型，构建概率化蒙特卡洛模拟框架，通过几何参数控制网络形态生成，并应用于宇宙学观测数据与模拟数据的密度图重建。
ai_content_json.result: 模型可生成多样化的连续网络形态（polyphorms），在宇宙网重建任务中成功生成与观测数据吻合的3D密度分布图，验证了其跨领域适用性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: MCPM为复杂网络重构提供了通用框架，不仅适用于宇宙学，还可拓展至交通网络、生物系统等领域的模式识别与数据建模。

tldr: 本文提出蒙特卡洛黏菌机（MCPM）模型，用于从稀疏的2D/3D数据重建连续运输网络，并验证其在宇宙网大尺度结构重建中的有效性。

method: 基于Jones 2010年黏菌生长模型，构建概率化蒙特卡洛模拟框架，通过几何参数控制网络形态生成，并应用于宇宙学观测数据与模拟数据的密度图重建。
result: 模型可生成多样化的连续网络形态（polyphorms），在宇宙网重建任务中成功生成与观测数据吻合的3D密度分布图，验证了其跨领域适用性。
conclusion: MCPM为复杂网络重构提供了通用框架，不仅适用于宇宙学，还可拓展至交通网络、生物系统等领域的模式识别与数据建模。
search_text: Monte Carlo Physarum Machine: Characteristics of Pattern Formation in Continuous Stochastic Transport Networks 蒙特卡洛绒泡机：连续随机传输网络中模式形成的特征 We present Monte Carlo Physarum Machine: a computational model suitable for reconstructing continuous transport networks from sparse 2D and 3D data. MCPM is a probabilistic generalization of Jones's 2010 agent-based model for simulating the growth of Physarum polycephalum slime mold. We compare MCPM to Jones's work on theoretical grounds, and describe a task-specific variant designed for reconstructing the large-scale distribution of gas and dark matter in the Universe known as the Cosmic web. To analyze the new model, we first explore MCPM's self-patterning behavior, showing a wide range of continuous network-like morphologies -- called "polyphorms" -- that the model produces from geometrically intuitive parameters. Applying MCPM to both simulated and observational cosmological datasets, we then evaluate its ability to produce consistent 3D density maps of the Cosmic web. Finally, we examine other possible tasks where MCPM could be useful, along with several examples of fitting to domain-specific data as proofs of concept. 我们提出了 Monte Carlo Physarum Machine：一种适合从稀疏 2D 和 3D 数据重建连续传输网络的计算模型。 MCPM 是 Jones 2010 年基于主体的模型的概率推广，用于模拟多头绒泡菌粘菌的生长。我们在理论基础上将 MCPM 与 Jones 的工作进行了比较，并描述了一种特定于任务的变体，该变体旨在重建宇宙中气体和暗物质的大规模分布，称为宇宙网。为了分析新模型，我们首先探索 MCPM 的自模式行为，显示了模型从几何直观参数产生的各种连续网络状形态（称为“多态性”）。将 MCPM 应用于模拟和观测宇宙学数据集，然后我们评估其生成一致的宇宙网 3D 密度图的能力。最后，我们研究了 MCPM 可能有用的其他可能任务，以及几个适合特定领域数据作为概念证明的示例。 本文提出蒙特卡洛黏菌机（MCPM）模型，用于从稀疏的2D/3D数据重建连续运输网络，并验证其在宇宙网大尺度结构重建中的有效性。 Oskar Elek,Joseph N. Burchett,J. Xavier Prochaska,Angus G. Forbes astro-ph.CO,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.MA

authors_text: Zhi Hou,Baosheng Yu,Chaoyue Wang,Yibing Zhan,Dacheng Tao
title: BatchFormerV2: Exploring Sample Relationships for Dense Representation Learning
title_zh: BatchFormerV2：探索密集表示学习的样本关系
abstract: Attention mechanisms have been very popular in deep neural networks, where the Transformer architecture has achieved great success in not only natural language processing but also visual recognition applications. Recently, a new Transformer module, applying on batch dimension rather than spatial/channel dimension, i.e., BatchFormer [18], has been introduced to explore sample relationships for overcoming data scarcity challenges. However, it only works with image-level representations for classification. In this paper, we devise a more general batch Transformer module, BatchFormerV2, which further enables exploring sample relationships for dense representation learning. Specifically, when applying the proposed module, it employs a two-stream pipeline during training, i.e., either with or without a BatchFormerV2 module, where the batchformer stream can be removed for testing. Therefore, the proposed method is a plug-and-play module and can be easily integrated into different vision Transformers without any extra inference cost. Without bells and whistles, we show the effectiveness of the proposed method for a variety of popular visual recognition tasks, including image classification and two important dense prediction tasks: object detection and panoptic segmentation. Particularly, BatchFormerV2 consistently improves current DETR-based detection methods (e.g., DETR, Deformable-DETR, Conditional DETR, and SMCA) by over 1.3%. Code will be made publicly available.
summary: Attention mechanisms have been very popular in deep neural networks, where the Transformer architecture has achieved great success in not only natural language processing but also visual recognition applications. Recently, a new Transformer module, applying on batch dimension rather than spatial/channel dimension, i.e., BatchFormer [18], has been introduced to explore sample relationships for overcoming data scarcity challenges. However, it only works with image-level representations for classification. In this paper, we devise a more general batch Transformer module, BatchFormerV2, which further enables exploring sample relationships for dense representation learning. Specifically, when applying the proposed module, it employs a two-stream pipeline during training, i.e., either with or without a BatchFormerV2 module, where the batchformer stream can be removed for testing. Therefore, the proposed method is a plug-and-play module and can be easily integrated into different vision Transformers without any extra inference cost. Without bells and whistles, we show the effectiveness of the proposed method for a variety of popular visual recognition tasks, including image classification and two important dense prediction tasks: object detection and panoptic segmentation. Particularly, BatchFormerV2 consistently improves current DETR-based detection methods (e.g., DETR, Deformable-DETR, Conditional DETR, and SMCA) by over 1.3%. Code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 注意力机制在深度神经网络中非常流行，其中 Transformer 架构不仅在自然语言处理方面取得了巨大成功，而且在视觉识别应用方面也取得了巨大成功。最近，引入了一个新的 Transformer 模块，它应用于批量维度而不是空间/通道维度，即 BatchFormer [18]，用于探索样本关系以克服数据稀缺的挑战。但是，它仅适用于图像级表示进行分类。在本文中，我们设计了一个更通用的批处理 Transformer 模块 BatchFormerV2，它进一步能够探索密集表示学习的样本关系。具体来说，在应用所提出的模块时，它在训练期间采用双流管道，即带或不带 BatchFormerV2 模块，其中可以删除 batchformer 流以进行测试。因此，所提出的方法是一个即插即用模块，可以轻松集成到不同的视觉 Transformer 中，而无需任何额外的推理成本。没有花哨的东西，我们展示了所提出的方法对于各种流行的视觉识别任务的有效性，包括图像分类和两个重要的密集预测任务：对象检测和全景分割。特别是，BatchFormerV2 持续将当前基于 DETR 的检测方法（例如 DETR、Deformable-DETR、Conditional DETR 和 SMCA）改进了 1.3% 以上。代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BatchFormerV2模块，通过探索样本间关系提升密集表示学习，适用于图像分类、目标检测和全景分割等视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 现有BatchFormer仅适用于图像级分类任务，无法处理需要密集预测的视觉任务，且面临数据稀缺挑战。
AI.method: 设计双流训练管道，包含/不包含BatchFormerV2模块，测试时可移除模块无额外推理成本，实现即插即用。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测（提升1.3%+）和全景分割任务中均取得性能提升，代码将开源。
AI.conclusion: BatchFormerV2通过样本关系建模有效增强密集表示学习，为视觉任务提供通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Michael Wilmanski,Jonathan Tamir
title: Differentiable Rendering for Synthetic Aperture Radar Imagery
title_zh: 合成孔径雷达图像的可微分渲染
comment: This version of the manuscript is an updated preprint which has been recently accepted by IEEE Transactions on Aerospace Electronic Systems, but has not yet been published or processed by IEEE
comments: This version of the manuscript is an updated preprint which has been recently accepted by IEEE Transactions on Aerospace Electronic Systems, but has not yet been published or processed by IEEE
abstract: There is rising interest in differentiable rendering, which allows explicitly modeling geometric priors and constraints in optimization pipelines using first-order methods such as backpropagation. Incorporating such domain knowledge can lead to deep neural networks that are trained more robustly and with limited data, as well as the capability to solve ill-posed inverse problems. Existing efforts in differentiable rendering have focused on imagery from electro-optical sensors, particularly conventional RGB-imagery. In this work, we propose an approach for differentiable rendering of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery, which combines methods from 3D computer graphics with neural rendering. We demonstrate the approach on the inverse graphics problem of 3D Object Reconstruction from limited SAR imagery using high-fidelity simulated SAR data.
summary: There is rising interest in differentiable rendering, which allows explicitly modeling geometric priors and constraints in optimization pipelines using first-order methods such as backpropagation. Incorporating such domain knowledge can lead to deep neural networks that are trained more robustly and with limited data, as well as the capability to solve ill-posed inverse problems. Existing efforts in differentiable rendering have focused on imagery from electro-optical sensors, particularly conventional RGB-imagery. In this work, we propose an approach for differentiable rendering of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery, which combines methods from 3D computer graphics with neural rendering. We demonstrate the approach on the inverse graphics problem of 3D Object Reconstruction from limited SAR imagery using high-fidelity simulated SAR data.
abstract_zh: 人们对可微渲染越来越感兴趣，它允许使用反向传播等一阶方法对优化管道中的几何先验和约束进行显式建模。结合此类领域知识可以使深度神经网络能够在有限的数据下进行更稳健的训练，并具有解决不适定逆问题的能力。可微分渲染方面的现有工作主要集中在光电传感器的图像上，特别是传统的 RGB 图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像可微分渲染的方法，它将 3D 计算机图形学与神经渲染的方法结合起来。我们演示了使用高保真模拟 SAR 数据从有限 SAR 图像进行 3D 对象重建的逆图形问题的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合三维计算机图形学与神经渲染技术的微分渲染方法，用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像的生成与三维物体重建。
AI.motivation: 现有微分渲染技术主要针对光学成像，而SAR图像具有独特的物理特性，需专门建模。通过引入领域知识，可提升小样本下的网络鲁棒性并解决逆问题。
AI.method: 融合三维图形学物理渲染模型与神经网络，构建端到端可微分的SAR图像生成管道，并基于高保真模拟数据实现从稀疏SAR图像到三维结构的逆图形问题求解。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在有限SAR图像条件下实现高精度三维物体重建的有效性，证明了微分渲染技术在SAR领域的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为SAR图像的逆问题求解提供了新范式，展示了微分渲染在雷达遥感等非可见光领域的应用潜力。

search_text: Differentiable Rendering for Synthetic Aperture Radar Imagery 合成孔径雷达图像的可微分渲染 There is rising interest in differentiable rendering, which allows explicitly modeling geometric priors and constraints in optimization pipelines using first-order methods such as backpropagation. Existing efforts in differentiable rendering have focused on imagery from electro-optical sensors, particularly conventional RGB-imagery. In this work, we propose an approach for differentiable rendering of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery, which combines methods from 3D computer graphics with neural rendering. We demonstrate the approach on the inverse graphics problem of 3D Object Reconstruction from limited SAR imagery using high-fidelity simulated SAR data. 人们对可微渲染越来越感兴趣，它允许使用反向传播等一阶方法对优化管道中的几何先验和约束进行显式建模。结合此类领域知识可以使深度神经网络能够在有限的数据下进行更稳健的训练，并具有解决不适定逆问题的能力。可微分渲染方面的现有工作主要集中在光电传感器的图像上，特别是传统的 RGB 图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 图像可微分渲染的方法，它将 3D 计算机图形学与神经渲染的方法结合起来。我们演示了使用高保真模拟 SAR 数据从有限 SAR 图像进行 3D 对象重建的逆图形问题的方法。 本文提出了一种结合三维计算机图形学与神经渲染技术的微分渲染方法，用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像的生成与三维物体重建。 Michael Wilmanski,Jonathan Tamir eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Haoyu He,Jianfei Cai,Zizheng Pan,Jing Liu,Jing Zhang,Dacheng Tao,Bohan Zhuang
title: Dynamic Focus-aware Positional Queries for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的动态焦点感知位置查询
abstract: The DETR-like segmentors have underpinned the most recent breakthroughs in semantic segmentation, which end-to-end train a set of queries representing the class prototypes or target segments. Recently, masked attention is proposed to restrict each query to only attend to the foreground regions predicted by the preceding decoder block for easier optimization. Although promising, it relies on the learnable parameterized positional queries which tend to encode the dataset statistics, leading to inaccurate localization for distinct individual queries. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective query design for semantic segmentation termed Dynamic Focus-aware Positional Queries (DFPQ), which dynamically generates positional queries conditioned on the cross-attention scores from the preceding decoder block and the positional encodings for the corresponding image features, simultaneously. Therefore, our DFPQ preserves rich localization information for the target segments and provides accurate and fine-grained positional priors. In addition, we propose to efficiently deal with high-resolution cross-attention by only aggregating the contextual tokens based on the low-resolution cross-attention scores to perform local relation aggregation. Extensive experiments on ADE20K and Cityscapes show that with the two modifications on Mask2former, our framework achieves SOTA performance and outperforms Mask2former by clear margins of 1.1%, 1.9%, and 1.1% single-scale mIoU with ResNet-50, Swin-T, and Swin-B backbones on the ADE20K validation set, respectively. Source code is available at https://github.com/ziplab/FASeg
summary: The DETR-like segmentors have underpinned the most recent breakthroughs in semantic segmentation, which end-to-end train a set of queries representing the class prototypes or target segments. Recently, masked attention is proposed to restrict each query to only attend to the foreground regions predicted by the preceding decoder block for easier optimization. Although promising, it relies on the learnable parameterized positional queries which tend to encode the dataset statistics, leading to inaccurate localization for distinct individual queries. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective query design for semantic segmentation termed Dynamic Focus-aware Positional Queries (DFPQ), which dynamically generates positional queries conditioned on the cross-attention scores from the preceding decoder block and the positional encodings for the corresponding image features, simultaneously. Therefore, our DFPQ preserves rich localization information for the target segments and provides accurate and fine-grained positional priors. In addition, we propose to efficiently deal with high-resolution cross-attention by only aggregating the contextual tokens based on the low-resolution cross-attention scores to perform local relation aggregation. Extensive experiments on ADE20K and Cityscapes show that with the two modifications on Mask2former, our framework achieves SOTA performance and outperforms Mask2former by clear margins of 1.1%, 1.9%, and 1.1% single-scale mIoU with ResNet-50, Swin-T, and Swin-B backbones on the ADE20K validation set, respectively. Source code is available at https://github.com/ziplab/FASeg
abstract_zh: 类似 DETR 的分段器支撑了语义分段的最新突破，它端到端地训练一组表示类原型或目标分段的查询。最近，提出了屏蔽注意力来限制每个查询仅关注由前面的解码器块预测的前景区域，以便于优化。尽管前景广阔，但它依赖于可学习的参数化位置查询，这些查询往往会对数据集统计数据进行编码，从而导致不同的单个查询的定位不准确。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的语义分割查询设计，称为动态焦点感知位置查询（DFPQ），它同时根据前面解码器块的交叉注意力分数和相应图像特征的位置编码动态生成位置查询。因此，我们的 DFPQ 保留了目标片段的丰富定位信息，并提供准确且细粒度的位置先验。此外，我们建议通过仅根据低分辨率交叉注意分数聚合上下文标记来执行局部关系聚合，从而有效地处理高分辨率交叉注意。在 ADE20K 和 Cityscapes 上进行的大量实验表明，通过对 Mask2former 进行两次修改，我们的框架实现了 SOTA 性能，并且在 ADE20K 验证集上与 ResNet-50、Swin-T 和 Swin-B 主干网相比，单尺度 mIoU 分别高出 1.1%、1.9% 和 1.1%，明显优于 Mask2former。源代码可在 https://github.com/ziplab/FASeg 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态聚焦感知位置查询（DFPQ）方法，用于改进语义分割任务中的查询设计，以提高定位精度和分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于DETR的分割方法依赖可学习的位置查询，这些查询容易编码数据集统计信息，导致对不同目标的定位不准确，影响分割效果。
AI.method: DFPQ通过结合前一解码器块的交叉注意力分数和图像特征的位置编码，动态生成位置查询，同时利用低分辨率交叉注意力分数聚合上下文token以提高计算效率。
AI.result: 在ADE20K和Cityscapes数据集上，DFPQ在Mask2former基础上分别提升了1.1%、1.9%和1.1%的单尺度mIoU指标（ResNet-50、Swin-T、Swin-B骨干网络）。
AI.conclusion: DFPQ通过动态生成位置查询和高效上下文聚合，显著提升了语义分割的精度，达到了当时最先进的性能水平。

authors_text: Muhammad Huzaifah,Ivan Kukanov
title: An Analysis of Semantically-Aligned Speech-Text Embeddings
title_zh: 语义对齐的语音文本嵌入分析
comment: This is the accepted version of the paper published at IEEE Spoken Language Technology (SLT) Workshop 2022
comments: This is the accepted version of the paper published at IEEE Spoken Language Technology (SLT) Workshop 2022
abstract: Embeddings play an important role in end-to-end solutions for multi-modal language processing problems. Although there has been some effort to understand the properties of single-modality embedding spaces, particularly that of text, their cross-modal counterparts are less understood. In this work, we study some intrinsic properties of a joint speech-text embedding space, constructed by minimizing the distance between paired utterance and transcription inputs in a teacher-student model setup, that are informative for several prominent use cases. We found that incorporating automatic speech recognition through both pretraining and multitask scenarios aid semantic alignment significantly, resulting in more tightly coupled embeddings. To analyse cross-modal embeddings we utilise a quantitative retrieval accuracy metric for semantic alignment, zero-shot classification for generalisability, and probing of the encoders to observe the extent of knowledge transfer from one modality to another.
summary: Embeddings play an important role in end-to-end solutions for multi-modal language processing problems. Although there has been some effort to understand the properties of single-modality embedding spaces, particularly that of text, their cross-modal counterparts are less understood. In this work, we study some intrinsic properties of a joint speech-text embedding space, constructed by minimizing the distance between paired utterance and transcription inputs in a teacher-student model setup, that are informative for several prominent use cases. We found that incorporating automatic speech recognition through both pretraining and multitask scenarios aid semantic alignment significantly, resulting in more tightly coupled embeddings. To analyse cross-modal embeddings we utilise a quantitative retrieval accuracy metric for semantic alignment, zero-shot classification for generalisability, and probing of the encoders to observe the extent of knowledge transfer from one modality to another.
abstract_zh: 嵌入在多模态语言处理问题的端到端解决方案中发挥着重要作用。尽管人们在理解单模态嵌入空间的属性（尤其是文本的属性）方面做出了一些努力，但对它们的跨模态嵌入空间的理解却较少。在这项工作中，我们研究了联合语音文本嵌入空间的一些内在属性，该空间是通过最小化教师-学生模型设置中配对话语和转录输入之间的距离而构建的，这对于几个突出的用例提供了信息。我们发现，通过预训练和多任务场景结合自动语音识别可以显着帮助语义对齐，从而产生更紧密耦合的嵌入。为了分析跨模态嵌入，我们利用定量检索精度指标进行语义对齐、零样本分类以实现通用性，并利用编码器探测来观察知识从一种模态到另一种模态的转移程度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究语义对齐的语音-文本联合嵌入空间的内在属性，以提升多模态语言处理任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管单模态嵌入空间（如文本）已有较多研究，但跨模态嵌入空间的特性仍不明确，需探索如何通过预训练和多任务学习提升语音与文本的语义对齐。
AI.method: 采用教师-学生模型构建联合嵌入空间，结合自动语音识别（ASR）进行预训练和多任务学习，并通过检索准确率、零样本分类和编码器探测分析跨模态特性。
AI.result: ASR在预训练和多任务场景中显著增强语义对齐，使嵌入空间更紧密；定量指标和探测实验验证了跨模态知识迁移的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态嵌入的语义对齐可通过ASR与多任务学习实现，为多模态应用提供理论支持与技术路径。

authors_text: Weixiang Xu,Xiangyu He,Tianli Zhao,Qinghao Hu,Peisong Wang,Jian Cheng
title: Soft Threshold Ternary Networks
title_zh: 软阈值三元网络
abstract: Large neural networks are difficult to deploy on mobile devices because of intensive computation and storage. To alleviate it, we study ternarization, a balance between efficiency and accuracy that quantizes both weights and activations into ternary values. In previous ternarized neural networks, a hard threshold Δ is introduced to determine quantization intervals. Although the selection of Δ greatly affects the training results, previous works estimate Δ via an approximation or treat it as a hyper-parameter, which is suboptimal. In this paper, we present the Soft Threshold Ternary Networks (STTN), which enables the model to automatically determine quantization intervals instead of depending on a hard threshold. Concretely, we replace the original ternary kernel with the addition of two binary kernels at training time, where ternary values are determined by the combination of two corresponding binary values. At inference time, we add up the two binary kernels to obtain a single ternary kernel. Our method dramatically outperforms current state-of-the-arts, lowering the performance gap between full-precision networks and extreme low bit networks. Experiments on ImageNet with ResNet-18 (Top-1 66.2%) achieves new state-of-the-art. Update: In this version, we further fine-tune the experimental hyperparameters and training procedure. The latest STTN shows that ResNet-18 with ternary weights and ternary activations achieves up to 68.2% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet. Code is available at: github.com/WeixiangXu/STTN.
summary: Large neural networks are difficult to deploy on mobile devices because of intensive computation and storage. To alleviate it, we study ternarization, a balance between efficiency and accuracy that quantizes both weights and activations into ternary values. In previous ternarized neural networks, a hard threshold Δ is introduced to determine quantization intervals. Although the selection of Δ greatly affects the training results, previous works estimate Δ via an approximation or treat it as a hyper-parameter, which is suboptimal. In this paper, we present the Soft Threshold Ternary Networks (STTN), which enables the model to automatically determine quantization intervals instead of depending on a hard threshold. Concretely, we replace the original ternary kernel with the addition of two binary kernels at training time, where ternary values are determined by the combination of two corresponding binary values. At inference time, we add up the two binary kernels to obtain a single ternary kernel. Our method dramatically outperforms current state-of-the-arts, lowering the performance gap between full-precision networks and extreme low bit networks. Experiments on ImageNet with ResNet-18 (Top-1 66.2%) achieves new state-of-the-art. Update: In this version, we further fine-tune the experimental hyperparameters and training procedure. The latest STTN shows that ResNet-18 with ternary weights and ternary activations achieves up to 68.2% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet. Code is available at: github.com/WeixiangXu/STTN.
abstract_zh: 由于计算和存储密集，大型神经网络很难部署在移动设备上。为了缓解这个问题，我们研究了三元化，即效率和准确性之间的平衡，将权重和激活量化为三元值。在之前的三元化神经网络中，引入了硬阈值Δ来确定量化间隔。虽然 Δ 的选择极大地影响了训练结果，但之前的工作通过近似估计 Δ 或将其视为超参数，这是次优的。在本文中，我们提出了软阈值三元网络（STTN），它使模型能够自动确定量化间隔，而不是依赖于硬阈值。具体来说，我们在训练时添加两个二元内核来替换原来的三元内核，其中三元值由两个相应的二进制值的组合确定。在推理时，我们将两个二元内核相加以获得一个三元内核。我们的方法显着优于当前最先进的技术，缩小了全精度网络和极低位网络之间的性能差距。使用 ResNet-18 (Top-1 66.2%) 在 ImageNet 上进行的实验达到了新的最先进水平。更新：在这个版本中，我们进一步微调了实验超参数和训练过程。最新的 STTN 显示，具有三元权重和三元激活的 ResNet-18 在 ImageNet 上实现了高达 68.2% 的 Top-1 准确率。代码位于：github.com/WeixiangXu/STTN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Soft Threshold Ternary Networks (STTN)的方法，通过自动确定量化区间来优化三值神经网络的训练与推理过程，以提升模型在移动端的部署效率。
AI.motivation: 传统三值神经网络依赖硬阈值Δ来确定量化区间，但Δ的选择对训练结果影响显著且通常通过近似或作为超参数处理，导致效果次优。本文旨在通过自动确定量化区间解决这一问题。
AI.method: 训练时用两个二值核替代原始三值核，三值通过二值组合确定；推理时将二值核相加得到三值核，无需硬阈值。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，ResNet-18模型的Top-1准确率提升至68.2%，优于现有最先进方法，显著缩小了全精度网络与低比特网络的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: STTN通过自动量化区间选择有效提升了三值网络的性能，为移动端部署提供了更优的效率与精度平衡方案。
